name: April Christenson
subject: Fwd: Peter, we've got a last minute gift idea!
body:
| | | Hi Peter, The holidays are right around the corner, so get into the spirit of giving or finish your holiday shopping with OLCV’s gratitude challenge. [**This year, we’re challenging our members to show their gratitude this holiday season by giving the gift of an OLCV membership!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99091997/518821687/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMWQ1ZWRlLWZiYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hXldrHcM_d0m_AHOIsNeM7_ie9NpFTGC1UlQVFffyFk=&emci=68486fbe-58be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=631d5ede-fbbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)** ** Why should you give the gift of an OLCV membership? It’s simple! A donation to OLCV is one that stands up for climate action, funding our work to protect our clean air and water, wildlife, public lands, and climate that we all depend on. **If you know someone who loves the environment, there truly is no better gift than one that protects it for generations to come.** [**There’s still time to take part in this challenge before the holidays, so give the gift of climate action now! Will you take part in our gratitude challenge this holiday season?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99091998/518821688/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMWQ1ZWRlLWZiYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hXldrHcM_d0m_AHOIsNeM7_ie9NpFTGC1UlQVFffyFk=&emci=68486fbe-58be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=631d5ede-fbbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)

---
April Christenson OLCV Development Director _P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising,_[_please fill out this form here to opt-out_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99092000/518821690/357648456?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMWQ1ZWRlLWZiYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hXldrHcM_d0m_AHOIsNeM7_ie9NpFTGC1UlQVFffyFk=&emci=68486fbe-58be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=631d5ede-fbbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230) _but still remain on our general email list!_
---
|
---
---
| | **Dear Peter, need a last minute gift idea for a loved one who is passionate about climate action?**
---
Look no further! [**Surprise someone this year with a donation to OLCV and take part in the spirit of giving!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99092001/518821691/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMWQ1ZWRlLWZiYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hXldrHcM_d0m_AHOIsNeM7_ie9NpFTGC1UlQVFffyFk=&emci=68486fbe-58be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=631d5ede-fbbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230) This year is a great time to give someone the gift of climate action. It’s dark to think of, but the truth is, the state of our climate is not great with the newly elected federal government. Despite this, there is so much we can continue to do right here at home to protect our beloved Oregon. The rest of the country is looking to us to lead, and provide hope for what is possible. I know all of you give me hope, because together, I know we can make a difference.
---
| [Give a gift!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99092002/518821692/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMWQ1ZWRlLWZiYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hXldrHcM_d0m_AHOIsNeM7_ie9NpFTGC1UlQVFffyFk=&emci=68486fbe-58be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=631d5ede-fbbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)

---
You’re one of our committed supporters, so I don’t need to convince you that OLCV is committed to fighting relentlessly for our climate. You know OLCV will do whatever it takes to protect Oregon’s clean air and water, public lands, wildlife, and climate, because we know you will too. **In times like these, a donation to OLCV is a powerful one, it shows our country what we as Oregonians value.**[**We’re challenging our members to show their gratitude this holiday season by giving the gift of an OLCV membership!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99092004/518821694/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMWQ1ZWRlLWZiYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hXldrHcM_d0m_AHOIsNeM7_ie9NpFTGC1UlQVFffyFk=&emci=68486fbe-58be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=631d5ede-fbbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230) By giving on behalf of someone else, you get to pick a special ecard to send their way with your own personalized message. (_Psst! This means it's also a great gift for someone who lives far away!) _ The holidays are a time for giving and hope. I hope you’ll all find that this holiday season, and take part in the season of giving. As always, thank you for your support of OLCV. All of us at OLCV wish you the best for this holiday season!
---
[Give a gift!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99092005/518821695/176159279?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzMWQ1ZWRlLWZiYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hXldrHcM_d0m_AHOIsNeM7_ie9NpFTGC1UlQVFffyFk=&emci=68486fbe-58be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=631d5ede-fbbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=2107230)

body:
Let’s get this done
| | **BREAKING**
** _Push for D.C. Statehood Gains New Traction Post-Election_** We are closer than EVER to adding Washington, D.C. as our 51st state..._YES!!_

But Republicans are coming up with every excuse they can to CONTINUE to disenfranchise D.C.’s 700,000 residents... **NO!!**

[**We need 5,000 Democrats to join our fight and show MASSIVE grassroots support for D.C. Statehood. Rush $7 to help get it done »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85548?t=6&akid=18262%2E878179%2E0ZnvqN) | [**RUSH $7 TO HELP PASS D.C. STATEHOOD »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85548?t=7&akid=18262%2E878179%2E0ZnvqN)
---
Republicans are blocking D.C. statehood with bogus excuses because they KNOW it would almost certainly mean _2 more Democratic Senators!_

D.C. has more residents than Wyoming, Vermont, and North Dakota — it’s LONG past time they have proper representation!

[**PLEASE, this is our chance to drastically improve our country and democracy — AND cut down the GOP’s Senate majority! Rush $7 by MIDNIGHT to help pass D.C. Statehood ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85548?t=8&akid=18262%2E878179%2E0ZnvqN)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

[] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Other Amount [] Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard. They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress. We CANNOT let them get away with it! Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [] Thanks for taking action, Team RTP [] The Real Texas PAC 1150 N Loop 1604 W Ste 108-230 San Antonio, TX 78248 United States Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. name: Tobias Read
subject: Please tell me what you think
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241221em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=241221em]
I will assume the office of Oregon Secretary of State in just a few weeks, and I am eager to serve the people of our great state.
While I’m proud of our victory in November, Oregon faces some tough times ahead. Whether it’s protecting our reproductive rights, ensuring that the Affordable Care Act isn’t repealed, ensuring that public lands stay in public hands, or pushing back against efforts to weaken Oregon’s election laws and restrict voting rights...we’ve been here before. So it will be offices like this one to fight for what makes Oregon a special place.
We need people like you to speak up, defend our values, and continue working to advance Oregon.
As we prepare for 2025 and what lies ahead, I want to know what issues you care about, what problems you need help solving, and what you’re thinking about for the future of politics. I hope you'll take a few moments to fill out this survey and tell me what's on your mind: [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DFiCgSrZJEu55qmpD1t8ig2]
TAKE THE SURVEY >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DFiCgSrZJEu55qmpD1t8ig2]
Here’s what I know for sure: Those who seek to pull us backward can only win when we’re divided.
But I firmly believe we have more in common than that which divides us.
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. By sharing your priorities and the issues affecting your life, you can help me ensure that I continue to fight for the issues that matter to Oregon.
Please complete my 2025 priorities survey today and share your thoughts. I look forward to reading your responses. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DFiCgSrZJEu55qmpD1t8ig2]
TAKE THE SURVEY >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DFiCgSrZJEu55qmpD1t8ig2]
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State-elect

| Dear friends, In just ten days we are going to face our Year-End Federal Election Commission Filing Deadline. **This is our final FEC Filing deadline before Donald Trump is sworn in** , and all eyes will be on us to see whether Democrats are demoralized or ready to hold Donald Trump accountable. **[We are looking to raise another $15,000 so that when our filing goes public, the media and pundits will see that Democrats haven’t given up and are still in this fight! Will you make a donation of $15 or $35 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99092959/518846904/587040626?refcode=20241221_FR_45DO_EOQ2&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA3MDVjZC0xMWMwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngT9cVs2NEOptgtDIDZV0cYyzhWU9zAxv8Pgzc76bJ8=)** [CHIP IN $15 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99092960/518846905/587040626?&refcode=20241221_FR_45DO_EOQ2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA3MDVjZC0xMWMwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngT9cVs2NEOptgtDIDZV0cYyzhWU9zAxv8Pgzc76bJ8=) We’re sure you have heard some of the media stories. The pundits on TV are saying that Democrats are demoralized from Donald Trump’s victory and are giving up. **We’ll be honest: We’ve seen the exact opposite here in California**. For weeks after Election Night, countless volunteers helped us ensure that every eligible vote was called in the U.S. House races. _People were ready to do their part_. And we need THAT to be the story that media outlets report. But they will be looking closely at our FEC filing to see where our grassroots fundraising numbers are. If they see us raising less than this time last year, they could conclude that Democrats are tuned out. **[That’s why we are asking: Will you rush a donation of $15 or more so we can have the resources we need before Donald Trump is sworn in? Because of our upcoming FEC deadline, this is a truly pivotal moment for your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99092961/518846906/587040626?refcode=20241221_FR_45DO_EOQ2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA3MDVjZC0xMWMwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngT9cVs2NEOptgtDIDZV0cYyzhWU9zAxv8Pgzc76bJ8=)** [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99092962/518846907/587040626?&refcode=20241221_FR_45DO_EOQ2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzA3MDVjZC0xMWMwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngT9cVs2NEOptgtDIDZV0cYyzhWU9zAxv8Pgzc76bJ8=)

clean_body: and it's 10 days away — | = | Dear friends, In just ten days we are going to face our Year-End Federal Election Commission Filing Deadline. This is our final FEC Filing deadline before Donald Trump is sworn in , and all eyes will be on us to see whether Democrats are demoralized or ready to hold Donald Trump accountable. = = We’re sure you have heard some of the media stories. The pundits on TV are saying that Democrats are demoralized from Donald Trump’s victory and are giving up. We’ll be honest: We’ve seen the exact opposite here in California. For weeks after Election Night, countless volunteers helped us ensure that every eligible vote was called in the U.S. House races. People were ready to do their part. And we need THAT to be the story that media outlets report. But they will be looking closely at our FEC filing to see where our grassroots fundraising numbers are. If they see us raising less than this time last year, they could conclude that Democrats are tuned out. = = = = = = With Republicans now controlling the White House and both chambers of Congress, California stands at the forefront of leading the way in driving economic growth, creating good-paying jobs, lowering the cost of living, and protecting our fundamental values. Together, we must fight for the future. Thank you for being in this fight with us. We are so appreciative. \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zom5n75vjgggl3pmif4hpvmgtem9jmh4romkg090_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3im1o32c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkika7nicgvub33kolbhb85vip3lr6n7od3ucs2g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3im1o32c5h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl77i0rhgtn7g6uupa96n8el9b6g2j429bqjs1qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3im1o32c5h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq4dfctn6q0i49l3q5vssdojcf6ua60qnsd8j4c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3im1o32c5h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkgaoqjjr6q1hhd2j1qcrccousf2omiso9lt97r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3im1o32c5h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfdj6ne3it4o36qfvg5esd1bhtpli4r525tc5s08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3im1o32c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze44fe1ni898js17ct39kug9k4ocjso8bre2ick8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9qvlr1mu23ndk0q6njcmovmppo9sb0phr0u9bco_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjm7s7eb26j5a0vjms6vh9s48v74hnv2hu0s5dr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z073l6ce41o3seq0tdubuutn4rf6276lvkt5bm9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1g4dcbj8lqbgvr2pnn11guobdf6ejdftr2ejs0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0874devk4am283trl7oqihomoo1cl7co0m10gl8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9bgj5m1vmfsi3oonsiqbve2kuvi99t1a601f5to_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zia9r9s0rig3crrigquap0pbs86cosl047nesbto_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zejm59qmv6q0seng9ulr0c4qk23308285a9s2nfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zan8gepc6s25qghqqg2q06p312gjj2kih2d2jmio_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu5m2j6v8prqu1i1c5vur2kkgvs10fvj5jbc3rlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm8or1c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Shine Brighter in 2025!
body:
As the year draws to a close and we reflect on the blessings of the past 12 months

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbrb9ajm6bksvintnli38ctlp95mvr7l2cb5t5b0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs)
---

Hey there Friend, As the year draws to a close and we reflect on the blessings of the past 12 months, many of us are also thinking about the new year ahead--setting goals, making resolutions, and seeking fresh ways to grow in our faith. If one of your resolutions is to live more intentionally, to shine brighter for Christ, or to make a deeper impact in your community, _This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World_ by Dr. Joseph Stowell is the perfect resource to start your year strong.

In a world that feels increasingly divided and disconnected from biblical truth, it's easy to feel overwhelmed or even discouraged. But _This Light of Mine_ offers a powerful call to pivot from frustration and hopelessness to hope and action. Dr. Stowell encourages us to follow the example of Jesus--not just in our personal lives but in how we engage with the world around us.

[As you think about your spiritual goals for the new year, consider how _This Light of Mine_ can help:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj8o8nf7j9273rmpp26f10g91m755qs7qqu2msr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs)
* **Refocus your priorities:** In times of confusion and cultural shifts, Dr. Stowell shows us how to refocus on the mission of Christ's Kingdom, not earthly battles.
* **Live with boldness and courage:** This book empowers you to engage with those who need the gospel without compromising truth--living out your faith with both love and clarity.
* **Lead with grace:** Learn to lead others by the example of Jesus, offering hope and guidance to a world that is searching for answers.

No matter what your resolutions may be, we hope that _This Light of Mine_ will provide encouragement to follow Jesus faithfully.

Give today at this link and receive your copy for your gift of any amount: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4lf1vraa1tk3al26drl4mijkqifjtq0dpt1jk3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs)

As a thank you for your gift of any amount to support the ongoing mission of _Today in the Word_ , we'd love to send you an exclusive pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_. But don't wait--the deadline to receive this book is fast approaching:**11:59 pm on December 31st.**

[Your generous gift will help us continue to provide Bible-based resources and daily devotionals to millions of readers around the world, equipping them to live out their faith in the coming year.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf8uvstt72h7a8avu6dojfo05p0uhg3u22gd8vuo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs)

Take this opportunity to make a meaningful start to your new year. When you partner with us, you'll not only be supporting the ministry of _Today in the Word_ but also receiving a valuable resource that will be sure to challenge and encourage you in the year ahead.

We are grateful for your support and excited to see how God will use this book to shape your 2025!

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz
Managing Editor, _Today in the Word_

name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Real Ameican Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcmj344vj2don07gbhnr7ehvdvo8sn5o3i7i4qgo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z38pommo46tisoqamsap2k9ktdpk6tva5b26j1c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7782ok1t8j8q49r01387e3ft4m6qd9a93i7k420_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zoqmbbnq5t029811e02ikhhnusktgbpr0pmdqlb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zatpolkhl8kbpjcm8apcj3m2d15ndtt95cgpvn0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zfssq1tlgkbssstbbv4v4ifuf1bnoul7g0staedg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmcob2chh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help keep our family together for Christmas
body:
But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.

| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpfef41eicfnndaqt892kshhfpjlt8lb8h4c39l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj2cph2bs)** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu37pdqllukm50sq9cvdkupvcc1t7v57phd2nce8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj2cph2bs)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...**life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[**I'm turning to you for help.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv9o4j6p7dr6dodvp0nhqhbmmk6il65jvkign7ig_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj2cph2bs)** James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. **He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.** When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson** , **the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...**[**Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3hg76j71bh6t3hu6f54u7vd847d65jq6ljue4v8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj2cph2bs)** His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. **[**So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd81cpv7rf83l0rjuenr1e69ulj7d9vqsi5grp0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj2cph2bs)** LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's **[**your $35 gift**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc1162l7lq2kbf18v2gp1gfaq3rl2jefmunc2fn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj2cph2bs)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. **Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. **Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpl0n3a2prtsro4dm98pk2jjiqhj4eo8hsjl80k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj2cph2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---

clean_body: But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry. | | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. | | Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...life in prison could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson , the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 American Briefing PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Shrinking muscle - NP
subject: URGENT: 5 Muscle Loss Myths Seniors Need To Know
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Here's a fact you NEED to
know…

Muscle loss is NOT an inevitable
part of aging.

In fact, you can REVERSE it.

You just need to get more of THIS
unique protein in your diet.

As a Doctor of Physical Therapy,
many of my clients think that losing strength is just something
they have to deal with as they get older…

But this myth is completely
false, and it's downright dangerous…

Unfortunately, it's not the only
misinformation older adults have been told…

⇒ Attention Seniors: 5
Dangerous Muscle Loss Myths Threatening Your Strength

Don't let your body waste away.

I've seen it all too often in my
older patients.

They think muscle loss is just a
part of aging… But it doesn't have to be.

Add this unique protein to your
diet and see what happens.

Take care,

-Dr. Chad Walding
DPT, ISSA Nutrition Specialist &
NativePath Co-Founder

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Shine Brighter in 2025!
body:
As the year draws to a close and we reflect on the blessings of the past 12 months

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z02sgaqnk4o13vm9p9ueko7r1pv1vko337pces7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj6chh2bs)
---

Hey there Friend, As the year draws to a close and we reflect on the blessings of the past 12 months, many of us are also thinking about the new year ahead--setting goals, making resolutions, and seeking fresh ways to grow in our faith. If one of your resolutions is to live more intentionally, to shine brighter for Christ, or to make a deeper impact in your community, _This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World_ by Dr. Joseph Stowell is the perfect resource to start your year strong.

In a world that feels increasingly divided and disconnected from biblical truth, it's easy to feel overwhelmed or even discouraged. But _This Light of Mine_ offers a powerful call to pivot from frustration and hopelessness to hope and action. Dr. Stowell encourages us to follow the example of Jesus--not just in our personal lives but in how we engage with the world around us.

[As you think about your spiritual goals for the new year, consider how _This Light of Mine_ can help:](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq6trjfusq760ep6u5hv5ae38e815o4oqfdsoji0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj6chh2bs)
* **Refocus your priorities:** In times of confusion and cultural shifts, Dr. Stowell shows us how to refocus on the mission of Christ's Kingdom, not earthly battles.
* **Live with boldness and courage:** This book empowers you to engage with those who need the gospel without compromising truth--living out your faith with both love and clarity.
* **Lead with grace:** Learn to lead others by the example of Jesus, offering hope and guidance to a world that is searching for answers.

No matter what your resolutions may be, we hope that _This Light of Mine_ will provide encouragement to follow Jesus faithfully.

Give today at this link and receive your copy for your gift of any amount: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zji7lfonrj12u9ft7bd7fn3467shl2gle252ns48_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj6chh2bs)

As a thank you for your gift of any amount to support the ongoing mission of _Today in the Word_ , we'd love to send you an exclusive pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_. But don't wait--the deadline to receive this book is fast approaching:**11:59 pm on December 31st.**

[Your generous gift will help us continue to provide Bible-based resources and daily devotionals to millions of readers around the world, equipping them to live out their faith in the coming year.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za2pmmck8h967agsbo76m2qoidhrvulknm7r6qs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj6chh2bs)

Take this opportunity to make a meaningful start to your new year. When you partner with us, you'll not only be supporting the ministry of _Today in the Word_ but also receiving a valuable resource that will be sure to challenge and encourage you in the year ahead.

We are grateful for your support and excited to see how God will use this book to shape your 2025!

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz
Managing Editor, _Today in the Word_
---
|
---

GOP Presidential
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqjj0cvokla4dqhu4inrifd4u8uu5lo22njcltj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj4cjh2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zfmfl5ktjbuhpfl6m1s4q6v2pvbbiiqobrgo9k28_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj4cjh2bs) [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zfhklaj8u0md85mvjikgeo1b71ieibj4jacp85o0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj4cjh2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zslo1rn3shccac1km9nqgr11alegj0at9n1kdfi8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj4cjh2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqpioridba86l2oagdks893dl1hhid54cod2fgag_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hmaoj4cjh2bs)
---

Update For America

_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Briefing PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help keep our family together for Christmas
body:
But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.

| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zqfl72rj9s0a45u2fp9psvufk49jckclvpf0ejtg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm1o72cdh2bs)** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8pjkhuq2d8lu6p1rnff7q0q4gi5fmjblush4b9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm1o72cdh2bs)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...**life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[**I'm turning to you for help.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg2s3r38alqee4si1adpord7p2hnbr1fcuag6afo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm1o72cdh2bs)** James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. **He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.** When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson** , **the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...**[**Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze2btnvfju0pnpddq56vn1n24ppe0hi99rp0rhso_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm1o72cdh2bs)** His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. **[**So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkesef7jgs7qcsojme8ipeq0u0c6l6qmb7ladp08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm1o72cdh2bs)** LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's **[**your $35 gift**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zusn3eq1m27uk4auk57k9jaap2crnbtpdqd62elo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm1o72cdh2bs)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. **Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. **Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh0pmlf8vqpcfe05hu5c117d889o3grqdt56s8uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm1o72cdh2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmmal314l5tbtcd4sea46mbv78h296srfiehph70_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkcqb4tjhe6rrfdljkeqjetjnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36c3g69o34s8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5ge6o70s9hm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsn96uuedjf34qmtup7ebm08njfep6jqasgf55d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm1o72cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh83oqddngsh5s0ut02daar5sfgk1kn2c5rpbrp8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5ge6o70s9hm49fg)

name: Hellfire PAC
subject: Elon and Vivek’s NEW PODCAST!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hellfire PAC
body:
Pinch me, I’m dreaming, Friend!

| | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zqadp37behvdhedaev7da72hb5mpdll1p7p5lm08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1c3hm9pr4c9h2bs)
---
Friend, Elon and Vivek are starting a Department of Government Efficiency podcast!

What better way to help hold the government accountable than to bring the public along to see all of the wasteful spending, unnecessary regulations and fraud that goes on.

Chinese investor groups and CCP-sponsored companies are devouring farmland all across the United States

| |
---
| | | **China-owned companies have bought many acres near U.S. military bases.**
Friend, it's time to read the handwriting on the wall.

Chinese investor groups and CCP-sponsored companies are devouring farmland all across the United States - _**legally.**_** **

As it stands, our laws allow foreign entities to purchase territory in the United States without limit. There are absolutely _**no restrictions on the amount of private U.S. agricultural land that can be foreign-owned.**_

If nothing is done to address this, soon the United States will no longer be owned by Americans. Instead, we will be renting our homes and buying our food from the countries who want to put America __**LAST**__.

So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! name: The Last BlackOut
subject: Is this the REAL reason for the assassination attempt?
body:
All I can say is, thank God he survived...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19448/6374453/35eaf0dc02938ca59dae4811bb33f22788e654bb/154c093c69c890cd3d6fb612a2317e58bebf5a17)
---
| | |
---
_December 22nd, 2024_
---
| | |
---
Dear Patriot, The assassination attempt against president Trump sent shockwaves through this country. All I can say is, thank God he survived. But if you’re like me, you’re wondering how this could have happened. Was it just incompetence? Or is there something more sinister going on? [Can president Trump even _trust_ the Secret Service anymore?](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19448/6374453/35eaf0dc02938ca59dae4811bb33f22788e654bb/154c093c69c890cd3d6fb612a2317e58bebf5a17) These are questions we may never get straight answers to. But one thing is for sure... The global elites CANNOT let Trump win. So the question is... Why? Why are they SO desperate to keep Trump out of the White House? And more importantly... the forces behind the assassination attempt... whoever they are... will they try again? **[Watch this video to find out...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19448/6374453/35eaf0dc02938ca59dae4811bb33f22788e654bb/154c093c69c890cd3d6fb612a2317e58bebf5a17)**
