name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help keep our family together for Christmas
body:
But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.

| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38a79b9970db475c8c5149cc1777443c&_e=0ofn8bPqzTfuqoza0fUism_yTDpfxc8MrBs9niGT--E-L5EOJSlReYqqhvG2n5AUYslbIUqP4KdfVZWR3VaA3RMUYoAr0vPofFVMPJqhMNtdMGpy2J7jU47zHR10XfAcSJs_C5tAnUV6nrgCK9t2fccq9tVTX0fjtjhiPBcuqMceqEQkrWpMrGbWGuRRfZrlpD-r9x4lDxhQEJ59ZhsdILXHCdwEvleuGGTQTbtRSdkofK44FvHwjJ6pJOEpOyiSn-yxKYSvJuoaAACPsRb6AoniZjgZyUB45PihYb6aeXkjPeJ4HNzQjfMfPYwUYL11ugqIu9SPX58E3AE2N5324FgmKOFwhvQwNnBpzwOm8lJ8qanmVXplKM5jUC2G-rQdAaPFwOYp6lEf5hT5PSwdLA%3D%3D)** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38a79b9970db475c8c5149cc1777443c&_e=0ofn8bPqzTfuqoza0fUism_yTDpfxc8MrBs9niGT--E-L5EOJSlReYqqhvG2n5AUYslbIUqP4KdfVZWR3VaA3RMUYoAr0vPofFVMPJqhMNtdMGpy2J7jU47zHR10XfAcSJs_C5tAnUV6nrgCK9t2fccq9tVTX0fjtjhiPBcuqMceqEQkrWpMrGbWGuRRfZrlpD-r9x4lDxhQEJ59ZhsdILXHCdwEvleuGGTQTbtRSdkofK44FvHwjJ6pJOEpOyiSBRjiiqxX2qM60XXAiTzNOEKE-fNqRk0dV-5GH-ix17tMG1FzHbD3d_KmEtbheMn3dEyvTDergXjG16-mpmckHFJPu6lNGPath2OIb9qwJI_-tIKdTUxdOKN3tFKu2XlleTO9uCqysQ3yN9Ju0s4wTg%3D%3D)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...**life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[**I'm turning to you for help.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38a79b9970db475c8c5149cc1777443c&_e=0ofn8bPqzTfuqoza0fUism_yTDpfxc8MrBs9niGT--E-L5EOJSlReYqqhvG2n5AUYslbIUqP4KdfVZWR3VaA3RMUYoAr0vPofFVMPJqhMNtdMGpy2J7jU47zHR10XfAcSJs_C5tAnUV6nrgCK9t2fccq9tVTX0fjtjhiPBcuqMceqEQkrWpMrGbWGuRRfZrlpD-r9x4lDxhQEJ59ZhsdILXHCdwEvleuGGTQTbtRSdkofK44FvHwjJ6pJOEpOyiSlnBLf9UBnSOl1Jv6SYx68JKbSbGKBAURvLTf49iovM534vC-wFTrjqAC_mA1PZV_wWZbh28pbLttErv_cEnpzZj8VR0m6JQq2fjtVyswqxfdJ-D8tcmfTtK2_KZuOSF6Nk7JY_CCGkl8jGprt74JAA%3D%3D)** James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. **He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.** When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson** , **the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...**[**Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38a79b9970db475c8c5149cc1777443c&_e=0ofn8bPqzTfuqoza0fUism_yTDpfxc8MrBs9niGT--E-L5EOJSlReYqqhvG2n5AUYslbIUqP4KdfVZWR3VaA3RMUYoAr0vPofFVMPJqhMNtdMGpy2J7jU47zHR10XfAcSJs_C5tAnUV6nrgCK9t2fccq9tVTX0fjtjhiPBcuqMceqEQkrWpMrGbWGuRRfZrlpD-r9x4lDxhQEJ59ZhsdILXHCdwEvleuGGTQTbtRSdkofK44FvHwjJ6pJOEpOyiSaC9laxHqvg6jFM__SD-wNWGJitLWqQ3xtlF569ga5h8ibnLTa3Xzk6M4XJVhA-PcLv6GjwJA3i9W88NCFZKSNtVtdm-ub2BsGTw3J48t1hHql7Vb5D_TV32lpWBj-VkUGOqrFAkYRgRiYC2j8j_eWQ%3D%3D)** His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. **[**So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38a79b9970db475c8c5149cc1777443c&_e=0ofn8bPqzTfuqoza0fUism_yTDpfxc8MrBs9niGT--E-L5EOJSlReYqqhvG2n5AUYslbIUqP4KdfVZWR3VaA3RMUYoAr0vPofFVMPJqhMNtdMGpy2J7jU47zHR10XfAcSJs_C5tAnUV6nrgCK9t2fccq9tVTX0fjtjhiPBcuqMceqEQkrWpMrGbWGuRRfZrlpD-r9x4lDxhQEJ59ZhsdILXHCdwEvleuGGTQTbtRSdkofK44FvHwjJ6pJOEpOyiSxDY2IDdrr31eG-SGo2bkWN82e6H3nZK74MUCHVFEeOA3eSG-yxADKTX5yxk_gDFC0iFo98J5POfRaxCBph3xfaj9ErDWCQ290_YxWVIeywDcAhqEHRBghFOuKR1S9hLWtAvDbgB1x5CDOIRtB3-bFg%3D%3D)** LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's **[**your $35 gift**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=38a79b9970db475c8c5149cc1777443c&_e=0ofn8bPqzTfuqoza0fUism_yTDpfxc8MrBs9niGT--E-L5EOJSlReYqqhvG2n5AUYslbIUqP4KdfVZWR3VaA3RMUYoAr0vPofFVMPJqhMNtdMGpy2J7jU47zHR10XfAcSJs_C5tAnUV6nrgCK9t2fccq9tVTX0fjtjhiPBcuqMceqEQkrWpMrGbWGuRRfZrlpD-r9x4lDxhQEJ59ZhsdILXHCdwEvleuGGTQTbtRSdkofK44FvHwjJ6pJOEpOyiSdVwpo-IdQaGyKZx_AVGGCBDLIaTbhBQmOOnmDlyWlfV6_zLP1DXP--6NgqF0QjxpE7VmuYRRHbkfkcr5qP9u4fKbgAKYSzCqpaAj6EzpVzGhuXpT8KKfTzWzdSLEM3PGPIroy6iIlJfM5Yq7Y-7syw%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson , the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. body:
We asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f5f7d842cae0438195a82652805defc4&_e=2WiZtpGJGN3gJzqBOpR8gkTcec_lkG9t7VnvSfnYQpGPwLvwYLXh3uiAj5GFhhYljkbsm8wi1VGyZUcqiMB4vJwXLVpNN-UuJViSSbXnezZsX7BwW9Z1-kvHWSZfIlh3EDTIy68MOeaAZO3ICDzqmwaB3VUFI-enMj-9xxITQNiGQ7UFn6ckiYVYauJFLGwGAIEUBz9FQAZlNFuzzYmuz6jfdR-2Tywe7QprgmEkb01lrjzgOKk7vASsj3bVPoM8ouqWqkwJa1DcugvW3H_amJ3c8k9IkZ2mmtpexnTEmPvLK89sTAO3m8kH7bSjlCJD7RO_7kaD2UevWsVmVIt4rKJv2Lu-gTEUextbNiYJ0N_MzF_vrlol03Pg1gnktj_j), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f5f7d842cae0438195a82652805defc4&_e=2WiZtpGJGN3gJzqBOpR8gkTcec_lkG9t7VnvSfnYQpGPwLvwYLXh3uiAj5GFhhYljkbsm8wi1VGyZUcqiMB4vJwXLVpNN-UuJViSSbXnezZsX7BwW9Z1-kvHWSZfIlh3EDTIy68MOeaAZO3ICDzqmwaB3VUFI-enMj-9xxITQNiGQ7UFn6ckiYVYauJFLGwGAIEUBz9FQAZlNFuzzYmuz8n3Kr1puwpH4hwYHNJ6rAIHxyUSPT6zGV1T6bjG-KRMqGOmY229ngOUNnVbFPBTPZ4kVqKbcnQj1muPXvjLvIKVix9U0iZv-LjICGlceED1l1eV9xJRppoTSALM_-3mK__X8R_pIpAPKy9Ln0M_fZ2Au3eV4gq8xNdUIn3HDGt3) [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f5f7d842cae0438195a82652805defc4&_e=2WiZtpGJGN3gJzqBOpR8gkTcec_lkG9t7VnvSfnYQpGPwLvwYLXh3uiAj5GFhhYljkbsm8wi1VGyZUcqiMB4vJwXLVpNN-UuJViSSbXnezZsX7BwW9Z1-kvHWSZfIlh3EDTIy68MOeaAZO3ICDzqmwaB3VUFI-enMj-9xxITQNiGQ7UFn6ckiYVYauJFLGwGAIEUBz9FQAZlNFuzzYmuz7sO4FO67JXf88R1L6RM8UKpWOJuzqWe88I3Fb8RP8T83QH1QFHOf5QxIQGZSRY3D_XulRhDjN6PFEa_JG-ExS_eqLbIjpj0agw8-KnWAYk-TG93BNxcRlnfsAzyaHQO_Z52MX_DYVo7_VFXVjXL8Ag6RXKh6Hxer-2_IX0xd5g4) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f5f7d842cae0438195a82652805defc4&_e=2WiZtpGJGN3gJzqBOpR8gkTcec_lkG9t7VnvSfnYQpGPwLvwYLXh3uiAj5GFhhYljkbsm8wi1VGyZUcqiMB4vJwXLVpNN-UuJViSSbXnezZsX7BwW9Z1-kvHWSZfIlh3EDTIy68MOeaAZO3ICDzqmwaB3VUFI-enMj-9xxITQNiGQ7UFn6ckiYVYauJFLGwGAIEUBz9FQAZlNFuzzYmuzxrMZQmxdMtM2iXOZgkbVFU8CmIsFeTvbbC9Tz9FECHUeSedfTi8K3E9DQCiMw_XChc6SdidgSQa3PykTr6OlLj8FvQFNxlic1zvXQFG_Qle8SkRAI_76n9tx1_5qJBSI0A-81jWdvoSpxr8eszQmQTlk9s_A6NXYnfEVh2PyCEN) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f5f7d842cae0438195a82652805defc4&_e=2WiZtpGJGN3gJzqBOpR8gkTcec_lkG9t7VnvSfnYQpGPwLvwYLXh3uiAj5GFhhYljkbsm8wi1VGyZUcqiMB4vJwXLVpNN-UuJViSSbXnezZsX7BwW9Z1-kvHWSZfIlh3EDTIy68MOeaAZO3ICDzqmwaB3VUFI-enMj-9xxITQNiGQ7UFn6ckiYVYauJFLGwGAIEUBz9FQAZlNFuzzYmuzw15m2_RMJe8ZpheuEjqq0Hf4qjH9fgORQIiiqRUlK-Clr0PwGGE_0Fz_FmKk7HOq3BbxBWdt83yrhzA4nqMdQIz8cYs36uagE7SHN72lz9XNCkN3D8A8CB4IQi8zeKMEfQD6rznWZo0RFceVBsodpTWft5fDh8w0jhYGRlsscYt)

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=210e3729033a4090947a402ce1f301e8&_e=26A_-jpiAWNHw5up7z8azXdItP9SSmIcS75o8KpdoxScpmwEjvZXVUOKF2ypWPhA0UJ1vkETzIbWRL8QnhZjsW8eH8sVAUnI2HhPHKDQdvpfSJg9NyrSAbyf1RpDHAvXuxAsTuxce7gj87Hc7H7Cyivwy8fjjKkuDhQIITzTy88VHhjQOJu7nU4wxOmahTew6d7jYSxq1Us1zE5_4R7lngTl-NIj0lVMT3z6eBcubDttVtEqA_xNqv-X3e22ZR4w631GRUUkWmRihBglXGXk7ClPXxADH8H6EeRMSQzAamqBlmiMuFcrw4XQLlZyxZlOn5yjHK3BMwQWozkex1ZGOUisnuAanou11soROdzEVHPyGeOMbB8JsCikghwntWR4H3NHCtAKuYZGhgQi75BNTIgKWVJS9M9ZLrzD3HHW5YRIptR4iNHPfNM8RjyZFqAs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=210e3729033a4090947a402ce1f301e8&_e=26A_-jpiAWNHw5up7z8azXdItP9SSmIcS75o8KpdoxScpmwEjvZXVUOKF2ypWPhA0UJ1vkETzIbWRL8QnhZjsW8eH8sVAUnI2HhPHKDQdvpfSJg9NyrSAbyf1RpDHAvXuxAsTuxce7gj87Hc7H7Cyivwy8fjjKkuDhQIITzTy88VHhjQOJu7nU4wxOmahTew6d7jYSxq1Us1zE5_4R7lngTl-NIj0lVMT3z6eBcubDttVtEqA_xNqv-X3e22ZR4w631GRUUkWmRihBglXGXk7ClPXxADH8H6EeRMSQzAamqvCi1MKSR5yLTl1d9Fv_S-SwZmGUX43sH-f5uIool0x7eYvQDcR8hk0sayzo1jf9EPkTQLI8Gt7xO_7Rt8XX8ZUcosMoY0TXiBFMxCukBFTPYSWy3rlQWg9bYGzR75s-GSfNxfhFr_2PxGuMUBNNpI)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=210e3729033a4090947a402ce1f301e8&_e=26A_-jpiAWNHw5up7z8azXdItP9SSmIcS75o8KpdoxScpmwEjvZXVUOKF2ypWPhA0UJ1vkETzIbWRL8QnhZjsW8eH8sVAUnI2HhPHKDQdvpfSJg9NyrSAbyf1RpDHAvXuxAsTuxce7gj87Hc7H7Cyivwy8fjjKkuDhQIITzTy88VHhjQOJu7nU4wxOmahTew6d7jYSxq1Us1zE5_4R7lngTl-NIj0lVMT3z6eBcubDttVtEqA_xNqv-X3e22ZR4w631GRUUkWmRihBglXGXk7ClPXxADH8H6EeRMSQzAampa6Xw-Fn_zov6VFIv14iT8KGB_dRbStWx2ImhG6YPj1hZoUVCCidOiyIVhZ8H4bDRjZVTv5E_5epXVd-LWyrUWlMtfglJZtFtq26R1xz_vAkfL0Zf-O5ubxvV057qzTPkI7vrhXcnaGZWHBCj_Qtk5),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=210e3729033a4090947a402ce1f301e8&_e=26A_-jpiAWNHw5up7z8azXdItP9SSmIcS75o8KpdoxScpmwEjvZXVUOKF2ypWPhA0UJ1vkETzIbWRL8QnhZjsW8eH8sVAUnI2HhPHKDQdvpfSJg9NyrSAbyf1RpDHAvXuxAsTuxce7gj87Hc7H7Cyivwy8fjjKkuDhQIITzTy88VHhjQOJu7nU4wxOmahTew6d7jYSxq1Us1zE5_4R7lngTl-NIj0lVMT3z6eBcubDttVtEqA_xNqv-X3e22ZR4w631GRUUkWmRihBglXGXk7ClPXxADH8H6EeRMSQzAamrIzdV2gqw9raNCdpGzziDq0i4sR5ctIOc5lrCV7P3Vk84CcBRWeoCbzbmh1XUnX42Ne_-qctUAPamJakcvSIOV6qdnY0-KA3dSsVCyboGCcSdDxHRXIR6nBlpQwN02Vm91W3gAsFOJDEDNd9IUPHWU) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. | Peter, headlines like these are far too common: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e1edef5-306d-4b5d-b4c8-712d4ddf7c89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Democrats had a chance to pass a bill that would have cut down on SCOTUS corruption by improving oversight into justices’ conflicts of interest and requiring the Court to create a rigorous code of ethics – but the GOP blocked it. And now, even some of the new Supreme Court justices are even supporting an ethics code:
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdafbf8e3-28cb-40a7-b932-3df79793c484/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| We need stronger oversight for those responsible for upholding the law and keeping our freedoms safe, Peter. Billionaires should never be able to buy our Supreme Court, especially when so many rights depend on their rulings. [If you agree Congress needs to pass a law demanding the Court create and uphold the highest ethical standards, add your name below:](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ab4aea5-3d8b-427f-bf79-6d3fee08f6ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Peter, headlines like these are far too common: Democrats had a chance to pass a bill that would have cut down on SCOTUS corruption by improving oversight into justices’ conflicts of interest and requiring the Court to create a rigorous code of ethics – but the GOP blocked it. And now, even some of the new Supreme Court justices are even supporting an ethics code: | | | We need stronger oversight for those responsible for upholding the law and keeping our freedoms safe, Peter. Billionaires should never be able to buy our Supreme Court, especially when so many rights depend on their rulings. | | | \- Blue Amp Action Team | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=238056ef6a4644aab0e79e30374fe7e9&_e=SOnqZ1k9pyMBxpK0szmjPQSCqGrX5840EEldMcwGa6gyRZHl-fcGV6rbafEnggd4v2Zlkld_ea85B2OuCFLS7xwlrebaDoXgwWKWxPPRpgxb9FB8Khz5fBlaH7kS4XzV-VSa1CilYw200LarGhPjuTGdgzKoGchFz7-zyQemMNEQvgmzKj4H3QccD147gsrDxhngIBZuVFPzU0KA1KVNV_bOiVvV_Ye9Hkq14EDhi3Ds_jlKX9XMO1PwIAVYuWRYEGhINm_aQ-cALqZvaYU5JimfY70MMSEIV_7tccY2on2yrMw1HLmeFndAlE5XNcQ9sR_m4n3eYAwyE03cqGCD-Ubfxn3lfIGAHHi-ls-_yO67Tr1faTl_sCQrjCNSx5B3dYU-CzinbkafH5ez9K1V0yWPBxpxwgiRe-MCI__PmWLA_AhH3blSTcI3DBJl0dJB) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=238056ef6a4644aab0e79e30374fe7e9&_e=SOnqZ1k9pyMBxpK0szmjPQSCqGrX5840EEldMcwGa6gyRZHl-fcGV6rbafEnggd4v2Zlkld_ea85B2OuCFLS7xwlrebaDoXgwWKWxPPRpgxb9FB8Khz5fBlaH7kS4XzV-VSa1CilYw200LarGhPjuTGdgzKoGchFz7-zyQemMNEQvgmzKj4H3QccD147gsrDxhngIBZuVFPzU0KA1KVNV_bOiVvV_Ye9Hkq14EDhi3Ds_jlKX9XMO1PwIAVYuWRYEGhINm_aQ-cALqZvaYU5JimfY70MMSEIV_7tccY2on3N7wvs419PM_leMtlx2ROkGTD-Q1WKUgmAiUYlPwLtgAejY7wdXKaEUGnJhaAAr2KgWsIOn8_yEWUjq7adloLGkri8PWGTxIZ6Ykq_DrMpa79MAuYBsYM7QwFJB7yFGPy2cJex7jo_CNAJ6zPGbW2S)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=238056ef6a4644aab0e79e30374fe7e9&_e=SOnqZ1k9pyMBxpK0szmjPQSCqGrX5840EEldMcwGa6gyRZHl-fcGV6rbafEnggd4v2Zlkld_ea85B2OuCFLS7xwlrebaDoXgwWKWxPPRpgxb9FB8Khz5fBlaH7kS4XzV-VSa1CilYw200LarGhPjuTGdgzKoGchFz7-zyQemMNEQvgmzKj4H3QccD147gsrDxhngIBZuVFPzU0KA1KVNV_bOiVvV_Ye9Hkq14EDhi3Ds_jlKX9XMO1PwIAVYuWRYEGhINm_aQ-cALqZvaYU5JimfY70MMSEIV_7tccY2on1bCXcyzWnhh0MCltvSzHto8USYAcn2QfOTUK3iCZfwMUr12EpyYPzofnrPduFAlRVigMlW2EeQdeurMvyCTwXKuEwy5CjyU-b8W2NydLctxY7XhDhQ1xdvmprms_Qd8bxIVvANiA87ypRoE4sqT-nM)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=238056ef6a4644aab0e79e30374fe7e9&_e=SOnqZ1k9pyMBxpK0szmjPQSCqGrX5840EEldMcwGa6gyRZHl-fcGV6rbafEnggd4v2Zlkld_ea85B2OuCFLS7xwlrebaDoXgwWKWxPPRpgxb9FB8Khz5fBlaH7kS4XzV-VSa1CilYw200LarGhPjuTGdgzKoGchFz7-zyQemMNEQvgmzKj4H3QccD147gsrDxhngIBZuVFPzU0KA1KVNV_bOiVvV_Ye9Hkq14EDhi3Ds_jlKX9XMO1PwIAVYuWRYEGhINm_aQ-cALqZvaYU5JimfY70MMSEIV_7tccY2on02sAeiNoV4H_4YnvEtvqMQ2WrmhWOyz_maCnPWiy7yKUVxx1dlqDBvck3fX89dhGsCPmqtRmSKFNr4pwmUD1IjNSnvoXFfq-4CJE3jrOBzIqsnWxcYJW83ojU5LJIQ3vIDtwWnBCiVwDrqmK9KS3sA) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=238056ef6a4644aab0e79e30374fe7e9&_e=SOnqZ1k9pyMBxpK0szmjPQSCqGrX5840EEldMcwGa6gyRZHl-fcGV6rbafEnggd4v2Zlkld_ea85B2OuCFLS7xwlrebaDoXgwWKWxPPRpgxb9FB8Khz5fBlaH7kS4XzV-VSa1CilYw200LarGhPjuTGdgzKoGchFz7-zyQemMNEQvgmzKj4H3QccD147gsrDxhngIBZuVFPzU0KA1KVNV_bOiVvV_Ye9Hkq14EDhi3Ds_jlKX9XMO1PwIAVYuWRYEGhINm_aQ-cALqZvaYU5JimfY70MMSEIV_7tccY2on0A8jWpCfNMZ_IPgXNsKgApeVE-DInIpv_Uz1ygfnnmIgPPEiNip2dau_K3hS0cWXMVbE-ieW5IJf-UZv4LQAcx_5CtflYRMsOK0clt4i1pWGnJSq8mTNthmbCkJYv0Wwgm84LQjSvjkrojv0Xv5OqC)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=238056ef6a4644aab0e79e30374fe7e9&_e=SOnqZ1k9pyMBxpK0szmjPQSCqGrX5840EEldMcwGa6gyRZHl-fcGV6rbafEnggd4v2Zlkld_ea85B2OuCFLS7xwlrebaDoXgwWKWxPPRpgxb9FB8Khz5fBlaH7kS4XzV-VSa1CilYw200LarGhPjuTGdgzKoGchFz7-zyQemMNEQvgmzKj4H3QccD147gsrDxhngIBZuVFPzU0KA1KVNV_bOiVvV_Ye9Hkq14EDhi3Ds_jlKX9XMO1PwIAVYuWRYEGhINm_aQ-cALqZvaYU5JimfY70MMSEIV_7tccY2on3JSC4C7JbYltsOV0C4ZrAYHoKwpMAPh431mCLe4PO0stdzLnIyO-Ss5wsKreXO4mANdy7ez6JQgj8qBegLS4nvBjhcjOlj4ntv14XN-sCq-LXfW5yy2qc-hwPTWEPiNPf3kd-gdkWymlOGZjqTXlNu) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

body:

Friend,

The American people voted overwhelmingly to REJECT the Democrats' witch hunts and sham prosecutions when they elected Donald J. Trump as the next President of the United States - _AND_ ushered in Republican majorities in both the House and Senate.

But radical New York Attorney General Tish James doesn't care...

**[She just announced that she will __STILL__ attempt to collect the tyrannical fine of nearly HALF A BILLION DOLLARS that was wrongfully imposed on President Trump! ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x9w5d-5V3xSX1UhcBfHOzQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**
_**[New York AG will continue to pursue $454 million civil fraud judgment against Trump](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x9w5d-5V3xSX1UhcBfHOzQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**_**[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9AbeopzIktZJ7zh4upgdfw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSoeIP0RTaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL21hdGNoLWNvbW1pdG1lbnQtcnMtaGYvP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJmFtdHBvc2l0aW9uPTRXA3NwY0IKZ2Xk7mdnuhEfX1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

This is the same radical AG who threatened to SEIZE President Trump's bank accounts and his iconic home of Trump Tower if he didn't pay this absolute shakedown!
__What will she try to do next, seize the White House?__
Far-Left extremists like Tish James who have abused the legal system to target their political opponents should not be allowed to practice law in America _ever_ again.

That is why the Senate GOP is circulating a petition calling for her to be **[IMMEDIATELY DISBARRED](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x9w5d-5V3xSX1UhcBfHOzQ~~/AARclAA~~~)** over her disgraceful conduct.

clean_body: We asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bacda629a5e4602bb90a70a8300bb4d&_e=r4NtT2JMq2NYTLcV93D-9tc97G-QVfITFsKeNRu38eXBQDL5eGEuauLZs3bkMUqWXWfTtcMmTUqa_WTffL8AJ6DPHeEhOy2A0_ML6AcGVNZ-OFI-EmEnd0NKPscVuVZkRrnjR0MHH7a5B53nOhFszZ8scZ-4JZ0szqUuSsJkFDCkPSODKJ3dLw086t0P3Ku6PfBQm68QIsKVWbRZ_x2aRIfNACiCBnytueOTKRqyLI3Vm3zEPerRc0ZRCFhZYGCqPr_Ry9B9VyHytyFBh22Gy1nklQV5shOVZLu_9iRqzrAN_Y3MFIUw1oyj4lr7ee7RGiv5JJNh9rgee7XzwsNkpwJK7DnNVDP98NoDZYydSLlfhJvfyZZ1thpfsHKP-xz273_JYc1ZGsY_KdjqVawdSWafqrFBcrpmlx1bcwKICbDlpuVRtAyx9LXbW4PuW9Yi) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bacda629a5e4602bb90a70a8300bb4d&_e=r4NtT2JMq2NYTLcV93D-9tc97G-QVfITFsKeNRu38eXBQDL5eGEuauLZs3bkMUqWXWfTtcMmTUqa_WTffL8AJ6DPHeEhOy2A0_ML6AcGVNZ-OFI-EmEnd0NKPscVuVZkRrnjR0MHH7a5B53nOhFszZ8scZ-4JZ0szqUuSsJkFDCkPSODKJ3dLw086t0P3Ku6PfBQm68QIsKVWbRZ_x2aRIfNACiCBnytueOTKRqyLI3Vm3zEPerRc0ZRCFhZYGCqPr_Ry9B9VyHytyFBh22Gy1nklQV5shOVZLu_9iRqzrBccyXTWyfCT0w3T1QrDENsHxwJS3_xD2yLPLEQKXHk9i3FKi8tSd3FbEvn9M27Fg_1BQsVLl-v11IoJK5btuFoYAy8SBtrQw7B4QkCQKbqw3XJ-j6ttmUMplPPo0w7VcZkN0AFqbQbzmCxmkYmcyK1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bacda629a5e4602bb90a70a8300bb4d&_e=r4NtT2JMq2NYTLcV93D-9tc97G-QVfITFsKeNRu38eXBQDL5eGEuauLZs3bkMUqWXWfTtcMmTUqa_WTffL8AJ6DPHeEhOy2A0_ML6AcGVNZ-OFI-EmEnd0NKPscVuVZkRrnjR0MHH7a5B53nOhFszZ8scZ-4JZ0szqUuSsJkFDCkPSODKJ3dLw086t0P3Ku6PfBQm68QIsKVWbRZ_x2aRIfNACiCBnytueOTKRqyLI3Vm3zEPerRc0ZRCFhZYGCqPr_Ry9B9VyHytyFBh22Gy1nklQV5shOVZLu_9iRqzrAjABwPTf5Keb_RO6F0XZpoUuMy6T2h3KtwWB0DHuoEAMnt8ec5sCxqY7pZxXGwvswqelQJvwJ-6aLtdH3dPyX9ZD2TFy04b3fdCoMNiNUyiLIJRp9gh5pXxK8hwHNdCCPzG2pAthhLfiXh9wQhdaKc),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bacda629a5e4602bb90a70a8300bb4d&_e=r4NtT2JMq2NYTLcV93D-9tc97G-QVfITFsKeNRu38eXBQDL5eGEuauLZs3bkMUqWXWfTtcMmTUqa_WTffL8AJ6DPHeEhOy2A0_ML6AcGVNZ-OFI-EmEnd0NKPscVuVZkRrnjR0MHH7a5B53nOhFszZ8scZ-4JZ0szqUuSsJkFDCkPSODKJ3dLw086t0P3Ku6PfBQm68QIsKVWbRZ_x2aRIfNACiCBnytueOTKRqyLI3Vm3zEPerRc0ZRCFhZYGCqPr_Ry9B9VyHytyFBh22Gy1nklQV5shOVZLu_9iRqzrD2oilcgcc2sOPYaaAss9Knitn_2hIzWD_VABumbMbRw5SA1S9bk5viL1XQ1aZ5ljcXUh5RYTBXGXF82QYgYNMxhFF9uU58bj1xi0mrB1u3KkXXR-VcS35J8NYIQUJfNRyJyDE-CJ6J4t9xgcPPbSL7) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bacda629a5e4602bb90a70a8300bb4d&_e=r4NtT2JMq2NYTLcV93D-9tc97G-QVfITFsKeNRu38eXBQDL5eGEuauLZs3bkMUqWXWfTtcMmTUqa_WTffL8AJ6DPHeEhOy2A0_ML6AcGVNZ-OFI-EmEnd0NKPscVuVZkRrnjR0MHH7a5B53nOhFszZ8scZ-4JZ0szqUuSsJkFDCkPSODKJ3dLw086t0P3Ku6PfBQm68QIsKVWbRZ_x2aRIfNACiCBnytueOTKRqyLI3Vm3zEPerRc0ZRCFhZYGCqPr_Ry9B9VyHytyFBh22Gy1nklQV5shOVZLu_9iRqzrB3DTlOu9UlyoVX6OSIJ58Cm6dNd6MBeGsRlmPET4MndSMmcbE1HhP8h4CG0Sjd1qbYTWwAwIm2-CNH8XUuqyXP4Wu3VmkVBMzFfcPzhhOJdA4KmYX8-Lcm9aQxhWUf_wGDH0BtyesDS-zQFTNHyySQ)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bacda629a5e4602bb90a70a8300bb4d&_e=r4NtT2JMq2NYTLcV93D-9tc97G-QVfITFsKeNRu38eXBQDL5eGEuauLZs3bkMUqWXWfTtcMmTUqa_WTffL8AJ6DPHeEhOy2A0_ML6AcGVNZ-OFI-EmEnd0NKPscVuVZkRrnjR0MHH7a5B53nOhFszZ8scZ-4JZ0szqUuSsJkFDCkPSODKJ3dLw086t0P3Ku6PfBQm68QIsKVWbRZ_x2aRIfNACiCBnytueOTKRqyLI3Vm3zEPerRc0ZRCFhZYGCqPr_Ry9B9VyHytyFBh22Gy1nklQV5shOVZLu_9iRqzrB_M4k2JqWUJ351sTNidw9WJAPgfkj-vIrO7AEOJqvGmG3Eq1DDNbi7BcX3ilcUw4Jd8LDYsDhSX_N4-7TiFtGaBIm4S_AWNHYkl4qBloVCNRGlKdl2-ReNDWcZdrEwx4DVKb55COUOPUffMuPDBEq1) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

# SUNDAY, DECEMBER 22, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1882, Edward H. Johnson, an electrical engineer who worked with Thomas Edison, put up the first electric Christmas tree lights in his home in red, white, and blue. ([See Photo](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFPwzAUhH9NvCXye3YbZ_CAgA6IIgYkxsiNnfohJ67sp1b99ygwMDHccHfS6fR9Hsejo0Tr-c0twfKcR5SoW8AWcfSO0n3Uwts5BAxKBAu90mbfo9mJaD3M8iSlORkEUDjo_aAcnCYECahkL8hua4CIADjArguDGrzXCvXsDfip0TJ44ly6r0wrxzCne76G0k15EclG5ktt1EODhwYPnL2701on2uoGDy-bclxrXsdnf3PF_wW_vn2MhSovrn6UEF7pHLm2T4FLJn7PlcEY7CIvolh_uVFKVPd9o-V5cZR-TvB_UK4WvwMAAP__FRlkew)) Holiday inflatables have become a mainstay of seasonal decorating, but the jury is out on where they fit: are they beloved additions, or do they rank up there with the bedeviled fruitcake? Check out the Holiday section for more. ## Biden Signs Funding Bill Through March
President Joe Biden signed a bill into law Saturday that averts a government shutdown and [funds the government](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuxCAURL8GOiy44AcFRRp3mzal5YVrm4THyrCL9u8jp0830mjmSOfrttxWH3zaP9eIpm55AQ6KCWAAi1t9eC-KOrMhAkqKRoxSTcMIU08Po3kPXI9TPyipubCOj4jDXUvbDysiUG-uNwEAQoAWfYdaaueUBLW5SThLFEfnaz677-xTPXAL7_zCs7M50mCOWh-FyA8CM4G5tdbZe0nYytUTmK9IYN6vSYqYKivHs7rcErM57SeWwur5jA-GIScWn-WHwExP4x7Nh-DLMBLF97j68Ees_xl4GfgNAAD__2YlXt8) at current levels through March 14. The bill provides $100 billion in [disaster aid](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOnDAQBOCngc4nvLbBFC7SXHdpUyLjXcNGi0Fg3enePiL9X45G-jSaP6_pFVm4LL_jRqHmfYIOrNKgACaMLN_JthgyEZBpKejBWN8P4F27Bp2pT9kkwD712uNIM_UDOkrW69yZlsOtaQDQGkbtHjSaEdEasBm9xtTYjpDrfj7-7lzqSlm--5vOR9q3VsJa63E15lcDzwae8Sj0ue7qDmflJNTAE_mKV6VTnSRMWS03UDYqVV0HFeSyqJlF1EpChdTGUveiEGabCb2Lcc7kEuqUrCOncXSQom_PgMeHRfjqh8Z2yxZZ_u-qP_30DvAvAAD__5rfbBc) and $10 billion in agricultural assistance to farmers. Early Saturday morning, the Senate overwhelmingly [approved the bill](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuxCAURL8GOiy44AcFRRp3mzal5YVrm4THyrCL9u8jp0830mjmSOfrttxWH3zaP9eIpm55AQ6KCWAAi1t9eC-KOrMhAkqKRoxSTcMIU08Po3kPXI9TPyipubCOj4jDXUvbDysiUG-uNwEAQoAWfYdaaueUBLW5SThLFEfnaz677-xTPXAL7_zCs7M50mCOWh-FyA8CM4G5tdbZe0nYytUTmK9IYN6vSYqYKivHs7rcErM57SeWwur5jA-GIScWn-WHwExP4x7Nh-DLMBLF97j68Ees_xl4GfgNAAD__2YlXt8) by a margin of 85-11, with most Democrats and Republicans supporting the measure. The House approved the bill overwhelmingly, 366-34. The Senate also [approved the Social Security Fairness Act](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vhiAURn8NbBi54NfA0MXt7drRIFxeb4NihGr8943duz3Jk5yTnK_X9LIUaXt_2hVNCWmCGrSQIAAmbynek-beBERAxdHITum-7aBv-GJAa6V141SYZ5h966wMVoYgQSHKZuZkHpoEAClhkE2Fgxq81wp08L30jukaPZV0VN-JtrJgiHc68ahcWnk0Syl7ZuqDwchgvK6rcnPe8MrPz2B8JoMxJ0c2iozu56Byi2Dp2DBnYV0RGTdbUJypoNhtzugZjPwwfr8oRsptx3T9Xi3FP2n5L8Jp4DcAAP__SbZggw) on Saturday, eliminating two federal policies that prevented nearly 3 million Americans, including police officers, firefighters, postal workers, teachers, and others with a public pension, from collecting their full Social Security benefits.
## College Football Playoff Kicks Off
Home teams dominated the first round of the College Football Playoff this weekend. Yesterday, [No. 6 Penn State](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAYBp8GtljwgYM9MHRB6pCuHS0CPw4VNpaNYuXtq3TvfNKd7vs23XwueZ2__EK2pTpBQF8kLsAUfS6vSfNoExFIcbLSKD1cDYaeP-woPMle96SEFGFU9wSjQiLhtTd6AM_2bZMApMQo-45GNcaoFXSKg4yBaUExt7p3PzWv7UGpvOqT9i7UhRf7aG07mPpgcAzuPM-Ojm19QwYXaik00yXV2u6-FAa3U_Abg5sY3OwX-owMTgt5NUaage82bmcuJR9Xw7SYF5_LX6n9d_60-A0AAP__rV5Yng) rode a pair of first-half defensive touchdowns, including one by former walk-on Dominic DeLuca, to a 38-10 win against No. 11 SMU.

Later, Jaydon Blue and Quintrevion Wisner combined for 256 rushing yards and four touchdowns to lead [No. 5 Texas](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7Fu7CAQAL8GurPYBYwpKF6D9IpLm9LizGITYWPZ6Jz7--jSpx5pRvN5H-8hl7zNH2El11IdUaC6Ad4QxxhyeY2KR5eIkCQnB0aqoTc4aL44Kw2hskkYPQDooHXAXooYFdhBGsuze9sAEQHQgu7IShujkqhSHCBOTAmKudWj-6p5awul8qpPOrqprry4pbX9ZPIfQ8_QX9fV0blvb8jQT7UUmumWam2PUApD_6jf51QPYuhHhn4OK_2PDL0S0BsDpueHi_uVS8lnb5gS8xpy-Y21v-afDn8CAAD__y3HWSM) over No. 12 Clemson, 38-24. To cap off the night, No. 8 Ohio State blew past No. 9 Tennessee, 42-17. [No. 7 Notre Dame](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jz1vwyAUAH8NbLF4j694YOiC1CFdO1oEHg4VNpaNYuXfV-ne-aQ73fdtuoVSyzp_hYVcz21CgeoCeEGcUij1NSmeXCZCkpwcWKmuxuJV84eLIasIQusxZdRgBEhto7T3qK0xwfLi3jZARAAcQQ80yjElJVHldIUUmRKUSm_78NPK2h-U66s9aR9iW3h1j963g8kPhp6hP89zoGNb35Chj61WmumSW-v3UCtDv1MMG0M_MfRzWOgzMfRKgLEW7Mh3l7az1FoOY5kS8xJK_Sv1_86fDn8DAAD__5VxWHs) defeated No. 10 Indiana, 27-17 on Friday, kickstarted by Jeremiyah Love’s 98-yard touchdown run on the third play of the game. The top four seeds received a first-round bye. Quarterfinal games will be played on Dec. 31 (Fiesta Bowl) and Jan. 1 (Peach Bowl, Rose Bowl, and Sugar Bowl). You can check out the [full bracket here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhSAUgOGngU0DB7jKwNDF7XbtaBAOSnsUo-Qa37653Tv_yZf8X8_x6TPlbf70K7qayggCdCOhARijz3SPmkeXEAEVRyc7pftHB73hizMQrZWd0Ml3wmsp-iDF9JgMWDUZk3h2b00CgJRgpWnRKhujVqBT7GUMTAuMuZaj_S55qwsmussLjzaUlZNbat1Ppj4YDAyG67paPPftHRkMoRDhjE0qpU6eiMGwk79LSs10-PCDlR8u7lcmyuejY1rMq8_0R9f_Vl8OfgMAAP__0aNV3A).
## Holiday Lottery Jackpot Nears $1 Billion
The Mega Millions jackpot is expected to reach [almost $1 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFutDAQBOCnMZ0RuywHFC7-PwlFpLs2JXLwGpwYjGzryL19RFKn_zQzmrfreNXOu22-6ZVVtmHECkkCSsTRaOcfIxVGWWbkumAFbU3dpcWuKRZlkamnZoJ3qMA01jJ0HVfUErV2aprCqTMNEBEAe2hK7uveGKqRrOnATIIqNi6HWH4Et-WFrX-EO8dyCmvh1ZLznkT9T-AgcDiOo1x51qvz3oUtnUjgcOMjCRzOJoHDq54-95DljXVMUiCB_P_rpQ1RPi3RpbzqJF_uLJ-jPtw2lzrtX0VUZj9Omi6toGpetfM_O_Jfv9wVfgcAAP__WWFklA) just in time to create some Christmas magic. The estimated jackpot $944 million (a $429.4 million cash payout) is on tap for the next drawing on Tuesday, December 24. Only once has a Mega Millions jackpot been won on Christmas Eve. That happened in 2002 when a $68 million prize was won in New York—and went unclaimed. The [three jackpot awards](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFu8yAUBeCnwRsWXIixB4Z_8ZZ_7WgRuDg3xSYCEjdvX6WdO59PR0fn47ycHSXa1_9uQ9tiXkCA5hI4wBIcpdeiu2AjIqDq0Eqj9DgYGE_d1applEaFeDFeKSlUFAak14MSDnHSQ0f23SYBQEqY5KnHSU0haAU6hlEGz7TAQC2X_pZpb1eM6ZWfWHqfty7Za2v3ytQ_BjOD-TiOPuavy6PSjrW-DYM5UcTaXgkZzBuujm-UEuW98pvzn_fcuE-5YuWSX34THml9FOQuNiw8uYa18VDcQfvaFRvux9vVwTAt1s1R-lnT_nrnaeE7AAD__8QOaZI) so far in 2024 have been worth $1.128 billion (March), $552 million (June), and $810 million (September). The chances of landing the nine-figure jackpot are 1 in about 302.6 million.

clean_body: Home teams dominated the first round of the College Football Playoff this weekend. | | | | | | SUNDAY, DECEMBER 22, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1882, Edward H. Johnson, an electrical engineer who worked with Thomas Edison, put up the first electric Christmas tree lights in his home in red, white, and blue. () Holiday inflatables have become a mainstay of seasonal decorating, but the jury is out on where they fit: are they beloved additions, or do they rank up there with the bedeviled fruitcake? Check out the Holiday section for more. Check out this opportunity to invest with today's sponsor, . | Biden Signs Funding Bill Through March President Joe Biden signed a bill into law Saturday that averts a government shutdown and at current levels through March 14. The bill provides $100 billion in and $10 billion in agricultural assistance to farmers. Early Saturday morning, the Senate overwhelmingly by a margin of 85-11, with most Democrats and Republicans supporting the measure. The House approved the bill overwhelmingly, 366-34. The Senate also on Saturday, eliminating two federal policies that prevented nearly 3 million Americans, including police officers, firefighters, postal workers, teachers, and others with a public pension, from collecting their full Social Security benefits. College Football Playoff Kicks Off Home teams dominated the first round of the College Football Playoff this weekend. Yesterday, rode a pair of first-half defensive touchdowns, including one by former walk-on Dominic DeLuca, to a 38-10 win against No. 11 SMU. Later, Jaydon Blue and Quintrevion Wisner combined for 256 rushing yards and four touchdowns to lead over No. 12 Clemson, 38-24. To cap off the night, No. 8 Ohio State blew past No. 9 Tennessee, 42-17. defeated No. 10 Indiana, 27-17 on Friday, kickstarted by Jeremiyah Love’s 98-yard touchdown run on the third play of the game. The top four seeds received a first-round bye. Quarterfinal games will be played on Dec. 31 (Fiesta Bowl) and Jan. 1 (Peach Bowl, Rose Bowl, and Sugar Bowl). You can check out the . Holiday Lottery Jackpot Nears $1 Billion The Mega Millions jackpot is expected to reach just in time to create some Christmas magic. The estimated jackpot $944 million (a $429.4 million cash payout) is on tap for the next drawing on Tuesday, December 24. Only once has a Mega Millions jackpot been won on Christmas Eve. That happened in 2002 when a $68 million prize was won in New York—and went unclaimed. The so far in 2024 have been worth $1.128 billion (March), $552 million (June), and $810 million (September). The chances of landing the nine-figure jackpot are 1 in about 302.6 million. name: Post-Election Report (Important)
subject: We truly wish we had better news to share, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Since the election, it’s been all downhill

We truly wish we had better news to share right now.

_**[Here's the deal, friend:](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b99cb8e5fc84ba38131b3c3ae656ed3&_e=0GeQdOMtGxkeupBM5m9HuPL19K_9s1FNMncECpU-_lHfjXhm2duk5S0zXHpjV8RndfmIHTUZiNYyTIjVR4P2wy-NjMhNQJyrIPA_yEe_ot9GcNKGHzBLmzSJu6X_fJM8bhTgQ-d2n7NV_zvF9n1yUjWdoaE7jMAj5P5JnqsbO683PErVXV6a4FGt1pJAnoQm5_5iw6b7Yoq34P3Fj2oQdzuzndtm12B1ue2BC3xoINwd_8tt0yGA5Q-9OlBEekWSorABsGOlQjWt1KDTKsXhYiUXQ46_zmSVYeCCrEB8DRttNgqUfO2RZaInwWZF7tNl8GnKtmkD2RKA01ivEKHWt00ya8ZNLn-gvq4uYJ9shSDKMuo4x_-ryUN8le5zJL5892gfKcGy4IpV52tUxklrzIicW_bhsMRnDY5zF7Q2qdgRy5nV1joJLZrUKtXJ-b79EU9fvB2GNH1NotRT_pTNdQ2Tjnwfr8Rc9yJBWaLzVPOFcrnp2ZlYVsbywk-txi1m) **Senate Democrats OUTRAISED Senate Republicans during the 2024 post-election period.

**[Why it matters:](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b99cb8e5fc84ba38131b3c3ae656ed3&_e=0GeQdOMtGxkeupBM5m9HuPL19K_9s1FNMncECpU-_lHfjXhm2duk5S0zXHpjV8RndfmIHTUZiNYyTIjVR4P2wy-NjMhNQJyrIPA_yEe_ot9GcNKGHzBLmzSJu6X_fJM8bhTgQ-d2n7NV_zvF9n1yUjWdoaE7jMAj5P5JnqsbO683PErVXV6a4FGt1pJAnoQm5_5iw6b7Yoq34P3Fj2oQdzuzndtm12B1ue2BC3xoINwd_8tt0yGA5Q-9OlBEekWSorABsGOlQjWt1KDTKsXhYiUXQ46_zmSVYeCCrEB8DRttNgqUfO2RZaInwWZF7tNl8GnKtmkD2RKA01ivEKHWt-3E1xKK09I6KjyyFaDixq8VVj46_x4O-C1Sdd72pfUcLV6WvymcWceH4L0E4DZk9CkTlTxZwYXesvajbBtkShth8mcFbc3dtArpZAiQ4TAGo6URhbVGD0Zj03DOpv36EPRoteQ-xrffbeC5UlJXbeEbjT6c4-xUffshfjpNk6TS) **The Left now has a MASSIVE HEAD START in crucial midterm battleground states such as Georgia, Michigan, and New Hampshire._

If we lose the Senate Majority in two years' time, **[we will have FAILED President Trump, and the MAGA legacy will be RUINED.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b99cb8e5fc84ba38131b3c3ae656ed3&_e=0GeQdOMtGxkeupBM5m9HuPL19K_9s1FNMncECpU-_lHfjXhm2duk5S0zXHpjV8RndfmIHTUZiNYyTIjVR4P2wy-NjMhNQJyrIPA_yEe_ot9GcNKGHzBLmzSJu6X_fJM8bhTgQ-d2n7NV_zvF9n1yUjWdoaE7jMAj5P5JnqsbO683PErVXV6a4FGt1pJAnoQm5_5iw6b7Yoq34P3Fj2oQdzuzndtm12B1ue2BC3xoINwd_8tt0yGA5Q-9OlBEekWSorABsGOlQjWt1KDTKsXhYiUXQ46_zmSVYeCCrEB8DRttNgqUfO2RZaInwWZF7tNl8GnKtmkD2RKA01ivEKHWt7mJxX4ncrnJgCorTo_I6cOr36ZfUbeHBuSwU7COb1vosU0fRMcVh1Uk2IDhgLx2sWcN5h00I3W5P0-XxFIQHDWAeIQC_G8HCQvA0ctr6ItnwBtAmpjyhfJ0iY52iKygjJYxr3beV-9F-OI0PjYmdudWQM0Wd121ToKd6G4Szb8I)**** ** But there's still time for us to turn things around before the final FEC-mandated fundraising deadline of the year...

subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...

This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5kBige3qadRjv3Kov5J4aA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSpJaP0SfaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIwODYmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJmFmZl9zdWI9Uk0tUk9OLTIwMjQxMjIyJmMyPXBvcDEyMDEyNGEmYWZmX3N1YjM9M01PMTk2VCZhZmZfc3ViND17dHJhbnNhY3Rpb25faWR9VwNzcGNCCmdlXvlnZ7ZgJilSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b4c911b91414e59bfc138fce502f8a2&_e=gX10bChQGSIv3rTbhOKW0mefPZ-lzYhH2QvgptU4YFp1M7F6wELyjmqku2IAwjtN3DNYRQIciPixKCcdi_5WiwYtQzTgdOw5o15hOBu4v_VZKv1eSobIt6kztfyvvh23t-DT7g1o-ILXwwh-D_aeu5op2XmEpy7_vRlpNA6Xzdkm2lxIdahLeYgil-F7naRFxAfBdEJG6kxM00XtTJHWf-jb5YrEvvxtZmGd69ffGQixq0c054vyFLnwg0V6wUyvxu6lNkuWoWX3lytNWtn5dqRBzHWWBopvzFnREmPY1OfPnoz3a4_wQ-RqanPIRRVJKj-IM9DBrlyvykchX4A1IlGVlMQeNxxUtV_NLBqiQY3juXAiQ8rw9TehZ9i1DM458APdYGtNrVgGKFP3TaeV-Fl_rxZAwmVn1qg1liYo2Qo7ZRfu2c3oF-5pc9GGPg-X) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b4c911b91414e59bfc138fce502f8a2&_e=gX10bChQGSIv3rTbhOKW0mefPZ-lzYhH2QvgptU4YFp1M7F6wELyjmqku2IAwjtN3DNYRQIciPixKCcdi_5WiwYtQzTgdOw5o15hOBu4v_VZKv1eSobIt6kztfyvvh23t-DT7g1o-ILXwwh-D_aeu5op2XmEpy7_vRlpNA6Xzdkm2lxIdahLeYgil-F7naRFxAfBdEJG6kxM00XtTJHWf-jb5YrEvvxtZmGd69ffGQixq0c054vyFLnwg0V6wUyvxu6lNkuWoWX3lytNWtn5dqRBzHWWBopvzFnREmPY1Occnnk8m_gfXqIU8gRlA8BY4p0IEdpx0QZvYlON7JGbHMhl4pmuJu00Xb0igUhTlGbKHpdp8QOCU6XZ0ionxOnewWn4BhNbVCiWvH7nsJD3f3V-IUjoTOi9HXxdzM3_TeISJ6FBKhYvdGpRb5WxmK2I)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b4c911b91414e59bfc138fce502f8a2&_e=gX10bChQGSIv3rTbhOKW0mefPZ-lzYhH2QvgptU4YFp1M7F6wELyjmqku2IAwjtN3DNYRQIciPixKCcdi_5WiwYtQzTgdOw5o15hOBu4v_VZKv1eSobIt6kztfyvvh23t-DT7g1o-ILXwwh-D_aeu5op2XmEpy7_vRlpNA6Xzdkm2lxIdahLeYgil-F7naRFxAfBdEJG6kxM00XtTJHWf-jb5YrEvvxtZmGd69ffGQixq0c054vyFLnwg0V6wUyvxu6lNkuWoWX3lytNWtn5dqRBzHWWBopvzFnREmPY1Od8yGKM7My0I1ZYh_dJ3vgaNE71idmbF80MqHUpOHsdICmBJy01xl4LnC2R1htPIGdNakybBt9LdHSg39Lz6G-SW4BHTQEVB9mvmH_97n5ezR4lC4aR5vZ_IZnMA20iJiLsGe5x8xl-fOioHF1NfXUs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b4c911b91414e59bfc138fce502f8a2&_e=gX10bChQGSIv3rTbhOKW0mefPZ-lzYhH2QvgptU4YFp1M7F6wELyjmqku2IAwjtN3DNYRQIciPixKCcdi_5WiwYtQzTgdOw5o15hOBu4v_VZKv1eSobIt6kztfyvvh23t-DT7g1o-ILXwwh-D_aeu5op2XmEpy7_vRlpNA6Xzdkm2lxIdahLeYgil-F7naRFxAfBdEJG6kxM00XtTJHWf-jb5YrEvvxtZmGd69ffGQixq0c054vyFLnwg0V6wUyvxu6lNkuWoWX3lytNWtn5dqRBzHWWBopvzFnREmPY1OeFv2KlItq0020D2OAJ5pUaWAz9nu_lox5gJmDSM7txyE_6Hvp487iXEHJZA_YsmUU0rzJnSWzYpyoWgWqi3_w-5Z0nFiimRPclP3br2C5bsAJFGjrzLlrD8Y7vkamX0gPC_xN-LVXb9TGSggk-Jl2f) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b4c911b91414e59bfc138fce502f8a2&_e=gX10bChQGSIv3rTbhOKW0mefPZ-lzYhH2QvgptU4YFp1M7F6wELyjmqku2IAwjtN3DNYRQIciPixKCcdi_5WiwYtQzTgdOw5o15hOBu4v_VZKv1eSobIt6kztfyvvh23t-DT7g1o-ILXwwh-D_aeu5op2XmEpy7_vRlpNA6Xzdkm2lxIdahLeYgil-F7naRFxAfBdEJG6kxM00XtTJHWf-jb5YrEvvxtZmGd69ffGQixq0c054vyFLnwg0V6wUyvxu6lNkuWoWX3lytNWtn5dqRBzHWWBopvzFnREmPY1OfHRcgopepTFJ6GtwmUysx_6e8UZnff5Ig2-LH5Qic7rYER52NmEUvJmyLG0Wc9OC8vGbZcjO9Pz8EZ3qnZrykg_qLLEmHBJ0PAo_mOb24rF_3ksnLeGmqebzWrpo7MW0X2-NqM290DJi1pDlJykNLD)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2b4c911b91414e59bfc138fce502f8a2&_e=gX10bChQGSIv3rTbhOKW0mefPZ-lzYhH2QvgptU4YFp1M7F6wELyjmqku2IAwjtN3DNYRQIciPixKCcdi_5WiwYtQzTgdOw5o15hOBu4v_VZKv1eSobIt6kztfyvvh23t-DT7g1o-ILXwwh-D_aeu5op2XmEpy7_vRlpNA6Xzdkm2lxIdahLeYgil-F7naRFxAfBdEJG6kxM00XtTJHWf-jb5YrEvvxtZmGd69ffGQixq0c054vyFLnwg0V6wUyvxu6lNkuWoWX3lytNWtn5dqRBzHWWBopvzFnREmPY1Of15y_Gl8no1YYXaE2hDiFhRRappgwSeEyKHwR2FMtJzKEO9flHO-OyH5HCrUgCUck4TqA9ZeisD3mJIs9veBabc_3Zr-g0AkuB1gPHVVVE6vKWvSq7iqpWwW52u0pCvzDw97djmc5waEPXhUX8zPzQ) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Shine Brighter in 2025!
body:
As the year draws to a close and we reflect on the blessings of the past 12 months

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5dbf92f4c18f43ee82de66b30a2ee146&_e=GIK_ouULpzy-yl2QJnxba6rAmior3kKYKCzgwe-nuofPvGmXHSKvJ4eEkTVRIRTak_tvYi8Y69qfbwwzve3WPkoCz_kgoRYfS3MPwM9ze42Cb5FupHE8S9SYlUpud4-PVDUC-27Nbhzh03gTiTkM9MrgcKrl9zdGLs161t22X_cETLXVtbz5yOH7z54wcAOlq5NHjdtVW2bLGoDgSjcUqRL5FXVHTVJiAYWklwbo8Q1Lov_6E2_UCD7iDqv4uV4sVDUUyTIEKq9S77v-3V1L04aHBR1yz-8qfzK9B2TDlLVvnVxSNTIRHble-paeCxWepN_UtTTgy1UbSit2gOeIUw%3D%3D)
---

Hey there Friend, As the year draws to a close and we reflect on the blessings of the past 12 months, many of us are also thinking about the new year ahead--setting goals, making resolutions, and seeking fresh ways to grow in our faith. If one of your resolutions is to live more intentionally, to shine brighter for Christ, or to make a deeper impact in your community, _This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World_ by Dr. Joseph Stowell is the perfect resource to start your year strong.

In a world that feels increasingly divided and disconnected from biblical truth, it's easy to feel overwhelmed or even discouraged. But _This Light of Mine_ offers a powerful call to pivot from frustration and hopelessness to hope and action. Dr. Stowell encourages us to follow the example of Jesus--not just in our personal lives but in how we engage with the world around us.

[As you think about your spiritual goals for the new year, consider how _This Light of Mine_ can help:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5dbf92f4c18f43ee82de66b30a2ee146&_e=GIK_ouULpzy-yl2QJnxba6rAmior3kKYKCzgwe-nuofPvGmXHSKvJ4eEkTVRIRTak_tvYi8Y69qfbwwzve3WPkoCz_kgoRYfS3MPwM9ze42Cb5FupHE8S9SYlUpud4-PVDUC-27Nbhzh03gTiTkM9MrgcKrl9zdGLs161t22X_cETLXVtbz5yOH7z54wcAOluAW6sSz9NqbN4fcIL3l4tl-DY316QhOxMJlosQKtxUkTMH7fyvi4c4JXS6o8fl8xehDZY58gEi5km6jdXkinhf5crsCWFCAiGy7IcHlKzsHWHww0yCcQfIrTgxuR_u0J70tnok5cnoZRr99azcE7Yg%3D%3D)
* **Refocus your priorities:** In times of confusion and cultural shifts, Dr. Stowell shows us how to refocus on the mission of Christ's Kingdom, not earthly battles.
* **Live with boldness and courage:** This book empowers you to engage with those who need the gospel without compromising truth--living out your faith with both love and clarity.
* **Lead with grace:** Learn to lead others by the example of Jesus, offering hope and guidance to a world that is searching for answers.

No matter what your resolutions may be, we hope that _This Light of Mine_ will provide encouragement to follow Jesus faithfully.

Give today at this link and receive your copy for your gift of any amount: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5dbf92f4c18f43ee82de66b30a2ee146&_e=GIK_ouULpzy-yl2QJnxba6rAmior3kKYKCzgwe-nuofPvGmXHSKvJ4eEkTVRIRTak_tvYi8Y69qfbwwzve3WPkoCz_kgoRYfS3MPwM9ze42Cb5FupHE8S9SYlUpud4-PVDUC-27Nbhzh03gTiTkM9MrgcKrl9zdGLs161t22X_cETLXVtbz5yOH7z54wcAOlTaXzKvspGfhAXsUiJoOD7vCZoko3aoaoX-Rtm6tdTIoaHjdlcADVPlmaBYf5sM_7U2cD0kIfbcryFZjE-5dMAZrQUOubNfjojFygetl7DF5VaXW7ZPDVguTegemBs5c2fRGPoxxA-9M6fUWDVD7ezA%3D%3D)

As a thank you for your gift of any amount to support the ongoing mission of _Today in the Word_ , we'd love to send you an exclusive pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_. But don't wait--the deadline to receive this book is fast approaching:**11:59 pm on December 31st.**

[Your generous gift will help us continue to provide Bible-based resources and daily devotionals to millions of readers around the world, equipping them to live out their faith in the coming year.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5dbf92f4c18f43ee82de66b30a2ee146&_e=GIK_ouULpzy-yl2QJnxba6rAmior3kKYKCzgwe-nuofPvGmXHSKvJ4eEkTVRIRTak_tvYi8Y69qfbwwzve3WPkoCz_kgoRYfS3MPwM9ze42Cb5FupHE8S9SYlUpud4-PVDUC-27Nbhzh03gTiTkM9MrgcKrl9zdGLs161t22X_cETLXVtbz5yOH7z54wcAOlnQNdkOToAmONi4ak5nTN8cSfsmSKZer0mhAKspIF0cuJT4IrfPnY5xod9qWk4kj4FWtXLxPOieSA_AjKcx6VQJofGcOjYLPDyCf64MOn8hdfGvbMRM_MwFcN43Y4zIcw0X1Q19OxcEuN4F2J_TkBQw%3D%3D)

Take this opportunity to make a meaningful start to your new year. When you partner with us, you'll not only be supporting the ministry of _Today in the Word_ but also receiving a valuable resource that will be sure to challenge and encourage you in the year ahead.

We are grateful for your support and excited to see how God will use this book to shape your 2025!

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz
Managing Editor, _Today in the Word_
---
|
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
