name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help keep our family together for Christmas
body:
But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.

| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rTUnhirB3696tDsTLPjiQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSpAWP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLUFGUiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WS_Gdnq7oaplIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rTUnhirB3696tDsTLPjiQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSpAWP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLUFGUiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WS_Gdnq7oaplIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...**life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[**I'm turning to you for help.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rTUnhirB3696tDsTLPjiQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSpAWP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLUFGUiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WS_Gdnq7oaplIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. **He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.** When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson** , **the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...**[**Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rTUnhirB3696tDsTLPjiQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSpAWP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLUFGUiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WS_Gdnq7oaplIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. **[**So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rTUnhirB3696tDsTLPjiQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSpAWP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLUFGUiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WS_Gdnq7oaplIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's **[**your $35 gift**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rTUnhirB3696tDsTLPjiQA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSpAWP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLUFGUiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WS_Gdnq7oaplIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. **Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. **Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yVA8n7xDCzvs3UJT_5LfRQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---

But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.~ My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. ~ Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...life in prison could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why ~ James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson , the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...~ His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. ~ LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's ~ that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | ~~ 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 American Freedom Report PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dtfkyTk3qm2Eya3qk8v8UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSpWsP0SeaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIwODYmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJmFmZl9zdWI9Uk0tQ0ItMjAyNDEyMjImYzI9cG9wMTIwMTI0YSZhZmZfc3ViMz0zTU8xOTZUJmFmZl9zdWI0PXt0cmFuc2FjdGlvbl9pZH1XA3NwY0IKZ2X3_GdnsgQRdVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/dtfkyTk3qm2Eya3qk8v8UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSpWsP0SeaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIwODYmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJmFmZl9zdWI9Uk0tQ0ItMjAyNDEyMjImYzI9cG9wMTIwMTI0YSZhZmZfc3ViMz0zTU8xOTZUJmFmZl9zdWI0PXt0cmFuc2FjdGlvbl9pZH1XA3NwY0IKZ2X3_GdnsgQRdVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insight
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8433665e53dd4df7b24d1d284d27c01b&_e=cj6xfTI3LDME82CM_j04twq8xBcPp2TiAotrjQbwVgs1qjFmGeOWvNjbeyqIsHoZ4Z2jHK83SoY6ox5gCADcX-EaWD6EVUeECTOMrCT2avz6eEpIj_iQaBuXIIxabTU-he9vYqxZi29g3MxG_VG5x_p9ZHosr2WG26zWx6ZHLsye1tpMQHLB-amHuIaEDTHB1W8W67IgJvgcE_GWbOe2bqdBL6h9LAjtnyzgpMV9ELYs7j23tl4yc_mwVJJA2FsGaIvqOW7F1kqi-sqFk_I3PnFNWg1svvoJX4wSgtGU0DkWH9gvBQZxQnGYv_0fqpiNtVY8T8M1ZuWGjfoGvw3LPgPBGHAqj6pO94jByVkR9eIzN44CuXHHm6KYICIR-iB7BsLiE9dckyvxeBL1p__JnXiMP3UTMfKxQJC2GvoniI3DJPJMOQ8cPxg4n97lLeEu) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8433665e53dd4df7b24d1d284d27c01b&_e=cj6xfTI3LDME82CM_j04twq8xBcPp2TiAotrjQbwVgs1qjFmGeOWvNjbeyqIsHoZ4Z2jHK83SoY6ox5gCADcX-EaWD6EVUeECTOMrCT2avz6eEpIj_iQaBuXIIxabTU-he9vYqxZi29g3MxG_VG5x_p9ZHosr2WG26zWx6ZHLsye1tpMQHLB-amHuIaEDTHB1W8W67IgJvgcE_GWbOe2bqdBL6h9LAjtnyzgpMV9ELYs7j23tl4yc_mwVJJA2FsGaIvqOW7F1kqi-sqFk_I3PnFNWg1svvoJX4wSgtGU0DkTEIIXCPE-1CB7UK8rNakzVKG9FHaXV9iPXuKeKKzVGo2kmlZCoEUHh0FCS4fbIXSgn5ITfQFKncmtAZRlh3DcWrfIlDinluQS2edT6PzQv4cFB9fOaxaDIWHV-uk2TmJ1rLj1nyUxPKTtJR04AAUo)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8433665e53dd4df7b24d1d284d27c01b&_e=cj6xfTI3LDME82CM_j04twq8xBcPp2TiAotrjQbwVgs1qjFmGeOWvNjbeyqIsHoZ4Z2jHK83SoY6ox5gCADcX-EaWD6EVUeECTOMrCT2avz6eEpIj_iQaBuXIIxabTU-he9vYqxZi29g3MxG_VG5x_p9ZHosr2WG26zWx6ZHLsye1tpMQHLB-amHuIaEDTHB1W8W67IgJvgcE_GWbOe2bqdBL6h9LAjtnyzgpMV9ELYs7j23tl4yc_mwVJJA2FsGaIvqOW7F1kqi-sqFk_I3PnFNWg1svvoJX4wSgtGU0DmSZA3yMmXzfqONgzkkx4_TSJm_3FDUaerKSdAkwMCdyzhycnSBYP-SFzG-noi_nRt5wR5PI4r72RTMa9HjWskwFshlEWcarlLmoZF1uL3m2FloPipgkh2Qz3rO_9I_0G8btfuUFRBQw0-XTfkRuQKy),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8433665e53dd4df7b24d1d284d27c01b&_e=cj6xfTI3LDME82CM_j04twq8xBcPp2TiAotrjQbwVgs1qjFmGeOWvNjbeyqIsHoZ4Z2jHK83SoY6ox5gCADcX-EaWD6EVUeECTOMrCT2avz6eEpIj_iQaBuXIIxabTU-he9vYqxZi29g3MxG_VG5x_p9ZHosr2WG26zWx6ZHLsye1tpMQHLB-amHuIaEDTHB1W8W67IgJvgcE_GWbOe2bqdBL6h9LAjtnyzgpMV9ELYs7j23tl4yc_mwVJJA2FsGaIvqOW7F1kqi-sqFk_I3PnFNWg1svvoJX4wSgtGU0DnEs1d04R9k_VdHsDis6tttgndsBNBUE1zo1cGlpD0IWUFfsqkvRUQtImQqe3v7FSOKP67BReTe8YJlxJTol8RxlAVwIoJthabJZrbp63jw2N7nlX3OmE_B41b9I4OcOduHLnMNGmyAPKpHqoxus2zK) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8433665e53dd4df7b24d1d284d27c01b&_e=cj6xfTI3LDME82CM_j04twq8xBcPp2TiAotrjQbwVgs1qjFmGeOWvNjbeyqIsHoZ4Z2jHK83SoY6ox5gCADcX-EaWD6EVUeECTOMrCT2avz6eEpIj_iQaBuXIIxabTU-he9vYqxZi29g3MxG_VG5x_p9ZHosr2WG26zWx6ZHLsye1tpMQHLB-amHuIaEDTHB1W8W67IgJvgcE_GWbOe2bqdBL6h9LAjtnyzgpMV9ELYs7j23tl4yc_mwVJJA2FsGaIvqOW7F1kqi-sqFk_I3PnFNWg1svvoJX4wSgtGU0Dle8SLwxYx5EvFjomeQsYjO-CCUbY8op3F7ceSMRnWxkWM-DUKl1TLKlkOQ8lLuAxQsRVjBgaMxc1rg6X8bDUm5qwdNzI6w7_g-5-85A3XXlRc5FaAh0aQ1wvR-MpdMy4I352GgHl92lHQJ9v82e0Zi)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
An Unprecedented Holiday

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=1)
---
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PPHjEC-3Ed0PGi1y3QBjaHBwztSAV7zo9eG80japVSoL&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=2 "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST") [LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PPHjEC-3Ed0PGi1y3QBjaHBwztSAV7zo9eG80japVSoL&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=2)
---
Friend —
Since the November election, it has become clear that the outgoing Biden Administration intends to "lock in" a war with Russia by sabotaging any potential that Donald Trump might have to secure peace in Ukraine. The [launching](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oOX3oO8XL0tZjrDwSobD-HDzVIYucFtsuXYWMh5Qxb7QhgwYVHT-QQU0A0jJ_VCBiA6TF0Eh9UGAt_4yYCe2raX3hbG98r8bpj6uXSLWw8Iqd14hTzOGq0hTrFbRVGme&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=3) of more American ATACMS missiles into Russia on Dec. 18 is yet more proof of this.
Don't be fooled. This is a holiday season unlike anything you have experienced before. These next four weeks before the Jan. 20 inauguration will be**the most dangerous period in human history.**
We, the American people, must summon the better angels of our nature to pull our nation and the world off this trajectory of doom. Nowhere in the words of Benjamin Franklin, George Washington, or John Quincy Adams will you see it written, “We will be the leaders of the free world.” They understood that freedom is an elusive thing; as soon as you seek to impose it upon someone else, it has disappeared.
The majority of the world is throwing off the chains of colonialism and are instead pursuing their own economic development. They are future-oriented and inspired by what is ahead. Our nation was not intended to be the enforcer of colonialism, but rather to be a bulwark against it—can we rediscover this before it's too late?
**Stand for righteousness this holiday season**. Pick up the phone, the pen, the bullhorn and tell your government and your neighbors, this madness must stop! [Call your congressman](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=nRm-ykgobr4-ZxHmvP2MqSO0J6JgvCJ3PkR_LvbwIKO17NlAx4tlToeQCy2RBwcnErjXa2FTOwnIMNMr28LxTA&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=4) to support [HR 10218 to ban ATACMS missiles](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMOrPpzeyQjQPcHxfKIzyuolku6b54jbTG-sammI8qr6FHvX4OfiG7ESr1cXN9Sqfo&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=5) for Ukraine. And demand they also stop sending weapons to the modern-day King Herod, aka Bibi Netanyahu.
* * *
## Starting At 10am (Eastern)! Sunday LaRouche Show
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PPHjEC-3Ed0PGi1y3QBjaHBwztSAV7zo9eG80japVSoL&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=6)
This Sunday (today) at 10:00 am, The LaRouche Organization will resume our "LaRouche Show" which will feature outstanding video content featuring the American genius Lyndon LaRouche.
Today we will rebroadcast the 2008 documentary "Firewall: In Defense of the Nation State," commissioned by LaRouche in the wake of the 2007 collapse, which he had precisely forecast, to educate Americans about the perils of the hyperinflationary policy of "bailout."
The film reviews what happened in Weimar, Germany, and reveals LaRouche's proposed "Homeowners' and Bank Protection Act," which was endorsed by hundreds of City Councils and legislators, but never taken up in Washington. Had this been signed into law, as the first step in a broader economic recovery plan, the economic misery most Americans are currently experiencing would have been averted.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PPHjEC-3Ed0PGi1y3QBjaHBwztSAV7zo9eG80japVSoL&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=7)

## Friday Symposium: The Strategic Importance of the LaRouche Case Today
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMOrPpzeyQjQPcHxfKIzyuoXKWXbkbT5ILXMZvSOZf5ZKnF3-GVVxVgXgLS8hUsl1ll5hKJFDQFru6UMOXxe9QmDfM8eP8JXUqxlKOm1Nun-w&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=8)
In a 1995 letter to Janet Reno, former U.S. Attorney General Ramsey Clark stated unequivocally that “I believe [the LaRouche case] involves a broader range of deliberate and systematic misconduct and abuse of power over a longer period of time in an effort to destroy a political movement and leader, than any other federal prosecution in my time or to my knowledge.”
Why do so few Americans know about the biggest legal frame-up in the 20th Century, especially when it set the precedent for so many other political prosecutions to follow?
In this week's Symposium, TLO President Diane Sare was joined by _EIR_ editor Dennis Small (one of the original targets of the "Get LaRouche" operation) to discuss exactly why the Anglo-American war party believed that such a heavy-handed deployment to crush LaRouche and his ideas was so central to their deadly world agenda, and why a full exoneration of LaRouche has now become a vital strategic issue today.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMOrPpzeyQjQPcHxfKIzyuoXKWXbkbT5ILXMZvSOZf5ZKnF3-GVVxVgXgLS8hUsl1ll5hKJFDQFru6UMOXxe9QmDfM8eP8JXUqxlKOm1Nun-w&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=9)

## The Four Weeks of Christmas
Now until January 20 will be the most dangerous time in history.
Read the latest statement from LaRouche Organization President Diane Sare, on our holiday mobilization.

## In Case You Missed It: Schiller Institute Christmas Concert
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmNcRZ7UtOLA-Dip1TotMUJC&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=11)
Last weekend, the Schiller Institute NYC Chorus hosted their annual Christmas Concert, this year titled: "Blessed are the Peacemakers."
The program featured the Mozart Coronation Mass, K 317, and included excerpts from Handel’s Messiah as well as a selection of Christmas Spirituals and Carols.
The chorus began in 2014, when an impromptu Sing-Along of excerpts of Handel’s Messiah was organized in answer to the death-by-suffocation of Eric Garner, which threatened to create dangerous divisions and violence in the City of New York. The concert was dedicated to “The Sanctity of Every Human Life.” Tragically, just as the chorus had opened the program by singing “Dona Nobis Pacem” (Give Us Peace), two police officers were murdered in Brooklyn as they sat in their patrol car.
The Schiller Institute has been performing and organizing for peace and harmony in the nation and the world ever since, wielding the power of classical art to help bring humanity together through a dialogue of cultures.
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmNcRZ7UtOLA-Dip1TotMUJC&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=12)

## Richard Black and Vanessa Beeley: The Reality in Syria
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HkE0xGp7YYebEsjqkUB2Uoi1nScK0LDXBrffXhaHVX9FsPnBPI-KcrcLNh1_MDPawfvd5YeSsM4Wh3vvOhVWQg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=13)
LaRouche Organization President Diane Sare conducted an interview Dec. 16 with expert analysts Col. Richard H. Black (ret.), U.S. Army JAG at the Pentagon and former State Senator in Virginia; and with U.K. investigative journalist Vanessa Beeley, a longtime resident of Syria, who had to flee the terrorist coup regime. The 50-minute interview covers both the larger strategic situation, and breaking updates on Syria.
Black and Beeley both stressed the media lies and the terrorist nature of Abu Mohammad al- Jolani. Beeley reviewed the longer history of the strife in the region, going back to Zionist Vladimir Jabotinsky and his collaborators, who, among other things, worked closely with certain Ukrainians against the Soviet Union. This interesting account came in answer to Sare’s question, why is it that Israel, ISIS, and Ukraine’s Azov Battalion neo-Nazis are all on the same team?
[**Watch here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HkE0xGp7YYebEsjqkUB2Uoi1nScK0LDXBrffXhaHVX9FsPnBPI-KcrcLNh1_MDPawfvd5YeSsM4Wh3vvOhVWQg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20241222_newsletter&n=14)

clean_body: An Unprecedented Holiday | | | | "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST" Friend — Since the November election, it has become clear that the outgoing Biden Administration intends to "lock in" a war with Russia by sabotaging any potential that Donald Trump might have to secure peace in Ukraine. The of more American ATACMS missiles into Russia on Dec. 18 is yet more proof of this. Don't be fooled. This is a holiday season unlike anything you have experienced before. These next four weeks before the Jan. 20 inauguration will bethe most dangerous period in human history. We, the American people, must summon the better angels of our nature to pull our nation and the world off this trajectory of doom. Nowhere in the words of Benjamin Franklin, George Washington, or John Quincy Adams will you see it written, “We will be the leaders of the free world.” They understood that freedom is an elusive thing; as soon as you seek to impose it upon someone else, it has disappeared. The majority of the world is throwing off the chains of colonialism and are instead pursuing their own economic development. They are future-oriented and inspired by what is ahead. Our nation was not intended to be the enforcer of colonialism, but rather to be a bulwark against it—can we rediscover this before it's too late? Stand for righteousness this holiday season. Pick up the phone, the pen, the bullhorn and tell your government and your neighbors, this madness must stop! to support for Ukraine. And demand they also stop sending weapons to the modern-day King Herod, aka Bibi Netanyahu. Starting At 10am (Eastern)! Sunday LaRouche Show This Sunday (today) at 10:00 am, The LaRouche Organization will resume our "LaRouche Show" which will feature outstanding video content featuring the American genius Lyndon LaRouche. Today we will rebroadcast the 2008 documentary "Firewall: In Defense of the Nation State," commissioned by LaRouche in the wake of the 2007 collapse, which he had precisely forecast, to educate Americans about the perils of the hyperinflationary policy of "bailout." The film reviews what happened in Weimar, Germany, and reveals LaRouche's proposed "Homeowners' and Bank Protection Act," which was endorsed by hundreds of City Councils and legislators, but never taken up in Washington. Had this been signed into law, as the first step in a broader economic recovery plan, the economic misery most Americans are currently experiencing would have been averted. Friday Symposium: The Strategic Importance of the LaRouche Case Today In a 1995 letter to Janet Reno, former U.S. Attorney General Ramsey Clark stated unequivocally that “I believe [the LaRouche case] involves a broader range of deliberate and systematic misconduct and abuse of power over a longer period of time in an effort to destroy a political movement and leader, than any other federal prosecution in my time or to my knowledge.” Why do so few Americans know about the biggest legal frame-up in the 20th Century, especially when it set the precedent for so many other political prosecutions to follow? In this week's Symposium, TLO President Diane Sare was joined by EIR editor Dennis Small (one of the original targets of the "Get LaRouche" operation) to discuss exactly why the Anglo-American war party believed that such a heavy-handed deployment to crush LaRouche and his ideas was so central to their deadly world agenda, and why a full exoneration of LaRouche has now become a vital strategic issue today. The Four Weeks of Christmas Now until January 20 will be the most dangerous time in history. Read the latest statement from LaRouche Organization President Diane Sare, on our holiday mobilization. In Case You Missed It: Schiller Institute Christmas Concert Last weekend, the Schiller Institute NYC Chorus hosted their annual Christmas Concert, this year titled: "Blessed are the Peacemakers." The program featured the Mozart Coronation Mass, K 317, and included excerpts from Handel’s Messiah as well as a selection of Christmas Spirituals and Carols. The chorus began in 2014, when an impromptu Sing-Along of excerpts of Handel’s Messiah was organized in answer to the death-by-suffocation of Eric Garner, which threatened to create dangerous divisions and violence in the City of New York. The concert was dedicated to “The Sanctity of Every Human Life.” Tragically, just as the chorus had opened the program by singing “Dona Nobis Pacem” (Give Us Peace), two police officers were murdered in Brooklyn as they sat in their patrol car. The Schiller Institute has been performing and organizing for peace and harmony in the nation and the world ever since, wielding the power of classical art to help bring humanity together through a dialogue of cultures. Richard Black and Vanessa Beeley: The Reality in Syria LaRouche Organization President Diane Sare conducted an interview Dec. 16 with expert analysts Col. Richard H. Black (ret.), U.S. Army JAG at the Pentagon and former State Senator in Virginia; and with U.K. investigative journalist Vanessa Beeley, a longtime resident of Syria, who had to flee the terrorist coup regime. The 50-minute interview covers both the larger strategic situation, and breaking updates on Syria. Black and Beeley both stressed the media lies and the terrorist nature of Abu Mohammad al- Jolani. Beeley reviewed the longer history of the strife in the region, going back to Zionist Vladimir Jabotinsky and his collaborators, who, among other things, worked closely with certain Ukrainians against the Soviet Union. This interesting account came in answer to Sare’s question, why is it that Israel, ISIS, and Ukraine’s Azov Battalion neo-Nazis are all on the same team? Join the Discussion! name: History Facts
subject: What the king's "groom of the stool" did 😬
body:
During the reign of Henry VII, a curious job emerged to serve the king of England: the “groom of the stool,” an attendant who helped with the monarch’s toileting. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68co34h26vq9plllcgu0n5hhr1xgrbhnx3xmwdccoivf2enxikjgo71m3z1gmlk6pszkjia43uvpi94j3bgc2c4ru5aufl2ou8rp85wogska78b4ric2ui92dlzz184o6soq0gq146bopom5k&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sow9ji&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [British kings had attendants to help them go to the bathroom.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sow9ji&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sow9ji&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sow9ji&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| D uring the reign of Henry VII, a curious job emerged to serve the king of England: the “groom of the stool,” an attendant who helped with the monarch’s toileting. The “stool” in the title refers not to excrement, but to the “close stool,” a [luxurious portable toilet](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sow9ji&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that followed the king during his travels. One close stool made for Henry VIII in 1546 was trimmed in ribbon and gilt nails, and came with a leather carrying case.
---
The groom was in charge of the close stool and monitoring the king’s bathroom habits, and may have even helped clean the royal bottom afterward. But it wasn’t considered a menial job — it was a prestigious position held by men of influence. Perhaps due to the intimate nature of the gig, the groom of the stool was a close royal adviser, too. Henry VII’s longtime groom Hugh Denys eventually became the king’s personal treasurer. Henry VIII’s first groom, William Compton, handled many of his personal affairs from the get-go, including arranging romantic encounters. (He eventually became fabulously rich.) Henry VIII’s final groom, Arthur Denny, even controlled his signature stamp.
The last known groom of the stool, at least by that name, was Michael Stanhope, who worked [under King Edward VI ](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sow9ji&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)in the 16th century. The office lapsed during the reign of two female monarchs, Queen Mary and the last Tudor monarch, Queen Elizabeth I, who both had their own set of domestic staff. During the reign of the Stuarts, starting in the early 17th century, the title changed to the more polite “groom of the stole,” referring to dressing the king rather than doing his dirty work. King Edward VII eliminated the position entirely when he ascended to the throne in 1901.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sow9ji&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sow9ji&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Shakespeare was not above toilet humor.
Don’t let the dense verse fool you: Shakespeare loved a potty joke. In _The Comedy of Errors_ , for example, Dromio of Ephesus delivers this line about flatulence: “A man may break a word with you, sir, and words are but wind / Ay, and break it in your face, so he break it not behind.” The Bard even made [a couple of jokes about close stools](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sow9ji&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) specifically, such as in _All’s Well That Ends Well_ , when Parolles requests that the clown deliver a letter. “Foh! prithee, stand away,” the clown responds, “a paper from fortune's close-stool to give to a nobleman!”

clean_body: During the reign of Henry VII, a curious job emerged to serve the king of England: the “groom of the stool,” an attendant who helped with the monarch’s toileting. | D uring the reign of Henry VII, a curious job emerged to serve the king of England: the “groom of the stool,” an attendant who helped with the monarch’s toileting. The “stool” in the title refers not to excrement, but to the “close stool,” a that followed the king during his travels. One close stool made for Henry VIII in 1546 was trimmed in ribbon and gilt nails, and came with a leather carrying case. The groom was in charge of the close stool and monitoring the king’s bathroom habits, and may have even helped clean the royal bottom afterward. But it wasn’t considered a menial job — it was a prestigious position held by men of influence. Perhaps due to the intimate nature of the gig, the groom of the stool was a close royal adviser, too. Henry VII’s longtime groom Hugh Denys eventually became the king’s personal treasurer. Henry VIII’s first groom, William Compton, handled many of his personal affairs from the get-go, including arranging romantic encounters. (He eventually became fabulously rich.) Henry VIII’s final groom, Arthur Denny, even controlled his signature stamp. The last known groom of the stool, at least by that name, was Michael Stanhope, who worked the 16th century. The office lapsed during the reign of two female monarchs, Queen Mary and the last Tudor monarch, Queen Elizabeth I, who both had their own set of domestic staff. During the reign of the Stuarts, starting in the early 17th century, the title changed to the more polite “groom of the stole,” referring to dressing the king rather than doing his dirty work. King Edward VII eliminated the position entirely when he ascended to the throne in 1901. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Grooms of the stool who served Henry VIII 4 | | Tudor monarchs (including Lady Jane Grey, who ruled for just nine days) 6 | Tudor monarchs (including Lady Jane Grey, who ruled for just nine days) 6 | | Wives of Henry VIII 6 | | Bathrooms in Buckingham Palace 78 | Bathrooms in Buckingham Palace 78 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Shakespeare was not above toilet humor. Don’t let the dense verse fool you: Shakespeare loved a potty joke. In The Comedy of Errors , for example, Dromio of Ephesus delivers this line about flatulence: “A man may break a word with you, sir, and words are but wind / Ay, and break it in your face, so he break it not behind.” The Bard even made specifically, such as in All’s Well That Ends Well , when Parolles requests that the clown deliver a letter. “Foh! prithee, stand away,” the clown responds, “a paper from fortune's close-stool to give to a nobleman!” Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2024 History Facts. name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help keep our family together for Christmas
body:
But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.

| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c595ac85b9e4d789efd0307ee4d3b0d&_e=4xUg19pmv3Bbla0c6NWJeaXV7DRJX-BfmkvD1SR1NpVfO9gkOnWj3UzxcOn1y6aUwbBhVui3vvAbpRy9LvPCpO2tu1M_tRPaGXcEV7HxQBOdRdD1RurWeFVH7rkImBtaZ33Zuf6swjN2PKllpCIu2tDwSMoq1HntD5PuLaMDHhCJ_2OVyjOrM9OKShYJefY23UOcVcPlOkrT8wzCuepF_PfvUfzHOY57aD4It2oEPt-HuXjtjrOnN1U3UGWxbqQzLOP9wxktvxxOI0C9NUL_tSfItXrzos26PXm2oSuwci1kZP6C_7gYYaFGtRcHHxNiCDK3sZQpgGOeWYrJocBIF420n5kU2OJJlYCuyLdgpReKPcB_MT4O8kGxbs99Wh0408hyKsyX33g317j1Ikpmww%3D%3D)** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c595ac85b9e4d789efd0307ee4d3b0d&_e=4xUg19pmv3Bbla0c6NWJeaXV7DRJX-BfmkvD1SR1NpVfO9gkOnWj3UzxcOn1y6aUwbBhVui3vvAbpRy9LvPCpO2tu1M_tRPaGXcEV7HxQBOdRdD1RurWeFVH7rkImBtaZ33Zuf6swjN2PKllpCIu2tDwSMoq1HntD5PuLaMDHhCJ_2OVyjOrM9OKShYJefY23UOcVcPlOkrT8wzCuepF_PfvUfzHOY57aD4It2oEPt-HuXjtjrOnN1U3UGWxbqQz4wyU43Ug4MTyqBCs5CU24-8AN6lYdi5GcyNB2fUMLAXaXPucUJOouuft2BIRcx-dORgpHI2F0kpLLYTyAxuZ1xkeq_VWkdPqWlAPyPcQXqboP9iMNcLDi5uaZzmysi5b0UYl6JtFZkBCH4mmKZ5FCQ%3D%3D)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...**life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[**I'm turning to you for help.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c595ac85b9e4d789efd0307ee4d3b0d&_e=4xUg19pmv3Bbla0c6NWJeaXV7DRJX-BfmkvD1SR1NpVfO9gkOnWj3UzxcOn1y6aUwbBhVui3vvAbpRy9LvPCpO2tu1M_tRPaGXcEV7HxQBOdRdD1RurWeFVH7rkImBtaZ33Zuf6swjN2PKllpCIu2tDwSMoq1HntD5PuLaMDHhCJ_2OVyjOrM9OKShYJefY23UOcVcPlOkrT8wzCuepF_PfvUfzHOY57aD4It2oEPt-HuXjtjrOnN1U3UGWxbqQzCdMP4R-FaF2AhJPHNGHkHXITtlToWEWjYpTwix8yA0m9ZrgBTwVwscYqHoYuQlemq1qaGEGSvOS2oD1Qn8Wba9Jhlvw_RsVA6rTxHlrvdEwg1Pafo7sPzuh8MnPK3gbOymGly9B7Afp3CUKLyro8vA%3D%3D)** James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. **He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.** When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson** , **the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...**[**Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c595ac85b9e4d789efd0307ee4d3b0d&_e=4xUg19pmv3Bbla0c6NWJeaXV7DRJX-BfmkvD1SR1NpVfO9gkOnWj3UzxcOn1y6aUwbBhVui3vvAbpRy9LvPCpO2tu1M_tRPaGXcEV7HxQBOdRdD1RurWeFVH7rkImBtaZ33Zuf6swjN2PKllpCIu2tDwSMoq1HntD5PuLaMDHhCJ_2OVyjOrM9OKShYJefY23UOcVcPlOkrT8wzCuepF_PfvUfzHOY57aD4It2oEPt-HuXjtjrOnN1U3UGWxbqQzdSpnIl8TZ7wbtomC8SEWv7-z78lbwO5bHnWsFtP9lfRdOJOhulNx4ThvVVY2sUhAQ2rkQ056OK_z-h4H-d4OZzh-J4ytfWifD8GyL1cgFRJybQka8V49x5fRdy0CORS_O3tExXUfjF3-pIGUVvF77Q%3D%3D)** His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. **[**So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c595ac85b9e4d789efd0307ee4d3b0d&_e=4xUg19pmv3Bbla0c6NWJeaXV7DRJX-BfmkvD1SR1NpVfO9gkOnWj3UzxcOn1y6aUwbBhVui3vvAbpRy9LvPCpO2tu1M_tRPaGXcEV7HxQBOdRdD1RurWeFVH7rkImBtaZ33Zuf6swjN2PKllpCIu2tDwSMoq1HntD5PuLaMDHhCJ_2OVyjOrM9OKShYJefY23UOcVcPlOkrT8wzCuepF_PfvUfzHOY57aD4It2oEPt-HuXjtjrOnN1U3UGWxbqQzqn8t0QEdl-fhouX6t2snmQwp3w6BGiIFVhgIdBDHCwMYHvHOjJrUyG97sStE2_ubYpSgY9DJlaIVeZmq0lj7uOpm4ybDmsD5BddLiELP8KH1kLN2EU2Ldg6T2vqoLeL7czzsKOYQ0a4G-6BTUHsWXg%3D%3D)** LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's **[**your $35 gift**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9c595ac85b9e4d789efd0307ee4d3b0d&_e=4xUg19pmv3Bbla0c6NWJeaXV7DRJX-BfmkvD1SR1NpVfO9gkOnWj3UzxcOn1y6aUwbBhVui3vvAbpRy9LvPCpO2tu1M_tRPaGXcEV7HxQBOdRdD1RurWeFVH7rkImBtaZ33Zuf6swjN2PKllpCIu2tDwSMoq1HntD5PuLaMDHhCJ_2OVyjOrM9OKShYJefY23UOcVcPlOkrT8wzCuepF_PfvUfzHOY57aD4It2oEPt-HuXjtjrOnN1U3UGWxbqQznlS5GLX2jB-18trKm3AXFKKbK-nC66h692ioCcJBz3x3AY5vo99_3mnRmM7exf8OUhe65Ht71UZMDHPZ8z-E1FG29l2NncJ1FSJihHO1lwoCDrmKis9muR7C-pSWg3PpUeR-9Qg82ZZhgQ4qLFES-A%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. **Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. **Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. clean_body: But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry. | | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. | | Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...life in prison could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson , the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Shine Brighter in 2025!
body:
As the year draws to a close and we reflect on the blessings of the past 12 months

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d5a0e04c7504a6f84a657bd9ee96065&_e=0yR-1A_yR922s2MdKtdDPTbvUztRZaX7QuIBgCNt_vK6ddEIdqIzzSs7GzV9w2szjYi8WlXHOOh0lLMR_QohHSEmY5KlmgGo8TT2PBb_8YuM7rfOl0ARShFlDS7MANcWTgI115tQ99a3edQQv8iaaDX5UpOMo_ersOKBEj0H_ushuBJMFRfgO7IaU5mhKJ6ljjH9xfMVNpFrBqMGVUlHZqqGbPl6r_CXlYh2BAxrnuQfA017hNSiPOxUOLPyTdH-vN4vK-OvF8SGnlKGy_vQZFq6FHg26UZHgYC0kpF6pWbBvxzrcHIj5VIaqZ0TqtaY4n4kBXN8UzHeYQQLknDkbA%3D%3D)
---

Hey there Friend, As the year draws to a close and we reflect on the blessings of the past 12 months, many of us are also thinking about the new year ahead--setting goals, making resolutions, and seeking fresh ways to grow in our faith. If one of your resolutions is to live more intentionally, to shine brighter for Christ, or to make a deeper impact in your community, _This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World_ by Dr. Joseph Stowell is the perfect resource to start your year strong.

In a world that feels increasingly divided and disconnected from biblical truth, it's easy to feel overwhelmed or even discouraged. But _This Light of Mine_ offers a powerful call to pivot from frustration and hopelessness to hope and action. Dr. Stowell encourages us to follow the example of Jesus--not just in our personal lives but in how we engage with the world around us.

[As you think about your spiritual goals for the new year, consider how _This Light of Mine_ can help:](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d5a0e04c7504a6f84a657bd9ee96065&_e=0yR-1A_yR922s2MdKtdDPTbvUztRZaX7QuIBgCNt_vK6ddEIdqIzzSs7GzV9w2szjYi8WlXHOOh0lLMR_QohHSEmY5KlmgGo8TT2PBb_8YuM7rfOl0ARShFlDS7MANcWTgI115tQ99a3edQQv8iaaDX5UpOMo_ersOKBEj0H_ushuBJMFRfgO7IaU5mhKJ6l6V2PtjWi_1ntI38Iae4s7XWVsWsRjfU2rBcZ48WG1yNzvL1sicuuaYyLwmEcyCsUMOXMKlU1Zq8C3kEBBEsV_fEvhl0BOcTyBaa5EIzzVhFY09YTzEmhqAa0lI_2FR_PatEkwT_la1c0I0KI86Q4gw%3D%3D)
* **Refocus your priorities:** In times of confusion and cultural shifts, Dr. Stowell shows us how to refocus on the mission of Christ's Kingdom, not earthly battles.
* **Live with boldness and courage:** This book empowers you to engage with those who need the gospel without compromising truth--living out your faith with both love and clarity.
* **Lead with grace:** Learn to lead others by the example of Jesus, offering hope and guidance to a world that is searching for answers.

No matter what your resolutions may be, we hope that _This Light of Mine_ will provide encouragement to follow Jesus faithfully.

Give today at this link and receive your copy for your gift of any amount: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d5a0e04c7504a6f84a657bd9ee96065&_e=0yR-1A_yR922s2MdKtdDPTbvUztRZaX7QuIBgCNt_vK6ddEIdqIzzSs7GzV9w2szjYi8WlXHOOh0lLMR_QohHSEmY5KlmgGo8TT2PBb_8YuM7rfOl0ARShFlDS7MANcWTgI115tQ99a3edQQv8iaaDX5UpOMo_ersOKBEj0H_ushuBJMFRfgO7IaU5mhKJ6l2Wi7dpU4gWYQ9w0fYPCbMQ2uyg3re6dnKVvu5chy4agVk-yRXuThNb7aisMtr2-GXk78y-U7PZl3UAFLA6sIHwZRc3BKd8ZhjxcLBZUUOSLDDx7kcj5bYe6I2tG92Iy1pdCoHf2e1nZzws4XPlf5TA%3D%3D)

As a thank you for your gift of any amount to support the ongoing mission of _Today in the Word_ , we'd love to send you an exclusive pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_. But don't wait--the deadline to receive this book is fast approaching:**11:59 pm on December 31st.**

[Your generous gift will help us continue to provide Bible-based resources and daily devotionals to millions of readers around the world, equipping them to live out their faith in the coming year.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6d5a0e04c7504a6f84a657bd9ee96065&_e=0yR-1A_yR922s2MdKtdDPTbvUztRZaX7QuIBgCNt_vK6ddEIdqIzzSs7GzV9w2szjYi8WlXHOOh0lLMR_QohHSEmY5KlmgGo8TT2PBb_8YuM7rfOl0ARShFlDS7MANcWTgI115tQ99a3edQQv8iaaDX5UpOMo_ersOKBEj0H_ushuBJMFRfgO7IaU5mhKJ6lAVhCKd1k9vZOrgbvWjduhf66x_pvLlUA1Dk2crDX19pgq-a415ilVkN0jF2yehUcuFghECE5LqyWtzX9YSNMj1BX6P_NKi5eMvSqDKdRYGL0jrSvxORMT6Wl6jW467ttapLynuNbAsUjEY1IOXLx8Q%3D%3D)

Take this opportunity to make a meaningful start to your new year. When you partner with us, you'll not only be supporting the ministry of _Today in the Word_ but also receiving a valuable resource that will be sure to challenge and encourage you in the year ahead.

We are grateful for your support and excited to see how God will use this book to shape your 2025!

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz
Managing Editor, _Today in the Word_
