name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help keep our family together for Christmas
body:
But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.

| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend, The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry. If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. **[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c317ee5672b14193953c638bfbe2eb13&_e=gaXNVEXguwVIA3_AHkz8mwnaiv6xMQlSq_v9m8GpmYi4OF42sNNwh6P6339oTppk0XDFzd87ilp5W5qOXvszEpgKLvOBhWi_gSu98tgqN_1UgP3XBeSsXjfhmVqR2undmJW-Zuj6FFHX76M4FbPHPSl8g64DjN5xyDsrotuWFc08g82-YmWsTG65K-W0ZIeIftpz9plt9lTtx1RVcc-nEaOP-ZV-Us7PdKgH02c_DNIb5etAfuvzcGXMlEaOcEcAZqrF5C6EC2wRhXkvDz-VO6VortnI-PZqYkACQQ5wfxRbGP-9U0HH2lX7fK7nb7U7Ya2TdtLAnjCDg_ENAS_AgmCf0FbQ_O8XpjyTmt5GVALT4dJ1I6dcTh7IJqIOQ-3oJJ_ObqLcSUsaPkuv_psqog%3D%3D)** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c317ee5672b14193953c638bfbe2eb13&_e=gaXNVEXguwVIA3_AHkz8mwnaiv6xMQlSq_v9m8GpmYi4OF42sNNwh6P6339oTppk0XDFzd87ilp5W5qOXvszEpgKLvOBhWi_gSu98tgqN_1UgP3XBeSsXjfhmVqR2undmJW-Zuj6FFHX76M4FbPHPSl8g64DjN5xyDsrotuWFc08g82-YmWsTG65K-W0ZIeIftpz9plt9lTtx1RVcc-nEaOP-ZV-Us7PdKgH02c_DNIb5etAfuvzcGXMlEaOcEcAS89lmg-hu3HG0mpLsGDGYvEVQIBNLXYwZe0DaaxIOue4lbw7ACpJv9XrUFlk0xKOVOhblrMuCijfOFW1OcpcOo64pDp_BpqDCBki_NeY0-RXgn7xEvM8_2U0x8dFvM_gqEyZZUP4lD83KBRLY9KA9g%3D%3D)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...**life in prison** could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[**I'm turning to you for help.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c317ee5672b14193953c638bfbe2eb13&_e=gaXNVEXguwVIA3_AHkz8mwnaiv6xMQlSq_v9m8GpmYi4OF42sNNwh6P6339oTppk0XDFzd87ilp5W5qOXvszEpgKLvOBhWi_gSu98tgqN_1UgP3XBeSsXjfhmVqR2undmJW-Zuj6FFHX76M4FbPHPSl8g64DjN5xyDsrotuWFc08g82-YmWsTG65K-W0ZIeIftpz9plt9lTtx1RVcc-nEaOP-ZV-Us7PdKgH02c_DNIb5etAfuvzcGXMlEaOcEcAAwOFko9tNSMdNqz5YRCw4ItIBj76OR1jRpoA03cC08B13DDUjdS9kw55POiAHG-VZHQzM5X-Y3_s3qq5LttPZwG0WN6D3hp4koviK9_hjxzeBsVHpyLxaXAPW7Y0m2yBds2sjoLEqAhSge1cY0mdWQ%3D%3D)** James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. **He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.** When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson** , **the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families - at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... **[**Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c317ee5672b14193953c638bfbe2eb13&_e=gaXNVEXguwVIA3_AHkz8mwnaiv6xMQlSq_v9m8GpmYi4OF42sNNwh6P6339oTppk0XDFzd87ilp5W5qOXvszEpgKLvOBhWi_gSu98tgqN_1UgP3XBeSsXjfhmVqR2undmJW-Zuj6FFHX76M4FbPHPSl8g64DjN5xyDsrotuWFc08g82-YmWsTG65K-W0ZIeIftpz9plt9lTtx1RVcc-nEaOP-ZV-Us7PdKgH02c_DNIb5etAfuvzcGXMlEaOcEcAuyWGx_rYOxKpK5LBgRNpsHqk3vHvTfTXcTXrbS5MQb9_Qzh9e__UnmSF0jYNDYl_SppPJtdDO3zZy6dxZj9IwhCEePsg6T_oiMSYHAhRiwJQzDpLr89Aw3v23zBfF1QkTWrENLSLGQM_BRpr9LAAtA%3D%3D)** His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. **[**So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c317ee5672b14193953c638bfbe2eb13&_e=gaXNVEXguwVIA3_AHkz8mwnaiv6xMQlSq_v9m8GpmYi4OF42sNNwh6P6339oTppk0XDFzd87ilp5W5qOXvszEpgKLvOBhWi_gSu98tgqN_1UgP3XBeSsXjfhmVqR2undmJW-Zuj6FFHX76M4FbPHPSl8g64DjN5xyDsrotuWFc08g82-YmWsTG65K-W0ZIeIftpz9plt9lTtx1RVcc-nEaOP-ZV-Us7PdKgH02c_DNIb5etAfuvzcGXMlEaOcEcAasaVHmOPCM94k5at7XN6aig25P1PM1gW-OO6rWml4kKBw2pZd-3o-jWgqhtoRE4kKZ0W52sBXWgu-nMmfoiXffmgPI8luR0nLSJDeGsk9Bj_Nu2Ng89j_mFfDOV0WFTG_eyfYA0o-rz5GehBv7wtAA%3D%3D)** LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's **[**your $35 gift**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c317ee5672b14193953c638bfbe2eb13&_e=gaXNVEXguwVIA3_AHkz8mwnaiv6xMQlSq_v9m8GpmYi4OF42sNNwh6P6339oTppk0XDFzd87ilp5W5qOXvszEpgKLvOBhWi_gSu98tgqN_1UgP3XBeSsXjfhmVqR2undmJW-Zuj6FFHX76M4FbPHPSl8g64DjN5xyDsrotuWFc08g82-YmWsTG65K-W0ZIeIftpz9plt9lTtx1RVcc-nEaOP-ZV-Us7PdKgH02c_DNIb5etAfuvzcGXMlEaOcEcAGTF4IRTURdaa9ZiTNbU11OGhOYQO7ezSO3ih9Wr8x5W2zNNd2Nt_FKOPGKT4xZ0b1GdfgHfEzdw603nbocNAuYqAwDKaXFoNOan-Alw-4NxIL7bNNdVWm2spjyLFi1bJcN_gHcYeq1BgMohRt7CZLQ%3D%3D)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. **Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. **Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
---
|
---

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Live Like Jesus in a Changing World
body:
Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ

| | | [](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkE2LpDAQhn9NvEVMJZr2kMNA422WZRnYo0RTaiAfEstp-t8vNr33uT5PVVHv-_dz_LQ--LT-shENFRrLMSY7xsnz4NeNeF549AlHaEBxARxghMoZpcHJrkIjtFQ33TWqrTbTaFxAt3ZZlNKdtS3enFJ2At1D2ylbeXPdEQAgQGnV17Dc2r5XToISYhKCqcYGLHTUtGHB_ZyCn20itLGec6yC2Yj2g8kPBgODYfXfWFN29ukTbfjIxdW5rAyG-Ymc3IPJ4aQ4zjbu1q-JyfteMPozMuguceSzzPjC-dhxJp_Wt4rorjl5x2h9eMM5J8JETN5_f_CvP1_8f6CqGLc_fAj-6DRTzXotvX6mnxf7beBfAAAA___CDYIb)
---

Hey there Friend, ____ Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ, I am sure you are reminded of the challenge before us: how do we live out that hope in a world that seems so increasingly distant from God?

It's a question we all wrestle with, especially as we witness significant cultural shifts that oppose our biblical convictions. In times like these, we need practical wisdom, encouragement, and a clear vision for how to live as faithful followers of Christ.

[That's where This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World comes in.](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkE2LpDAQhn9NvEVMJZr2kMNA422WZRnYo0RTaiAfEstp-t8vNr33uT5PVVHv-_dz_LQ--LT-shENFRrLMSY7xsnz4NeNeF549AlHaEBxARxghMoZpcHJrkIjtFQ33TWqrTbTaFxAt3ZZlNKdtS3enFJ2At1D2ylbeXPdEQAgQGnV17Dc2r5XToISYhKCqcYGLHTUtGHB_ZyCn20itLGec6yC2Yj2g8kPBgODYfXfWFN29ukTbfjIxdW5rAyG-Ymc3IPJ4aQ4zjbu1q-JyfteMPozMuguceSzzPjC-dhxJp_Wt4rorjl5x2h9eMM5J8JETN5_f_CvP1_8f6CqGLc_fAj-6DRTzXotvX6mnxf7beBfAAAA___CDYIb)

In this powerful book, Dr. Joseph Stowell (a name you may recognize as the former president of Moody Bible Institute) offers a timely call for Christians to stop fighting battles for an earthly kingdom and instead embrace the privilege of advancing Christ's Kingdom. Drawing from Scripture and the life of Jesus, Dr. Stowell shows how we can respond to today's challenges with hope, courage, and grace.

As we interact with a culture that often feels divided and broken,_This Light of Mine_ encourages us to reflect Jesus' love and truth in a way that draws others to the Gospel--without alienating them. It encourages us to rise above the noise and shine God's light in a world desperately in need of it.

We'd love to send you an exclusive, pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_ as a thank-you for your generous gift of any amount to support the mission of _Today in the Word_. Your gift today will help us continue providing Bible-centered resources to readers across the globe.

Whether you're seeking practical advice for living out your faith in a complex world or simply need encouragement to stay steady in your walk with Christ, _This Light of Mine_ is a timely and powerful tool for your journey.

clean_body: Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ | | | Hey there Friend, Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ, I am sure you are reminded of the challenge before us: how do we live out that hope in a world that seems so increasingly distant from God? It's a question we all wrestle with, especially as we witness significant cultural shifts that oppose our biblical convictions. In times like these, we need practical wisdom, encouragement, and a clear vision for how to live as faithful followers of Christ. In this powerful book, Dr. Joseph Stowell (a name you may recognize as the former president of Moody Bible Institute) offers a timely call for Christians to stop fighting battles for an earthly kingdom and instead embrace the privilege of advancing Christ's Kingdom. Drawing from Scripture and the life of Jesus, Dr. Stowell shows how we can respond to today's challenges with hope, courage, and grace. As we interact with a culture that often feels divided and broken,This Light of Mine encourages us to reflect Jesus' love and truth in a way that draws others to the Gospel--without alienating them. It encourages us to rise above the noise and shine God's light in a world desperately in need of it. We'd love to send you an exclusive, pre-release copy of This Light of Mine as a thank-you for your generous gift of any amount to support the mission of Today in the Word. Your gift today will help us continue providing Bible-centered resources to readers across the globe. Whether you're seeking practical advice for living out your faith in a complex world or simply need encouragement to stay steady in your walk with Christ, This Light of Mine is a timely and powerful tool for your journey. Give today at this link and receive this book as a thank-you: When you give today, you not only support the mission of Today in the Word to spread the Gospel but you will also receive this transformative book that will inspire and equip you to live out your Christian faith with boldness and love. Thank you for your generosity and for being part of this important mission. With gratitude, Jamie Janosz Managing Editor, Today in the Word | The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

For many, the holiday season is a comforting time of year. But for the 200,000 people in the military spending Christmas away from home, it's a reminder of how far away their loved ones really are.
It's up to us to make sure our heroes in uniform don't feel forgotten this holiday season -- **and that 's why we're looking for 100,000 caring people like you to add a message to the USO's Holiday Thank You Wall to share joy and gratitude with our service members****.**

name: Limited Spots Left (via VPP)
subject: FWD: The Biden Family Holiday Card! 🎄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We noticed you didn’t sign our holiday card to President Biden and his family...
| We have some good news, folks:

**We noticed you didn’t sign our holiday card to President Biden and his family,_so we’ve extended the deadline until midnight TONIGHT!_**

[**There are limited spots left for top Democrats, so don’t miss out. SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241222_EMCARD_E1_T0_NS&t=6&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0) | [ADD YOUR NAME: SIGN OUR HOLIDAY CARD TO THE BIDEN FAMILY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241222_EMCARD_E1_T0_NS&t=7&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0)
---
\- - - - - Begin Forwarded Message - - - - -
Friend, it is the Biden family’s FINAL holiday season in the White House as President and First Lady.

**After a hectic year, we think a happy holiday season is exactly what the Biden family needs — and we want to make sure it is one to remember!**

_We know this card will go VIRAL!_ So if you want to reserve your spot, we need you to sign in the next HOUR!

[**⇩ ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THEIR HOLIDAY CARD NOW ⇩**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241222_EMCARD_E1_T0_NS&t=8&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241222_EMCARD_E1_T0_NS&t=9&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0)
[ADD YOUR NAME: SIGN OUR HOLIDAY CARD TO THE BIDEN FAMILY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241222_EMCARD_E1_T0_NS&t=10&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0)
---
President Biden has done __so much__ for us:

✔️ Passed a once-in-a-generation infrastructure package,
✔️ Gave Americans much-needed economic relief,
✔️ Bravely stepped down to put our country first,
✔️ _And so much more!_

**So we want to wish him a wonderful and restful holiday season — _he certainly deserves it!_**

[**We only have limited spots left, folks! Sign our holiday card to President Biden and his family while you can »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241222_EMCARD_E1_T0_NS&t=11&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0)
[ADD YOUR NAME: SIGN OUR HOLIDAY CARD TO THE BIDEN FAMILY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_family_card/?source=VPP_20241222_EMCARD_E1_T0_NS&t=12&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=18294%2E878179%2EACTzO0)

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help keep our family together for Christmas
body:
But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.

| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NDH_0q8NBRMUYDRFjMFjZw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSq6iP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLU9HVCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PR1QtMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WQGGhnr_Bc11IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NDH_0q8NBRMUYDRFjMFjZw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSq6iP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLU9HVCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PR1QtMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WQGGhnr_Bc11IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...**life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[**I'm turning to you for help.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NDH_0q8NBRMUYDRFjMFjZw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSq6iP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLU9HVCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PR1QtMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WQGGhnr_Bc11IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. **He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.** When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson** , **the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...**[**Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NDH_0q8NBRMUYDRFjMFjZw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSq6iP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLU9HVCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PR1QtMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WQGGhnr_Bc11IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. **[**So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NDH_0q8NBRMUYDRFjMFjZw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSq6iP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLU9HVCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PR1QtMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WQGGhnr_Bc11IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's **[**your $35 gift**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/NDH_0q8NBRMUYDRFjMFjZw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSq6iP0SzaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9sZWxkZi8yZjQzODMwNC03ODEzLTRjZDItOWZjYy02ODA1ZDIwYzRhYzE_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVWJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIwX0JER19MRUxERl9CV0xDRV9CREdfUkVWX1BBLU9HVCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1PR1QtMjAyNDEyMjJXA3NwY0IKZ2WQGGhnr_Bc11IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. **Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. **Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/k_jctHtkFJvkNVvNsmhTcQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
---
---

Old Glory Today
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LT7MHGqz7VzCwCg-VDlsMw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSq6iP0RhaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQub2xkZ2xvcnl0b2RheS5jb20vdW5zdWJzY3JpYmUvP2I9T2xkLUdsb3J5LVRvZGF5LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpnZZAYaGev8FzXUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sg7F4qkCep2FA28xNOSDXA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSq6iP0QmaHR0cHM6Ly9vbGRnbG9yeXRvZGF5LmNvbS9wcml2YWN5Lmh0bWxXA3NwY0IKZ2WQGGhnr_Bc11IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_

subject: UD strike looms, admin pay raises eyebrows
body:

| Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5a357f91a0&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.

Over the next two weeks, as holiday festivities (hopefully) occupy more of our readers’ time than news and opinion journalism, we at _Broad + Liberty_ will be on a reduced production schedule. If news breaks, we will surely cover it, but absent some big event, things will be quiet around here until 2025.

We hope you all enjoy a break from your own jobs and responsibilities, as well, and have a Merry Christmas, Happy Hanukkah, and a joyous and prosperous New Year.

|
---
|
### **1.[Upper Darby workers authorize strike as well-paid admins seek concessions](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=93fa0ad7b2&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Brad Vasoli_
Transport Workers Union Local 234 members working for Upper Darby Township unanimously voted Monday afternoon to authorize a strike that could start as soon as January 1.

The overwhelming majority of the roughly 115 township employees who affiliate with the TWU filled the American Legion Post 214 meeting room and followed their vote with applause and a jubilant chant.

The workers include trash collectors, electricians, mechanics, animal-control specialists, and other public-works tradesmen performing their duties under a contract expiring at year’s end. They want a new agreement holding their personal contributions to their healthcare coverage at 3.5 percent. A contract proposed by Democratic Mayor Ed Brown’s administration would require employees to contribute about three times as much.

“This is a message to the township that we’re serious about getting a fair contract for our members,” Bannon said after the vote. “Some of their proposals that they have are just unreasonable and would bring serious harm to our members’ livelihoods and to the residents of this town.”

**Why It Matters**. Some community leaders and activists have called for management to make concessions regarding their own compensation before asking labor to sacrifice.

“I’d be looking at other places to cut money to make sure our trash is picked up,” former Township Council President Brian Burke (R-At-Large) told _Broad + Liberty_ before the strike decision. [The township workers are] needed seven days a week.... Take [the money] from the CAO. Take it from Kilkenny.”

Drexel Hill resident John DeMasi, who has spearheaded numerous grassroots efforts to boost transparency and fiscal discipline in the township, agreed.

“You can’t tell a union member, ‘Sorry, there’s no money, we’re paying _ourselves_ too much,’” he said.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8c229597ba&e=b7b3eddce2)

|
---
|
### **2.[Reforming the reforms in church architecture](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0419749c57&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Thom Nickels_
While touring a number of Roman Catholic churches in Austria some time ago, I was struck by the haphazard clash of styles: magnificent Romanesque-Gothic high altars, richly appointed with frescoes and images, with an oddly shaped table plunked down in front like something dropped from The Planet of the Apes: the oh-so-simple Vatican II altar table (a/k/a Julia Child’s table).

In such historic environments, the table, however expertly crafted, looks fairly comical. While the elaborate iconography in these splendid old churches makes Julia Child’s table seem less intrusive or offensive, that’s not the case in many new Catholic churches built since the close of Vatican II — a Council called by Pope John XXIII in 1962 to renew and invigorate the Church.

**Why It Matters**. Vatican II unleashed a storm that not only affected how Catholics worship (less smells and bells, more Baptist-style services), but the buildings they worship in. Those winds of change produced a fair amount of architectural self-destruction. According to Michael Rose, author of “Ugly as Sin: Why They Changed Our Churches from Sacred Places to Meeting Spaces—and How We Can Change Them Back Again,” the catalyst for the change was a duplicitous 1978 draft statement by the U.S. Bishop’s Committee on Liturgy, entitled “Environment and Art in Catholic Worship.”

This meant plain wooden altar tables rather than marble high altars with images of saints and angels; carpeted rooms; plain glass windows; potted plants in place of traditional Catholic artwork; small and nondescript Stations of the Cross that disappear into the walls; churches in the round resembling MTV soundstages; the elimination of altar rails and sanctuary lamps. Crucifixes replaced by Baptist-style wooden crosses or geometric plus signs; the traditional baptismal font transformed into a hot tub.

Older churches, including many cathedrals, were stripped bare as high altars were removed and dismantled, and historic frescoes and icons whitewashed.

In the end, the new churches and “renovated” cathedrals had the look of conference halls or inter denominational chapels. Hundreds, maybe thousands of churches worldwide were destroyed by the architectural iconoclasts.

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=52f51a2559&e=b7b3eddce2)

# **4\. What we're reading**
For years, Republicans have been saying that Joe Biden’s mental acuity was in steep decline. For years, we were told we were lying, selectively editing, or “playing politics.” The June debate showed which side was telling the truth, but now that the election is in the rear-view mirror, the Democrats are finally, little by little, coming clean about the deception that ran through the Biden administration. _The New York Times_ this week has [a living eulogy for the man](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eeb821a70d&e=b7b3eddce2) as he limps quietly toward the exit. _The Wall Street Journal_ has a piece detailing [the decline that hampered the president](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=25421735ab&e=b7b3eddce2) almost from the beginning. And at _National Review_ , Jeff Blehar explains [the travesty of this quasi-coup](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c9bceccc6b&e=b7b3eddce2) foisted upon the American people. Biden is leaving, but this dishonesty requires greater investigation.********
---

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | | | | | | Good morning and welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. Over the next two weeks, as holiday festivities (hopefully) occupy more of our readers’ time than news and opinion journalism, we at Broad + Liberty will be on a reduced production schedule. If news breaks, we will surely cover it, but absent some big event, things will be quiet around here until 2025. We hope you all enjoy a break from your own jobs and responsibilities, as well, and have a Merry Christmas, Happy Hanukkah, and a joyous and prosperous New Year. | | 1. By Brad Vasoli Transport Workers Union Local 234 members working for Upper Darby Township unanimously voted Monday afternoon to authorize a strike that could start as soon as January 1. The overwhelming majority of the roughly 115 township employees who affiliate with the TWU filled the American Legion Post 214 meeting room and followed their vote with applause and a jubilant chant. The workers include trash collectors, electricians, mechanics, animal-control specialists, and other public-works tradesmen performing their duties under a contract expiring at year’s end. They want a new agreement holding their personal contributions to their healthcare coverage at 3.5 percent. A contract proposed by Democratic Mayor Ed Brown’s administration would require employees to contribute about three times as much. “This is a message to the township that we’re serious about getting a fair contract for our members,” Bannon said after the vote. “Some of their proposals that they have are just unreasonable and would bring serious harm to our members’ livelihoods and to the residents of this town.” Why It Matters. Some community leaders and activists have called for management to make concessions regarding their own compensation before asking labor to sacrifice. “I’d be looking at other places to cut money to make sure our trash is picked up,” former Township Council President Brian Burke (R-At-Large) told Broad + Liberty before the strike decision. [The township workers are] needed seven days a week.... Take [the money] from the CAO. Take it from Kilkenny.” Drexel Hill resident John DeMasi, who has spearheaded numerous grassroots efforts to boost transparency and fiscal discipline in the township, agreed. “You can’t tell a union member, ‘Sorry, there’s no money, we’re paying ourselves too much,’” he said. | | 2. By Thom Nickels While touring a number of Roman Catholic churches in Austria some time ago, I was struck by the haphazard clash of styles: magnificent Romanesque-Gothic high altars, richly appointed with frescoes and images, with an oddly shaped table plunked down in front like something dropped from The Planet of the Apes: the oh-so-simple Vatican II altar table (a/k/a Julia Child’s table). In such historic environments, the table, however expertly crafted, looks fairly comical. While the elaborate iconography in these splendid old churches makes Julia Child’s table seem less intrusive or offensive, that’s not the case in many new Catholic churches built since the close of Vatican II — a Council called by Pope John XXIII in 1962 to renew and invigorate the Church. Why It Matters. Vatican II unleashed a storm that not only affected how Catholics worship (less smells and bells, more Baptist-style services), but the buildings they worship in. Those winds of change produced a fair amount of architectural self-destruction. According to Michael Rose, author of “Ugly as Sin: Why They Changed Our Churches from Sacred Places to Meeting Spaces—and How We Can Change Them Back Again,” the catalyst for the change was a duplicitous 1978 draft statement by the U.S. Bishop’s Committee on Liturgy, entitled “Environment and Art in Catholic Worship.” This meant plain wooden altar tables rather than marble high altars with images of saints and angels; carpeted rooms; plain glass windows; potted plants in place of traditional Catholic artwork; small and nondescript Stations of the Cross that disappear into the walls; churches in the round resembling MTV soundstages; the elimination of altar rails and sanctuary lamps. Crucifixes replaced by Baptist-style wooden crosses or geometric plus signs; the traditional baptismal font transformed into a hot tub. Older churches, including many cathedrals, were stripped bare as high altars were removed and dismantled, and historic frescoes and icons whitewashed. In the end, the new churches and “renovated” cathedrals had the look of conference halls or inter denominational chapels. Hundreds, maybe thousands of churches worldwide were destroyed by the architectural iconoclasts. | | | 3\. Lightning Round | | 4\. What we're reading For years, Republicans have been saying that Joe Biden’s mental acuity was in steep decline. For years, we were told we were lying, selectively editing, or “playing politics.” The June debate showed which side was telling the truth, but now that the election is in the rear-view mirror, the Democrats are finally, little by little, coming clean about the deception that ran through the Biden administration. The New York Times this week has as he limps quietly toward the exit. The Wall Street Journal has a piece detailing almost from the beginning. And at National Review , Jeff Blehar explains foisted upon the American people. Biden is leaving, but this dishonesty requires greater investigation.**** | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help keep our family together for Christmas
body:
Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=20670b2fd4f14fe09d640ea5adef5c14&_e=ovnkxarwxTzPJzU13sf0n3xlhOBvCuvs5nkZOo0DMhEcsJdCtwUTfm4XNOj0z2P6hNTrS_IT34s76MZ8Gt4BGOX8mM9x3zKKjWgXkRWBB6RrwByypmC7HgRNjrIEq5Z1cDHfmMRPS_BTeLnyaOpHpzKXwHUsS2PJVc38CR_EsdB4GP2sr6_cdMLQphrd0Y9OfABeRkkReeVTnLXAO3pqCqr84KQyu3L-zkSFoSHt9qGCj1CX9HhmN_bNkZLELWyloMMBPXFkl1qBensiDomA2V8fPYUZlxQJVtNNam90UgtwxxahthNk6VtFO6zaEIASmEtQxn0C0dZ-h_RKHThQVB24K8jPgkQkQeElq3gZjwB_rn7obj7QLNV6q5RajdTBPcT8yPldYssZkplvEpSIgg%3D%3D)** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=20670b2fd4f14fe09d640ea5adef5c14&_e=ovnkxarwxTzPJzU13sf0n3xlhOBvCuvs5nkZOo0DMhEcsJdCtwUTfm4XNOj0z2P6hNTrS_IT34s76MZ8Gt4BGOX8mM9x3zKKjWgXkRWBB6RrwByypmC7HgRNjrIEq5Z1cDHfmMRPS_BTeLnyaOpHpzKXwHUsS2PJVc38CR_EsdB4GP2sr6_cdMLQphrd0Y9OfABeRkkReeVTnLXAO3pqCqr84KQyu3L-zkSFoSHt9qGCj1CX9HhmN_bNkZLELWylPYzsPD6_ffYThruU7q6FA5xVQ7yNMtgG537F-iBBU1cmXTcNJqDnLHrnRi2_8KB_xcg2MjmU-XXbhpUQvB0jj-eUjt4T09eRsBM7QifYgTqaNGoAlGW7uRqQZrjaI-P_8Wr0DA8F_8gF5wnCuA3UxA%3D%3D)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...**life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[**I'm turning to you for help.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=20670b2fd4f14fe09d640ea5adef5c14&_e=ovnkxarwxTzPJzU13sf0n3xlhOBvCuvs5nkZOo0DMhEcsJdCtwUTfm4XNOj0z2P6hNTrS_IT34s76MZ8Gt4BGOX8mM9x3zKKjWgXkRWBB6RrwByypmC7HgRNjrIEq5Z1cDHfmMRPS_BTeLnyaOpHpzKXwHUsS2PJVc38CR_EsdB4GP2sr6_cdMLQphrd0Y9OfABeRkkReeVTnLXAO3pqCqr84KQyu3L-zkSFoSHt9qGCj1CX9HhmN_bNkZLELWylHe_emTIeJ_Maope7hoxk72E_1RNikVVUoXdF2CVwLhc0hA6LqGxVztSb76uIWsosRpA5FraCp71c_xfGs1RX9qbqbtdYt46GXdRCRO04CDJbBiewukXS1IBD4iY-YppxCeNxiWr3Mc5g7sxUMftUGw%3D%3D)** James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. **He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.** When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson** , **the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...**[**Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=20670b2fd4f14fe09d640ea5adef5c14&_e=ovnkxarwxTzPJzU13sf0n3xlhOBvCuvs5nkZOo0DMhEcsJdCtwUTfm4XNOj0z2P6hNTrS_IT34s76MZ8Gt4BGOX8mM9x3zKKjWgXkRWBB6RrwByypmC7HgRNjrIEq5Z1cDHfmMRPS_BTeLnyaOpHpzKXwHUsS2PJVc38CR_EsdB4GP2sr6_cdMLQphrd0Y9OfABeRkkReeVTnLXAO3pqCqr84KQyu3L-zkSFoSHt9qGCj1CX9HhmN_bNkZLELWylayFNQd2T87IurnJ6Djvt8RjrzvNoX0k59S12p9F5BTeNoxsThmvPS7-jXVM_3PkhjYMi8w6dJ3AiHWydvAeNp69pmYoaVByaV7VRhdh5y2-SROyoLx3TYY_i1oPis1TjHnBlyfjMkZeOFGa5Bd4GTw%3D%3D)** His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. **[**So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=20670b2fd4f14fe09d640ea5adef5c14&_e=ovnkxarwxTzPJzU13sf0n3xlhOBvCuvs5nkZOo0DMhEcsJdCtwUTfm4XNOj0z2P6hNTrS_IT34s76MZ8Gt4BGOX8mM9x3zKKjWgXkRWBB6RrwByypmC7HgRNjrIEq5Z1cDHfmMRPS_BTeLnyaOpHpzKXwHUsS2PJVc38CR_EsdB4GP2sr6_cdMLQphrd0Y9OfABeRkkReeVTnLXAO3pqCqr84KQyu3L-zkSFoSHt9qGCj1CX9HhmN_bNkZLELWyl5r3dlj5fBgBs-hj0j4Zocc6iKaiUlCq-2naiMRPr5gXPIU6WrvkW3uzd6hPBqE5Wkx0EDgMs63747l4DZYHjozONZcjlxpB2xdEBCQI-ozS5ehXg4M8vnoPZajOKOnjrtNC_cTltLutZ2P5zxAp8MA%3D%3D)** LELDF is a non-profit organization. clean_body: Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. | | Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...life in prison could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson , the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! This can't be his last Christmas with us. Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF. Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

Friend, Elon and Vivek are starting a Department of Government Efficiency podcast!

What better way to help hold the government accountable than to bring the public along to see all of the wasteful spending, unnecessary regulations and fraud that goes on.

Well, that’s what Elon and Vivek’s new podcast is all about. Call it DOGEcast if you will.
Friend, pinch me, I’m dreaming. Elon + Vivek are teaming up for a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME project and you’ve got a chance to be part of history.
**[**Do you plan to be a loyal viewer?**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkTGP3CAQhX8N7ljB4LPZwkUky1KKS3NFSsTC2B7JGAT49u9HbO7aSGkf0vfeN_x-N--WDjq3XzbgRKWYXIwLZl-TddzHDfmJT56iNyCg5xI4gJGdn95A6lV3OMlR9VrLt7vo9knf7-geQowCtV6Fl-LhnRul7P1jHO-qo6lxJADIXo4w3lCg65UWOKyr0OBZL67kbcUbnYU8FhdjSvGgSq7cYt66Y9prTYWpHwwWBktBd2W8PenM6G8uBgbLjsexUkaerGOwNBFnS_0kfGLebZNK0beIY-DJNpJarhpMiVd2yNScciwJXaVzYzC0p4CersDUvFuOwdLxlTsbkqXtZGr-khMGhRD6TfF9Nf8oN635LyOeFc_aer-j6piaf3588O-LMRhyc81tkpprvpDBYENNsVCl-BrwSuL1QnV58ulJx0FlGFkvtja6Xair__HXnxP8CQAA___0HrVn)**

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Warrior Money Episode 6
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Listen/Watch Warrior Money Episode 6
Warrior Money , hosted on Yahoo Finance by Patrick Murphy and Dan Kunze - A show that supports and offers financial advice to the veteran community.
Peter,
Whether you're driving, working out, or preparing for the upcoming holiday, we hope you can tune into our new Yahoo Finance Warrior Money podcast. You can find it below & always anywhere you get your podcasts including YouTube, Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and more.
This week's episode features John Edelman of Edelman PR to discuss the firm's 2024 Veterans' Well-Being Survey. In our discussion, we discuss the status of veterans' issues including mental health, employment, and public perception. Mr. Edelman is the Edelman PR's Managing Director of Global Engagement and Corporate Responsibility.
Hope you can tune in!
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/1ss9lXm3E8HxkZ4xgaqZ58?si=aca5c5afcb5d4b58
YouTube: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLx28zU8ctIRq4s21MFggvp9vDtChW2cM4&si=ebgQsbMI2qSU-UB4
Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/warrior-money/id1779749359
Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Undersecretary of the Army
Former Congressman

name: Updates - via Senate GOP
subject: ACTION NEEDED - Disbar Tish James!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
She’s still trying to BANKRUPT President Trump.

Friend,

The American people voted overwhelmingly to REJECT the Democrats' witch hunts and sham prosecutions when they elected Donald J. Trump as the next President of the United States - _AND_ ushered in Republican majorities in both the House and Senate.

But radical New York Attorney General Tish James doesn't care...

**[She just announced that she will __STILL__ attempt to collect the tyrannical fine of nearly HALF A BILLION DOLLARS that was wrongfully imposed on President Trump! ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RHCRQ2otuKoUzuObnTE4hQ~~/AARclAA~~)**
_**[New York AG will continue to pursue $454 million civil fraud judgment against Trump](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RHCRQ2otuKoUzuObnTE4hQ~~/AARclAA~~)**_**[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/go-YtnUwN-25-2dZK75I4g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSrpGP0RTaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9ucnNjL21hdGNoLWNvbW1pdG1lbnQtcnMtaGYvP3JlY3VycmluZz10cnVlJmFtdHBvc2l0aW9uPTRXA3NwY0IKZ2WoJmhnsWIDMFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

_[[Source: ABC News]](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RHCRQ2otuKoUzuObnTE4hQ~~/AARclAA~~)_
This is the same radical AG who threatened to SEIZE President Trump's bank accounts and his iconic home of Trump Tower if he didn't pay this absolute shakedown!
__What will she try to do next, seize the White House?__
Far-Left extremists like Tish James who have abused the legal system to target their political opponents should not be allowed to practice law in America _ever_ again.

name: Firecracker Mini OTF
subject: Switchblade that attaches to your car keys (opening mail/packages easier too)
body:
This is one of my favorite knives to date...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19450/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/4a71a5f1d73a47f11fab8413ea289e21705772ca). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

| | This is one of my favorite knives to date.

I own a ton of expensive hunting knives and OTF blades, but truly nothing has been more convenient that this [car keys switchblade.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19450/6374453/0370596ba6806772371a15cb3627a88eb0b20e64/4a71a5f1d73a47f11fab8413ea289e21705772ca)

It's always with me on the go, where my car keys are is where my concealed switch is too, this compact American designed knife, is called _**"The Firecracker" - and was initially launched for a 4th of July promotion.**_

Due to the growing response for this line of switchblades, they restocked and making them available again year-round.

These are going viral because there's nothing that [fits so flush on a keychain while having the OTF ejectable switch feature in a knife](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19450/6374453/0370596ba6806772371a15cb3627a88eb0b20e64/4a71a5f1d73a47f11fab8413ea289e21705772ca) on the go.

This is mobile convenience of switchblade knife perfect for easy daily tasks like opening mail/packages.

I find my car keys are always on me more often than an edc knife, so combining all in one place just makes my life easier being able to carry this tool so easily.

Doesn't get in your way only brings value and handiness to your life.

Get the Compact switchblade safely sits your pocket along with your car or truck keys.

**[Claim Your Car Keys Firecracker Switchblades Here>>>](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19450/6374453/0370596ba6806772371a15cb3627a88eb0b20e64/4a71a5f1d73a47f11fab8413ea289e21705772ca)**

name: Marina
subject: You’ve been doing the hard work of democracy each and every day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
I want to say thank you
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99113324/518886540/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjMzFmMDY3LTc1YzAtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mp8FD3lUQ0G4gRyboAkMoAWl5QDiZQ6Xb0OkSJ-JSdI=&emci=982fb03f-1cbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=ac31f067-75c0-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=8431045)
---

I want to say thank you, Peter. Our movement is rooted in the belief that democracy should be of the people, by the people, and for the people — and as a member of this grassroots team, you’ve been doing the hard work of democracy each and every day. Together this year, we...
* Elected 116 Democracy Defenders — victories that will help create and protect fair electoral maps for future elections.
* Broke a Republican supermajority in the Wisconsin Senate and flipped seats in the Assembly, creating a path to win majorities in 2026.
* Protected a key state supreme court seat in North Carolina, re-electing Justice Allison Riggs by just over 700 votes.
* Defeated ideological extremists to win seats on the Michigan Supreme Court, which will help protect a fair electoral system in this critical battleground state.
* Flipped key seats blue by electing candidates like Floyd Griffin, who was elected to Georgia’s state house, and Patty Kim, who won a state senate seat in Pennsylvania.

_... and more_. The work goes on in 2025, with critical elections in states like Virginia, Wisconsin, and Pennsylvania — starting on _January 7_ (!) with special elections that will decide control of the Virginia Senate and House of Delegates. No matter what challenges are thrown our way in the year to come, I know that we’ll keep pushing, keep organizing, and keep proving that democracy isn't just a buzzword — it's a living, breathing force driven by people like you. Onward, Marina Marina Jenkins
Executive Director of the NDRC | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99113325/518886546/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TY2024_email_20241222-NDRC-Tier1-TY2024_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241222-NDRC-Tier1-TY2024_&utm_campaign=TY2024&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFjMzFmMDY3LTc1YzAtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mp8FD3lUQ0G4gRyboAkMoAWl5QDiZQ6Xb0OkSJ-JSdI=)

name: Trying to reach you, Peter  [DOTL]
subject: Jack Smith’s report could be hidden from the public forever!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
You can prevent this if you act fast

|
---
**Peter, this is an EMERGENCY:** We have _weeks_ before all of Jack Smith’s investigations into Trump’s crimes could be hidden from the public forever.
