name: Riley Gaines
subject: We can’t retreat into our homes
body:
Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth.| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki4ddkotk0Ni0AEkER_sKlsjZHlB6otVI7yTan03V3Ps0ORIotjREQRFnBiC6_jarUMRANeQBoctudE90_BV7ZMDXWAiCbYMwWe9y5awv8N-ZYnUJNK6uKKgENoQH2XbLQ6cSfOKEIa8T-q238VZKRpWw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki43gGjB2HKHb1cS76kmY_WIwBksN-Sm1r4YQhbNitiNyCKLiJbk7Mur8vqBoOxWYXWFeAIX8AeUeHA3H5hDxek-V8-SkR0kWZqOYMJDqBaoe2ZMuczsZUWsPGVD9-tYp1WGX9QbT1JmGA1l_cRI5c0ug%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki4e9No4VKw_-tq55gTSqxTh931nUE4CPbyTDI8CffZWFDaIw0TbXWG3hw6GZ9B1ZU6QnzqahNnCEIQ4eGblirB0ZV-SxfZs3gB4vNs1mYxoGMpWskKLtXYpU0VM-J4gMIz16YmqcE9-d8C16hcvP1gQw%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki4H5TbIi-HHXIzLa7SbBRvPfkDIY3J3siEVAQUQaMJt4FrWV3gL6nBT4Yn2VfKxRTPZULM8qC8-BzbC60zVY1e4SAILOFwB8n5pqJk90TjkET5z_KR-G5BGSLO_1N6ESXeIklEt-eZY8UJ1bp3J1IO5w%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki4hd_L9jtF854QBJ-xVocShnT7MW5htHNnyo-AJS5cJg5Ua6IaPvS3SCr07Y6InIfVGRNiTxLhwX8MzpTjZtjGIQfjd3jXXndP5bCAXnmRwkHUyQ71kjoxsqkbCp8NyQJ9n5n6KroqlsqSR-tsRf95OQ%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki4Gi1jOYkWHB411y8KMow_sjQSmAoNGtngw-JzC8GGPniIA-SMBlpzoGAvutfwcvrMFOdKZ3kgmVLpBTucxt2Iwmx_c5rAhh_V8J1g-2VEBfZa0R2BjbqI2pri_Q5JZfJuv-CQOPsFimDlbSAuB8xY2w%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki4sTF1Awj9pGhzVYR9TT1_fku9i2GTr_-UGOE0QerMzMbSLUPVE0kyb19jmj4VyvQ0s-rdg0p7mB5e9Bf2rZ70OQ12OjoORM9kNcCyfMy9vSAQjs9E2qOzVTQrMQyP-4JYlryWujKwFP8x1V9O5ZHVfw%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki4CFznacgxLEOx37vSuCZcsQnTQSUdKvZUEIIPoB7rbc1LAQtCNm6FzXL2_tK5DDMNkGMqmqJe722L87lJ-pZD1AhoPpU6MKOKy8uavu53Hql9AITknyVNYBN12RmlbqmWA72VinwxgsXcTdt9QpT_5Q%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki4I4TtNtyhEikZwjVMyLauvZRY0xpK7Fc8Om4_cS1k0LRMV1e31t4i6ReWkM8M9mx0LFgAyCqPEUom67MY7_ZgwZfH1gGw4xwC688QE8lTXNpqhJTwcLBf6ApTFErROyPvQDl3XIUrbC6sEDhTEhAUkA%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1648c238ead24552ae0d5b209349ebc4&_e=7-Yln5b5-_iBugoW5tiQZDM4DyOfXLig6Q3_PkJfaBwJzkflsTooRZPFaWU-vvEHrXiUZQjG9UlCYP-Lz4-LVZijcW0FCqEBE4F4LzXrWvvAdDcBSN0FuaxIOgcCoPxcqT3l1ya5E6nygkH1ILx3JwGiDOq4JQPOmiayQEsCPH7HH5jnLYO8UkAxKrNlgj3_Mhs4-fFFbvV8pAc7pPsr5i-20e-PuBax0EzYHX5s39qkYo-aalACRDop1OY_Tki4aSoDGsVQQWXDUPnV0cLzavWlg-Fja-6WAHuItbsFeGTbveyIUWGUpS8kLgE2sqgybITWu60sTTK-6PXYe_cPLD4BiEeAPYw-t9Cy2K4BStEQn3rzoXYl9c_N6XcvR7stbeTOpoRYee7UQe_E4wPSkQ%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,

clean_body: Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth.| | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. name: Amazon Labor Union via Justice Democrats
subject: We’re on strike
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter, my name is Connor
Spence, and I am the president of Amazon Labor Union IBT Local 1. Right
now, my union is on strike.

We won our union election more than 2 1⁄2 years ago, and Amazon has refused
to come to the table and bargain with us. We gave them a deadline to meet
us, in accordance with our legal rights, and they refused. So we have no
choice but to go on strike.

We know that a strike at a place like Amazon is a big deal―especially with
the holidays around the corner. So I want you to hear this directly from
me: Amazon only speaks one language, and that’s money. We know this
because the holidays are the busiest time in Amazon warehouses, and we’ve
seen that they will work us to the bone for an extra buck. This is the
time of year when the most workers are injured.

If they think we’re disposable, let’s see them handle the holiday rush
without us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241222-alu?refcode=em20241222-36256&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36256_1203867_d6YvPW&akid=36256%2E1203867%2Ed6YvPW ]Amazon Labor Union depends on the support of our allies like Justice
Democrats. Can you split a donation with us to support striking Amazon
workers?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241222-alu?refcode=em20241222-36256&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36256_1203867_d6YvPW&akid=36256%2E1203867%2Ed6YvPW ]Contribute

I want to be clear: We are not calling for a boycott at this point. We
want to reserve that tactic as an escalation if we need to squeeze Amazon
further down the road, and it works best when we can get the boycott to
start all at once.

But if you have shopped on Amazon this season, and thinking about the
conditions inside the warehouses and delivery trucks that get your orders
to you on time makes you feel bad, support our union.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241222-alu?refcode=em20241222-36256&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36256_1203867_d6YvPW&akid=36256%2E1203867%2Ed6YvPW ]I want to thank Justice Democrats for giving me the chance to reach
you directly. Please, split a donation to support Amazon Labor Union
today!

In solidarity,

Connor Spence
President
Amazon Labor Union, IBT Local 1

[23]Photo of Connor Spence

P.S. If you can’t donate (or if you already have), please share this
message far and wide. Forward it to your friends, share our posts on
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140538?t=1002&akid=36256%2E1203867%2Ed6YvPW ]Instagram, it all helps.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241222-36256-footer&t=1003&refcode2=36256_1203867_d6YvPW&akid=36256%2E1203867%2Ed6YvPW

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=36256%2E1203867%2Ed6YvPW

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
P.O. Box 910 Knoxville, TN 37901
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: I expected bad — not this bad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P

I expected that going into December, but **I had no idea it was going to be _this_ bad. ** I’ve got to do anything I can to turn this around. name: Tina Kotek
subject: Every year, we see the effects of climate change worsen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
The cost of doing nothing is too high. |
#
---
Peter, Every year, we see the effects of climate change worsen in our state. From wildfires to drought to heat domes and more — the consequences of going too slow to combat the climate crisis are too high to bear. That’s why I recently called for more than **$90 million dollars** in my recommended budget to invest in renewable energy, strengthen protections of our water and air, and respond to the impacts of the changing climate. Without urgent, comprehensive, and significant action to address climate change, we’re only going to see more extreme weather and destruction of our natural resources. [_**I need you on my side to fight back against climate change. Can I count on you to stand with me and add your name to this effort?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99118114/518898249/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDQyNzVjZi03Y2MwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89ZAyH82c3Feg2TGJIY83Al_UaFB8kTvmMkdg3i6J_Q=&emci=f8b71bc6-dcbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=b04275cf-7cc0-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=15353729) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99118115/518898250/12476288?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20241222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDQyNzVjZi03Y2MwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89ZAyH82c3Feg2TGJIY83Al_UaFB8kTvmMkdg3i6J_Q=&emci=f8b71bc6-dcbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=b04275cf-7cc0-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=15353729)

name: Congressman-elect Troy Downing
subject: Take a moment to reaffirm your support!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Can you show your support before the 119th Congress?

| | | Peter, it’s Troy.

I have a quick request: _**Will you reaffirm your support for me before the New Year and the start of the new Congress?**_

If I’m going to succeed in achieving the America First agenda in Congress, I need to go in with the wind at my back. We’re at a crossroads in our country, and our path in Congress will determine this Nation's future.

I’m confident that our conservative agenda will lead us to success, but I must show the rest of Congress that the people are united with me. Please take a moment to reaffirm your support.
---

---
| | Thanks for all that you do,

| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Dec 22
---

---

If we have learned one thing over the past decade, (over the last week alone?) it is that corporate and dark money influence has desecrated our politics and undermined the very purpose of a government that exists by, of, and for the people. On January 20th, Donald Trump will be inaugurated as the 47th president of the United States of America. As we reflect on how we got here, again, I am eager to share with you _The Candidate_ , a feature length documentary on my two runs for U.S. Congress. **Let 's ~~Address~~ Stream This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zPcOB4ZipE94SLBdkqBKUh5Id1HjqeFIGIeb4DRmkfk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153470725)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae8326ca-d108-447a-8b54-4951435224f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## When Is The Event & How Do I Get My Ticket?
The Candidate Screening is Thursday, January 16th at 8pm CST
Get Your Ticket: [https://kinema.com/events/the-candidate-xkxnrk](https://substack.com/redirect/fcac206e-daca-403a-bdc8-eadc0f37725a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The screening will be followed by an Instagram Live at 9:30pm CST with yours truly Qasim Rashid, Lamorne Morris (Emmy Award winning actor, and The Candidate Producer), and Jack Newell (Award winning film director, and The Candidate Director).
## What Is The Candidate?
_**The Candidate**_ documents progressive democrat Qasim Rashid as he battles xenophobia, covid, and corporate interests in two different Congressional races against ~~corporate bought~~ well-funded incumbents; first against a Virginia Republican in 2020, and in 2024 against an Illinois Democrat.
**Starring:** Qasim Rashid
**Produced by:** Lamorne Morris
**Directed by:** Jack C. Newell
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/06d8e0be-4e09-47f3-af84-1d6d7bb80ce4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## A Final Note
I would love nothing more than every person who reads this to attend the virtual screening, and then join us at [www.instagram.com/qasimrashid](https://substack.com/redirect/df330cd4-a855-4511-9541-3342364cad96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for an Instagram Live afterwards to ask your questions, share your thoughts, and watch Jack and Lamorne poke fun at me. We've poured our hearts and souls into this project, and we are so excited to share it with you.
I firmly believe that we can build a better politics for all people in this country, but it must come from a place of meaningful justice and accountability. Let's get started by activating, organizing, and uniting on a collective vision to build that more perfect Union we all deserve.
[Reserve your ticket](https://substack.com/redirect/fcac206e-daca-403a-bdc8-eadc0f37725a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and I look forward to seeing you on January 16th at 8pm CST!
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: a quick note before the holidays
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)

Friend — I had a few minutes of spare time to send a note your way before the holidays.
My team wanted me to remind you that we are just a week away from our final FEC deadline of 2024. But I thought it would be better to remind you what exactly it is we’re fighting for:
An economy that works for the working class of this country, where everybody gets the healthcare, housing, and education they deserve.
A livable, carbon-free future with clean energy, air, and water for the generations to come.
A US foreign policy that pursues true peace and justice over more wars and conflict.
A democracy that includes everyone and represents the interests of the majority of Americans and not just the wealthy few.
And the list goes on, Friend.
The only way we can fight for those ideas — ideas that could transform our communities and our nation for all of us — is to build a real grassroots movement that is engaged in that fight at all levels.
**[Make a contribution to our campaign today and become a sustaining part of our movement. Help us set the agenda and build the grassroots support we need to win.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec24.I7B4JF&refcode=em241222-1-15&t=2&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-dec24.Hr3IRy&refcode=em241222-1-15&t=21&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-dec24.bBCgWF&refcode=em241222-1-15&t=22&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-dec24.waqK5S&refcode=em241222-1-15&t=23&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-dec24.WLN7kc&refcode=em241222-1-15&t=24&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-dec24.y9LEzT&refcode=em241222-1-15&t=25&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-dec24.2ltF57&refcode=em241222-1-15&t=26&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**
---
****
I hope everyone enjoys the holidays this week and takes some time to relax with family and friends. I appreciate your support as we march forward into the future.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=29&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=1422_791427_ziLeBZ&akid=1422%2E791427%2EziLeBZ)**.
Ilhan for Congress

Washington D.C., 20033

__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

name: Roger Lau (via Democrats.org)
subject: You’re not alone
body:
---
Hi Derek, My name is Roger Lau, and I’m the Deputy Executive Director here at the DNC. It’s my job to help guide the Party’s long-term strategy, and in a minute, I’m going to ask if you can [**make an investment in our work.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241221_2409_fr&refcode2=2470_22930333_rZDeTm&akid=2470%2E22930333%2ErZDeTm) But first, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain how your support makes a difference — especially right now. Here’s the truth: Millions of people voted against Trump and his allies’ Project 2025 agenda. Millions of people volunteered their time, knocked on doors, and made phone calls this year. Millions of people chipped in to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot. If you’re feeling burnt out and disappointed in this year’s election results, you’re certainly not alone. There are millions of us who care deeply about this country and about our friends and neighbors. We care enough to pour our time, energy, and hard-earned money into building the future we want to see. Trump and his allies would love nothing more than to see us give in to cynicism. They’re counting on all of us giving up. _We can’t do that._ That’s why I’m asking you to make a $3 contribution to the Democratic Party today. $3 to help Democrats invest in state parties and build long-term infrastructure _everywhere._ $3 to help us build the resources to win local and statewide races next year, take back Congress in the next election, and the White House in 2028. $3 to hold Trump and his allies accountable in their first 100 days in office. [**You can use these links to chip in:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241221_2409_fr&refcode2=2470_22930333_rZDeTm&akid=2470%2E22930333%2ErZDeTm) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241221_2409_fr&refcode2=2470_22930333_rZDeTm&akid=2470%2E22930333%2ErZDeTm)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241221_2409_fr&refcode2=2470_22930333_rZDeTm&akid=2470%2E22930333%2ErZDeTm)**
---
****
The work we’re doing is a massively important undertaking, and it’s one that I'm proud to do alongside supporters like you.
Thank you for everything, and more soon.
Roger
Roger Lau
Deputy Executive Director
Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

---

CNN republican Scott Jennings **[pointed the finger at his democrat colleagues](https://substack.com/redirect/309d2f39-516a-4414-918a-4c64756fbcf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for defending Biden Press Secretary Karine Jean-Pierre for lying to the American people about Joe Biden's mental capacity for years.
"It was brazen lying, they lied to us!!" Jennings snapped.
**[Watch the tense moment below:](https://substack.com/redirect/309d2f39-516a-4414-918a-4c64756fbcf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/309d2f39-516a-4414-918a-4c64756fbcf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/309d2f39-516a-4414-918a-4c64756fbcf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"For 4 years the unelected have been in charge of our country during critical moments,... The volume of people who dedicated themselves to lying to the American people,... is breathtaking!" Jennings told the panel.
The democrats on the panel took no accountability for their side's big lie, responding by questioning Donald Trump's mental fitness to lead and pointing the finger at republicans for supposedly lying in the same way.
"This man (Trump) is awake 23 hours a day, he's clearly engaged, and the American people just elected him over someone who is much younger," Jennings returned fire.
| | POLL
---
Should government officials who lied to the American people about Joe Biden's mental health be investigated?
| [Yes](https://substack..b3cCq9cUKVGwcRxgUNO46BfaMvLRqf3zQYxQ2qOfhXA?)
---
[No](https://substack..RIrNrrwC8fePKjlrDCqjVcndfCGPiiNiWA1BwjPtQmY?)
[Not sure](https://substack..Av9d4rhHO2xgwG_aSVLl1llbjSBgKiodVdvYtyq8PXE?)
A former CNN pundit, Chris Cilizza, **[issued an apology this week](https://substack.com/redirect/8844d6ae-d38b-4522-a1fe-9ef7d142527b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for shrugging off republican concerns about Biden's mental fitness while he worked at the network.
"As a reporter, I have a confession to make," Cillizza said on his YouTube channel Thursday. "I should have pushed harder earlier for more information about Joe Biden's mental and physical well-being and any signs of decline."
# It's all falling apart right now for the Democrats...
Independent journalist **[James O'Keefe confronted National Security Council Henry Appel](https://substack.com/redirect/fa82fe06-3620-4893-8851-20d40fccb07a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after he "spilt the tea" to an undercover reporter about Biden's mental competence, claiming "He's like dead..."
"You're lucky I'm not a Chinese spy!" O'Keefe told Appel as he tried to flee. But that was just the beginning of what was going to happen next...
**[Watch the street-side confrontation below:](https://substack.com/redirect/fa82fe06-3620-4893-8851-20d40fccb07a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c81c81038e7c4f18b5375e66e2b4baee&_e=d4lqY1omOr0QJ9bthhQmn7SCu_FRruTzCSzVWRNMARSXXgLlh-5Wo5qEUfcHeggf6FF9hCbpYSuekKpcW7LmEhqjF4Yr2OLJCsMOEmXwphTDfmAmRPOVLZDcTHNNLtRdhKkgLD2mMkERGUb7JMMkX0YOXGxuzHpJEv-ssYLeVErjsPET6iWpLdcY-ApFcmDRkWm5NVit2wv8QiJa8Fqd4leHcwn4YdXB4SJlZIlLV3Sx83hS6EEfPNGgqTenK_nHXdMGWgl8qu4lJdzg-7JMc0UMRnyv4zxCkcImxvPRVX6JuW4GQc7_u-KklRGBtXVgWvNqq8XURFwCnDgRqbmwKMxl7Y39XeB5r8dUEf7h0LPGUbWI60y417Ieu62IXSUyGiQ1ELsjRnEO8EzHUkK2MFyYIazVWwnBdzp1Q97C78AHVJRpbT0f68dVpFa9_GVe)
---
Dear Peter,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---

clean_body: I will continue to fight this injustice. | Dear Peter, The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections. To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up everything I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have officially APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

Friend, Each month, we give you an opportunity to support impactful nonprofit organizations doing important work in our communities. **During this holiday season, I want to uplift Brightmoor Connection in Detroit, which provides residents with healthy food, clothing, water, heat, and safe shelter.** Brightmoor Connection offers their clients the dignity of shopping through a grocery aisle, without the stigma of a traditional food pantry experience, serving 1,700 families each year, providing 80 – 100 pounds of food per monthly visit. [**This holiday season, join me in supporting Brightmoor Connection Food Pantry with a donation of $5 or more. From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Dec 21, 2024
Subject: This critical organization is on the frontlines of addressing poverty:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
When we talk about combating poverty, it’s not just through critical federal programs such as SNAP food benefits and the federal housing program. **So much important work happens right in our communities.**
The Brightmoor Connection is on the frontlines of combating poverty in our community, which sits well below 200% of the federal poverty level.
Based in the Brightmoor neighborhood of Detroit, where many historically marginalized people live, the Brightmoor Connection serves 1,700 families each year. **They offer their clients the dignity of shopping through a grocery aisle, without the stigma of a traditional food pantry experience.** People receive about 80 – 100 pounds of food per monthly visit. They can also pick up other resources like clothing, and shop by appointment. And the Brightmoor Connection provides a water station because, outrageously, thousands of residents in our community do not have access to clean water in their homes.
[**This holiday season, food pantries across the country rely on our generosity in order to serve those most in need. Will you join me in making a contribution to the Brightmoor Connection Food Pantry, an essential resource for Detroit’s community?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ0NUc10p69M2nxV_W4rFBvfToNWniLaTW63VDt7dfdaAM54HM6x0yOQWQ729DYvfpweO78ZWQQlvrqK_KqjBbKcN92N9FIMxr2vSlxuAeafIV2nwCFt3VD-WT08tIi5dtD1WvWmsgJmYG-tv-rPdOxb2e_gjbfYDj3Bn-MC_hNsYWaUjxpwPcz9RJndq96AZMPsqdZbx9AE-fZd00o2IVMbiWhOwNK-f7rgpWXewtxS9QWn0yzIZ3KFE50tJrde-3swm5-tzO4sDsjQGp1d_GP2qeUcbyTO0G1rPRryOKTpd2XRm_nqy_04G0khBiurRIpqUKzsUCohtSPCAKEaT9m0Qr1BkRmNGzBn7L_-YOc5ps-93nY7NcTcmCfOX1iuJILsUwIUpQyd6xRKUEazyVBCL3FOfwX4TDcN4BuU_SffQ/4ci/F2-i18GGSl6NwUzO5vgIJg/h4/h001.dsShWpjeUbz4srDEo-4b5z4frAMjCPpFKEAoLYYsZRQ)

_**FORWARDED MESSAGE:**_
* * *
Look, you know we loathe Ted Cruz – and we know you do too.

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Hey friend,

We know you’re tired. We are, too.

RFK Jr. has built a career on spreading dangerous conspiracy theories, attacking public health efforts, and undermining science. Now, Trump wants him to lead the Department of Health and Human Services — and we can’t afford to let that happen.

Confirming RFK Jr. would legitimize his harmful rhetoric and give him a platform to spread even more misinformation. This is someone who has fueled vaccine skepticism, undermined critical public health measures, and cozied up to extremist views.

We need to take a stand. Will you add your name to oppose RFK Jr.’s potential confirmation? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qCrUL8dFt0G2Tvvj63P8rQ2]

Team, As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. [**That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and Serve America today as we build the strongest foundation possible. Even $5 or $10 makes a big difference!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99125482/518922535/-2101623703?refcode=241222&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGU5NjIzMy04YmMwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0uca0yfuZlsedY00xUdvznhLNaML5SRqCNyYn4HP2-I=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99125483/518922536/-1451023484?refcode=241222&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGU5NjIzMy04YmMwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0uca0yfuZlsedY00xUdvznhLNaML5SRqCNyYn4HP2-I=) Thank you,

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Enough with their lies
body:
And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4ABPdBUYlM3e5uCYouyWTCgRxvOJF6UL508_tg5lYT-nNwNln2g809MXJt9_aSJdOTFFHyoavmJn54jFFBX8WWgqAVFo70-FebnVTbBJq-L2V-WorjlaG3zplitXWzb4yqMtJqjGhdn3sfIE0KF9iKDORUTftml0niZorv64H0bmA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4A3BxW_B6L6Riv46gZmOH1nwvNxvZE-Kxv5v3pstDOsYfvC8uGFc_JvRi0XcW37o16ZIAqspTKtvpBl8g3wA4KE8yYHhfay8o6yZyec8dr1QrYN8iR8bjHTEUqGeY8HqUMOReRNqlGt3sCCg4E_-YgU5mOfkpqSqrY7Bag842zNQg%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4BnZiVdoSFhWxRamB9SOEgI4ilObcDd2Tdiy3SOsxek_e-QStKUXVLDc3aPMm-H6O8oPyUcencv047LIQt3HFHx_moFXwTm6zj6YPIzy_5Kda_twJjfuCJAB60bax-BAOvAeCjKUQVvBLtBmZaZAKl25r63ZFQAAaXV9WRrDtj0gg%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4CE1p3XVoLVsNsNvWZnsm_mOIUDrxzKWiZQvQu0aYAymvGtORFJnhsQEoZ9TSL7K_FOFpHoQpdsQ9nlqcOYZCAuN0l8nxhb2PEtUEkIrUFQj3ZSqvKlNVZ_nXccUcARfES0BE_o9qzkYkMTbKV0iqI_FkorZVODJt9M2_rBahPwhA%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4DE_ZmIAK_wRrSOyxobpaHHzfQXJ1zCzRsNAkg5aW3Hz4wr3I-OhKzhFeUnWzCW8SDeKm3VtMlhrg8gmTo7O9Wczvdgt9ZYV7CgkII-lqAO55MCStAHdfNumMwk3nVCVEaanTJWiezDAJTuipcJq42wNbz3SRcLZY3jTwV6fpC6KA%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4CdkDMqMvJ_3UE8oh8LHhPz0GTWBlpvrHj6XFp5nwhlffUy3pAs7sxlYmibb785btKraoTX-M8yj1lrAUfruKp8w1w8KT-CN7maN6FJ_6mbvlGcSsndP9ayVjlrI59zqXRMCpdHjLmASUM2bP3y9LSG6Nm99MK7o49e4bZbktjzAg%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4CIe9OX5cZ3dVkQ78D7ElVLlBKrF3Ux35H2Um11psK-oGRI0QlTdhGRTy9kzi7wNDGFbIxtIXmJXXUnqfLKYfjaLumflJ5zZUZMFxps70nu5XtKFEizHsgcIyAcSDW0knJgtzzcrDvgOKJ49_qYW2qvhYdHkcntmS9mYMk_YPLI6Q%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!

**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4BPn5rlxwmzkcc08-7XwD5FaaUAW5EPXbTz6FgbDKiIqVTqL3gTxiXJbKwJbv76tS43Vo7XzAizhta5Lazsu652Mx47dnv1wY8JKffMRsCHndtzKjDQQrco5kYfpp95BevG9pWSSbhVmB-lVhj_shQ5pfjn6AlyH6-MlZ203LAT5g%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4CxvOwDAaf-H6lWeguV2dJiDVoBAXjEkc88l_G43a-97HGPURMfpSdzq39y62mIJfBGba3KaZhNRP9fQs2UntbjTqNNPoV2i_p-oaqh7FjHzQ8mMhiX-rA4DsSYrriX5OF8RxSHJZdJEV2xnxln5FN6J3DjiccMKF0HPM-dFg8Z-A%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=0509c84083104980b9822b68423138ff&_e=8LJuAAd_QeRUmvF5zrmXZSBmM9IFbSAJlgmwIA2yMK172RrMRWbvzhXL-BrPHT9ukL97NokEpzXwz7ofzhW6Zvv8lMHo14B1CuKjIMN81klsAkmr3neQXnHC1MXyG542K-sa_hStuqIvJZ5dbHbt0BOXbo4OSwv9tQ1HfRCbqzEZAmpBze0Flai9plpw1svidbvU6QuOC_NmmYxWPmjww9UuZXXlm_l0LcjxslpT_4BB-7AH209gJwR7KuCaA1bF_bgWRQZsFWos6948SCGl9bUuVU--7v10DaxMIpC_a_89nYslN0z2XBwQY4UGQvGuGVqgGwiNarZWCXBs6RURFyGgJhfNrTt4IxLHJ_PIPJssFZ9cKc47Eh3diTVI05jrjRz6OgIPdIvZohFOa1-qUQ%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

Sincerely,

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: They’ve promoted American decline for decades
body:
You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=a191952dd58148ef8977cc994b6c7771&_t=zkqGtueBZ61wA1sCnGNwTP9qwPRBV4Lr8Hw4AX72E3L6SqueFqAqks3fYgNmM9UbpxlkWq7ZpTfk1q1soH-exDrVHB4y7X-RzYfpHiQss_GggozHorXMw7Y1zIo9PpwD)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a191952dd58148ef8977cc994b6c7771&_e=k1AowE6ec44IJGFMlgD73pBEh6nJ_TdLLMXA6-M9P3A2qcNo1PgN8TnaoRTPleRWNtAvv9I0wq-Ezp0gSYGu2Bk7K-Mo3CdKoy4A8jU0VJMTd3X6ZyqfoiiIGeLLajwwMvEhKDa5R8FWWqm9vjhJeoMALqjBNjHyPG8OrZUUD45pb3UMfKj3EVcpUVc6n_QuDUOirHwl6rgRPxFEvRzQ7jRyQ4lo1ZDRyimCAMGQYN7YnSaXGBreNxJuKZsOVL5ff8hwv3KlvxzUfTncq_J-ImZqF4dUvkABWCGWv4olOmdd0t0jgMWktseKu2aLDXmOX6X7tW0N7ZIEyQbNcCMTpjknClHf2ANA-wbDqSC7qsbb5WtPc3dklllxBJJIjEKA)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past.

**We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education. **

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education** in 2025.

The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help.

**[Before the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a191952dd58148ef8977cc994b6c7771&_e=k1AowE6ec44IJGFMlgD73pBEh6nJ_TdLLMXA6-M9P3A2qcNo1PgN8TnaoRTPleRWNtAvv9I0wq-Ezp0gSYGu2Bk7K-Mo3CdKoy4A8jU0VJMTd3X6ZyqfoiiIGeLLajwwMvEhKDa5R8FWWqm9vjhJeoMALqjBNjHyPG8OrZUUD45pb3UMfKj3EVcpUVc6n_QuDUOirHwl6rgRPxFEvRzQ7jRyQ4lo1ZDRyimCAMGQYN4QMaec9rtFtJKt7V1lgsKgq_VMnRcxXLK49S5Q2xSgWHS5eMRi6CjyjyLaWHXV3sn1KQCAFdZ8zBoUzxbeyFOgTs9Og3jFOeXCI5k9DJ0YNkM07uftI83_4vU9bi8P5Gouc-AmNEPbaWCaNtOdp-5h).**

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing--with the ultimate goal of transforming American government and society.

Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans--especially younger Americans--about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses--courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

**We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts --efforts such as _Imprimis_ and our ongoing work to help launch and support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide. **

**Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life.**

Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. _This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission._

It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you.

**I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale 's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans.**

Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31.

**You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a191952dd58148ef8977cc994b6c7771&_e=k1AowE6ec44IJGFMlgD73pBEh6nJ_TdLLMXA6-M9P3A2qcNo1PgN8TnaoRTPleRWNtAvv9I0wq-Ezp0gSYGu2Bk7K-Mo3CdKoy4A8jU0VJMTd3X6ZyqfoiiIGeLLajwwMvEhKDa5R8FWWqm9vjhJeoMALqjBNjHyPG8OrZUUD45pb3UMfKj3EVcpUVc6n_QuDUOirHwl6rgRPxFEvRzQ7jRyQ4lo1ZDRyimCAMGQYN7LxwHApZ3YwkZKqko4AA4Z36NV_QaQidb18-cHTmfdyfdp6eu4UZuN3NMcKPQRnrgss02K6hMvtWnJy8gDytA9vGdqNSjRtXTlM1Dmnpo0QCZZv1ZQPu2lsKsdKpjtJyVqU77IhlMVnr4o0beFZnnm)

We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: | | I need you to see this critical update: – 29 Republican-held seats are up for grabs. – We only need to flip THREE of them to reclaim the House. – A Democratic House majority is our BEST shot to stop Trump’s dangerous agenda. = | | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: Emily Randall
subject: 14-hour road trip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
My new Chief of Staff, Zahraa, and I took a road trip around Washington’s 6th District. We drove through five counties, visited the Makah Tribal Council, met with eleven Neah Bay community leaders, shopped at four small businesses, and made it home 14 hours after we left.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99128009/518930046/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.22_RoadTrip_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjlhMzYzNS05MWMwLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8rD8I0XC7HAAVY55H4TegiMsf1UoeW9A5BhB01Q7oWw=&emci=e11d9276-8dbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=a29a3635-91c0-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442) | Peter, I’m hitting the ground running. Or should I say, _driving!_ My new Chief of Staff, Zahraa, and I took a road trip around Washington’s 6th District. We drove through five counties, visited the Makah Tribal Council, met with eleven Neah Bay community leaders, shopped at four small businesses, and made it home 14 hours after we left. **The 6th Congressional District is vast and beautiful. The drives are long, the people are hardworking, and there’s nowhere else I’d rather live and represent.** This trip was a reminder of what we’re fighting for. Clean air and water. Preserving our national parks. Standing with our neighbors who are immigrants or LGBTQ+ folks. Ensuring all of us can retire with dignity. Building a stronger future for all of us. **In 12 days, I’ll take the oath of office, and I’m more ready than ever to go to bat for the 6th District and working people across the country.** [_**One more thing: Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is coming up fast. name: Yazmin, United We Dream
subject: 👉 Your Guide to Clapping Back at Anti-Immigrant Lies this Holiday Season:
body:
This holiday season, we’re not just sitting at the table, we’re flipping it! | | | Hey Peter, tired of hearing anti-immigrant lies from family members? The holiday season can be overwhelming, especially when right-wing propaganda has infiltrated our homes and families with harmful anti-immigrant narratives. 😪 We shouldn’t have to sit at the dinner table and defend our humanity. Unfortunately, for far too long, bad actors like Donald Trump and his allies have pushed harmful narratives about immigrants that have turned our own family members against us. **There’s no reason we should have to bear the burden of opening our family’s eyes to the harm in white nationalist lies, but we choose to organize our family from a place of love.** Peter, you don’t have to carry this weight on your own.**[Check out our guide to “Clapping Back at Anti-Immigrant Lies During the Holidays” for tools to speak up with courage, truth, and just enough fire to challenge what’s harmful and unacceptable.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dCuQn5_lYlCr7avJx91ktkVpitXPrMJTGZjKs0yVlEOYvQpCwfcVAZVGHPGIIubdQFA6uWpKqdnJ3Sf8nEMCxU_7pSdWJh4BarqCxh4fYdgX9otzCLeuRG5nKCpPGEkuZps8zQlgSrAX5WokpYfhjllZnm8WbQVDQ74-ASvwe-rnzVtGdufYmetqpp0H2fh09GSTEsYnU_8Rv0fMN5ReMFMvz9_j_xZKtbdcwawpXFtFdGLsv5RwCXed1DS2N3cjhH1l1b3b2be79Zqq46bmMukKkwfAZkeF9xssFGcSWtz6fa3EmmPdoexAMH7Y8yyqvVCvMGaaPDzvtIGK3NtzXR6bqO8h1AX73OQLmCigYHgDQ/4ci/vf3XvPvkTfiDVaiTsVfrtA/h0/h001.2n3V9gEpazRe-6q9YFg4OHx0Pou65PvVmpf1eUtLbXs)** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dCuQn5_lYlCr7avJx91ktkVpitXPrMJTGZjKs0yVlEOYvQpCwfcVAZVGHPGIIubdQFA6uWpKqdnJ3Sf8nEMCxU_7pSdWJh4BarqCxh4fYdgX9otzCLeuRG5nKCpPGEkuZps8zQlgSrAX5WokpYfhjllblz-pLKyEC3KIc9HCUoaxBJSxCQtgmwwhk3Y1xjKzSXHuXoqH7NNWq3IV6t-xdVWILNoThDwgdSumFkOveAxaGEyFJnOAuczd_6FN9l0CfynV-bMAa1ooHZI860rxBY28VlZ8mFSYalcJoEdpemVkidLMKMv_Ugz1UVHHCHx2VmTtAc9KNYegto_-JZvFZ3kF6UGq2WpAjgYs38_VbrFUQ/4ci/vf3XvPvkTfiDVaiTsVfrtA/h2/h001.4hfffZf6xXgZp7Vq4_UgszxPoO2yOoUZ1fQkmFedNNE)
Learn how to:
* **👂Lead with curiosity:** So you can begin to dismantle the fears and emotions that fuel your family members’ anti-immigrant beliefs
* **🗣️ Share your story with power and impact.** People can argue with stats, but they can’t argue with our lived experiences!
* **🧠 Process the conflict.** Avoiding the conversation doesn’t stop the harm — you should get to speak your truth.
* **🖌️ Paint the reality of what’s at stake.** Focus on the truth about immigrants and the solutions we should be fighting for together.
* **✋Set boundaries with strength.** Not every conversation will change a mind, and that’s not your burden to carry.

Together, we’re working to dismantle the systems that harm us and build a future where we all belong — sometimes this starts with holding space for important conversations within our own home. **👉 Share this guide with your friends and family today to ensure they have the tools to combat anti-immigrant lies these holidays:** **[Share on Facebook](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMctRoxlFO9O82fTB5zU1O8GM7gt5oGQ3dWJzdEHt1kZLTy3m4lPUNbt_ZrsKCWmNYh9KWCFzVq0qx_j1s9xmc0N6-4cq2JMQ15cWo3lregG6x2ktYjzoNpGUulo1JGU8oEBrEaYPMos1fcnD4Xs32z5hIbqA3uT3NfThMaOcN9n_KraS8mBwEXMD8Mh2mlfxy-8QidFm8T8IQTmcIH6FYuPAPx8dnXNHefhxVbmLULi0U4vnL04_EeQerF8FbFmVULSpDp0JAZgA1_WwgYe4hUEa6ya3AVEY0pKnqqgG3O_MdWn64er8_BzgCa9_QwmU6REzhl710MUNhz6k-iaakpZgTXk6XtLa-uVVrOZvTIhao1j-Nkaa8Si0HHQPXEeQXFkUpr2aLAJyS_EdSdrHUPkEt48Zjst-prwm5oI0nHo7GZNZMvsypW5k6AH9dM7joA/4ci/vf3XvPvkTfiDVaiTsVfrtA/h3/h001.7rrgv-6aQnyv61XTNJl26zdy2saEyW5IMFkg_uNCF0c)** Remember to ground yourself in your humanity and resilience this holiday season! 🧡 In power, Yazmin and your friends at United We Dream ****

name: Benson HQ
subject: The first question Secretary Benson asks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Jocelyn has been working hard as Secretary of State to make sure that Michigan’s government is working for you.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=9%2E181023%2ELS-k8W)
Team,
Right now, Secretary Benson is traveling the state to talk to Michiganders. Rather than asking who someone voted for, the secretary asks: “How can we make sure we’re saving you time and money? How can we make sure the government’s working better for you?”
The government is made by the people and for the people, and our goal is to ensure that remains true. Whether it’s speeding up the process to renew your driver’s license, or making absentee ballots more accessible — Jocelyn Benson has been working hard as Secretary of State to make sure that Michigan’s government is working for **you.**
It’s a team effort to get to know what the people need, and why Sec. Benson has set out to meet with community members directly this December. This work is hard, but it’s all worth it when we can make your everyday lives easier.
[**Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help Secretary Benson continue making Michigan’s government work for its people?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb-em-20241222-1?refcode=em20241222-1&refcode2=9_181023_LS-k8W&akid=9%2E181023%2ELS-k8W)
Thank you,
Team Benson

NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Did you get a fundraising email from a candidate you don't know?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153494416&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDk0NDE2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ4OTM4MjYsImV4cCI6MTczNzQ4NTgyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.N2Fi0m8Da_Z4ELKy3pzA8BoBIqU4pNIEI4WCT59Cmzs)
### Here is why candidate/PAC splits can potentially result in problems down the road
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Dec 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153494416&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDk0NDE2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNDg5MzgyNiwiZXhwIjoxNzM3NDg1ODI2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FVgGgYq1ZfXdnWG_E5FrU58rcJPXEcPEh4Gunc-cmOw&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153494416&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDk0NDE2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ4OTM4MjYsImV4cCI6MTczNzQ4NTgyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.N2Fi0m8Da_Z4ELKy3pzA8BoBIqU4pNIEI4WCT59Cmzs&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153494416&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDk0NDE2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ4OTM4MjYsImV4cCI6MTczNzQ4NTgyNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.N2Fi0m8Da_Z4ELKy3pzA8BoBIqU4pNIEI4WCT59Cmzs)
