---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/did-you-get-a-fundraising-email-from?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1f81999a-109c-4336-9eea-9a02d1ac1220?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Image paid for and downloaded from Shutterstock
### Scenario
You open your email and you've gotten a message from a candidate you have never heard from. You wonder: how does this happen? How did they even get my name and contact info?
### PACs use candidates to raise money for their administrative costs.
A lot of times, it happens because a candidate is actually being used by a PAC to fundraise for the PAC.
So those email messages that you get - "I'm So-and-So, and I live in such-and-such, and I am running for the upcoming election..." are not really generating money that stays in your district. They are not even generating significant donations that go directly to the candidate.
We see it most profoundly with congressional races.
Raise your hand if you got a mind-numbing number of texts and emails from candidates from all across the country during the summer and right up to the November election. Some were running in counties I've never heard of, and in states I've only driven through or flown over. But they knew my name and they found their way to my text window or inbox.
Now we are seeing it for the Special Elections - even for Special Elections that have not been called yet.
### How does this work?
I spoke with my fundraising team. They have worked for top-level races, ranging from Joe Biden to Bernie, and hundreds of others. This team is top-notch!
I probed. I whined. I complained. "Can you help me get support from PACs like Candidate So-and-So has?" They commiserated with my fragile candidate ego. And then they walked me through through the numbers.
### Very little of the process behind those email and text messages works to the benefit of the voters who are being asked to contribute.
The messages I forwarded to my team from Candidate So-and-So were what are called "splits" in the industry. Basically, the entire Democratic and Progressive machine is hurting right now. So PACs are actually using Democratic candidates to fundraise for them. This happens on a routine basis, but the practice is especially acute right now, post-2024 election.
Here is how it works: the PAC sends out messages to their lists of prospective donors, introducing a candidate and asking for donations. The PAC usually gets at least 50%, and sometimes as much as 90% of the cut. In most cases, the candidate has to pay a fee to a consultant or to some other intermediary, since a PAC, by definition, cannot work directly with a candidate.
After fees and splits are settled, the candidate gets whatever is left.
The voter, on the other hand, receives the message and thinks, "Hm! I'm gonna send some money to this guy because the race in this particular district is super important!" That voter would likely be dismayed to know that their $20 contribution actually resulted in $10-$18 getting sent out of the district and into the operating budget for an out-of-state PAC, with only $2-$10 going directly to support the race they think is super important.
### This news would be shocking to most voters.
I was skeptical about this explanation from my team. So I asked another consultant. And another. And still two more. (Lots of consultants are calling me these days!) Two of the four were surprised the candidate who had sent the email was going that route, since it may have even cost him money for the placement fees. "Why spend money now, when the race hasn't even been called yet by the governor?" asked two of the four consultants.
I suppose the PAC-driven splits achieve the goal of getting voters to ask, "Who is this candidate?" They also create the illusion that the candidate surely must have an expansive and well-run machine in place ahead of a possible election. "This candidate must be good, since he already has boots on the ground and the race hasn't even been called yet."
Not true. Most likely the candidate who is named on these PAC-driven messages paid a consultant who, for a fee, got them placed with a political organization that has an extensive data list. (Sidebar: remember that in NY, there is no Special Election primary. While there is merit in getting one's name out there, especially if a candidate is brand new to the political scene, the recipients of these PAC-driven texts will not get to choose the candidate for the ballot. The candidate for the ballot line is chosen by the local party leaders.)
### Problems down the road
Here is why the PAC-driven email approach can potentially generate problems down the road: donor fatigue is real. In 2024, donor fatigue has been real since Biden was on the ticket. Donor fatigue got downright overwhelming once Kamala Harris entered the race and many voters (rightfully) pledged their donor dollars to the top of the ticket. Sorry down-ballot races. (You may have heard that the Harris campaign sent money to support down-ballot races, but that was not true for the New York races, since New York is not considered a swing state.)
Here is why candidate/PAC splits can potentially result in another problem down the road: many of the counties that are facing Special Elections in the near future are poor. I'm talking about the difference between Manhattan's billionaire row compared to the more-cows-than-people counties in upstate New York.
With limited donor dollars in a district, any money spent now on a prospective candidate's PAC-driven fundraising campaign will result in fewer available donor dollars for the Democratic Party's nominated candidate, once the Governor calls the race.
Do the math, and you will agree that we need to maximize the pool of available donor dollars. Whomever is chosen by the local party leaders will need to spend money to field a race in those deep-MAGA, financially-distressed counties - not to send to a PAC's administrative offices in DC or Northern Virginia or wherever else PACs hang out.
### So what should we do?
When you get a message from a candidate you've never heard from or never met, scroll down and see who actually paid to send it out.
When you get a message from a candidate you've never heard from, look up their website and social media. Are they involved in the nitty-gritty in the district? Are they discussing the ins and outs of their platform? How are they elevating our Democratic principles while also differentiating themselves from the November 2024 results?
Finally, when you get a message from a candidate you've never heard from that goes something like, "I'm So-and-So, and I live in such-and-such place and I'm running for office", read closely to see if they talk about their platform, their priorities, or their plans. Learn about them. Are they running on their identity, or are they running on issues, with an eye for what's already happening in Washington? Most of all, think twice before committing your donor dollars that your district will need once the race is on.
### Moving into the Special Election
We learned in the 2024 race that identity politics do not work. We also learned that fundraising doesn't really determine the outcome of a race. Kamala Harris, a working class, well-educated civil servant who out-raised her opponent, was beaten by a rapist and convicted felon whom many voters knew was responsible for the January 6th insurrection, and who had to use a lot of the money his supporters sent to him for his legal bills.
Going into the Special Elections, we need to hear from our candidates about how they intend to fight for Democratic values and preserve the rights and congressional appropriations for the middle class, the working poor. Everyday American voters stand to lose their voices in the billionaire's club that has become the new administration. As we saw in the budget discussions and possible federal shutdown, the MAGAs need votes from the Democrats in order to get any of their legislation passed.
### I remain hopeful that I will be the Democratic candidate on the ballot if and when the Special Election in NY-21 is called by Governor Kathy Hochul.
We don't have a Special Election yet in NY-21. We don't have a Democratic candidate yet for the Special Election in NY-21 that we think will happen in 2025.
Until we do, scroll down in your text or email messages. And think twice before you send money off to a PAC for a candidate you've never seen or met.
Closing remarks: not all PACs use splits. Not all PACs are bad. I accepted money from a few PACs in the General election. They were the IBEW PAC, the UAW PAC and the National Organization for Women (NOW) PAC. PACs are somewhat of a reality in the post-Citizens United election process. But please do your homework before you click the "Donate" button. Find out where your money is going before you send it off in an electronic transaction.
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

You wonder: how does this happen? How did they even get my name and contact info? PACs use candidates to raise money for their administrative costs. A lot of times, it happens because a candidate is actually being used by a PAC to fundraise for the PAC. So those email messages that you get - "I'm So-and-So, and I live in such-and-such, and I am running for the upcoming election..." are not really generating money that stays in your district. They are not even generating significant donations that go directly to the candidate. We see it most profoundly with congressional races. Raise your hand if you got a mind-numbing number of texts and emails from candidates from all across the country during the summer and right up to the November election. Some were running in counties I've never heard of, and in states I've only driven through or flown over. But they knew my name and they found their way to my text window or inbox. Now we are seeing it for the Special Elections - even for Special Elections that have not been called yet. How does this work? I spoke with my fundraising team. They have worked for top-level races, ranging from Joe Biden to Bernie, and hundreds of others. This team is top-notch! I probed. I whined. I complained. "Can you help me get support from PACs like Candidate So-and-So has?" They commiserated with my fragile candidate ego. And then they walked me through through the numbers. Very little of the process behind those email and text messages works to the benefit of the voters who are being asked to contribute. The messages I forwarded to my team from Candidate So-and-So were what are called "splits" in the industry. Basically, the entire Democratic and Progressive machine is hurting right now. So PACs are actually using Democratic candidates to fundraise for them. This happens on a routine basis, but the practice is especially acute right now, post-2024 election. Here is how it works: the PAC sends out messages to their lists of prospective donors, introducing a candidate and asking for donations. The PAC usually gets at least 50%, and sometimes as much as 90% of the cut. In most cases, the candidate has to pay a fee to a consultant or to some other intermediary, since a PAC, by definition, cannot work directly with a candidate. After fees and splits are settled, the candidate gets whatever is left. The voter, on the other hand, receives the message and thinks, "Hm! I'm gonna send some money to this guy because the race in this particular district is super important!" That voter would likely be dismayed to know that their $20 contribution actually resulted in $10-$18 getting sent out of the district and into the operating budget for an out-of-state PAC, with only $2-$10 going directly to support the race they think is super important. This news would be shocking to most voters. I was skeptical about this explanation from my team. So I asked another consultant. And another. And still two more. (Lots of consultants are calling me these days!) Two of the four were surprised the candidate who had sent the email was going that route, since it may have even cost him money for the placement fees. "Why spend money now, when the race hasn't even been called yet by the governor?" asked two of the four consultants. I suppose the PAC-driven splits achieve the goal of getting voters to ask, "Who is this candidate?" They also create the illusion that the candidate surely must have an expansive and well-run machine in place ahead of a possible election. "This candidate must be good, since he already has boots on the ground and the race hasn't even been called yet." Not true. Most likely the candidate who is named on these PAC-driven messages paid a consultant who, for a fee, got them placed with a political organization that has an extensive data list. (Sidebar: remember that in NY, there is no Special Election primary. While there is merit in getting one's name out there, especially if a candidate is brand new to the political scene, the recipients of these PAC-driven texts will not get to choose the candidate for the ballot. The candidate for the ballot line is chosen by the local party leaders.) Problems down the road Here is why the PAC-driven email approach can potentially generate problems down the road: donor fatigue is real. In 2024, donor fatigue has been real since Biden was on the ticket. Donor fatigue got downright overwhelming once Kamala Harris entered the race and many voters (rightfully) pledged their donor dollars to the top of the ticket. Sorry down-ballot races. (You may have heard that the Harris campaign sent money to support down-ballot races, but that was not true for the New York races, since New York is not considered a swing state.) Here is why candidate/PAC splits can potentially result in another problem down the road: many of the counties that are facing Special Elections in the near future are poor. I'm talking about the difference between Manhattan's billionaire row compared to the more-cows-than-people counties in upstate New York. With limited donor dollars in a district, any money spent now on a prospective candidate's PAC-driven fundraising campaign will result in fewer available donor dollars for the Democratic Party's nominated candidate, once the Governor calls the race. Do the math, and you will agree that we need to maximize the pool of available donor dollars. Whomever is chosen by the local party leaders will need to spend money to field a race in those deep-MAGA, financially-distressed counties - not to send to a PAC's administrative offices in DC or Northern Virginia or wherever else PACs hang out. So what should we do? When you get a message from a candidate you've never heard from or never met, scroll down and see who actually paid to send it out. When you get a message from a candidate you've never heard from, look up their website and social media. Are they involved in the nitty-gritty in the district? Are they discussing the ins and outs of their platform? How are they elevating our Democratic principles while also differentiating themselves from the November 2024 results? Finally, when you get a message from a candidate you've never heard from that goes something like, "I'm So-and-So, and I live in such-and-such place and I'm running for office", read closely to see if they talk about their platform, their priorities, or their plans. Learn about them. Are they running on their identity, or are they running on issues, with an eye for what's already happening in Washington? Most of all, think twice before committing your donor dollars that your district will need once the race is on. Moving into the Special Election We learned in the 2024 race that identity politics do not work. We also learned that fundraising doesn't really determine the outcome of a race. Kamala Harris, a working class, well-educated civil servant who out-raised her opponent, was beaten by a rapist and convicted felon whom many voters knew was responsible for the January 6th insurrection, and who had to use a lot of the money his supporters sent to him for his legal bills. Going into the Special Elections, we need to hear from our candidates about how they intend to fight for Democratic values and preserve the rights and congressional appropriations for the middle class, the working poor. Everyday American voters stand to lose their voices in the billionaire's club that has become the new administration. As we saw in the budget discussions and possible federal shutdown, the MAGAs need votes from the Democrats in order to get any of their legislation passed. I remain hopeful that I will be the Democratic candidate on the ballot if and when the Special Election in NY-21 is called by Governor Kathy Hochul. We don't have a Special Election yet in NY-21. We don't have a Democratic candidate yet for the Special Election in NY-21 that we think will happen in 2025. Until we do, scroll down in your text or email messages. And think twice before you send money off to a PAC for a candidate you've never seen or met. Closing remarks: not all PACs use splits. Not all PACs are bad. I accepted money from a few PACs in the General election. They were the IBEW PAC, the UAW PAC and the National Organization for Women (NOW) PAC. PACs are somewhat of a reality in the post-Citizens United election process. But please do your homework before you click the "Donate" button. Find out where your money is going before you send it off in an electronic transaction. If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

subject: Biden Admin’s New Report On Gas Exports Basically Undermines One Of Its Key Conclusions
body:
And Nobody In The Biden Admin Wants To Explain How 1,100 More US
Troops Appeared In Syria — Or If The President Knew

Available data and recent history contradict one of the key points of the Biden administration’s long-awaited study on liquefied natural gas (LNG) exports and Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm’s attempt to spin the study into something it is not.
http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbmed90vhvm2b0642j95i0ge0g6nbutsk2vc36fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cji64o34clh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrq4d5h6kprb91h6mqb7djlkeqjetd2eko7fcjhemjr7dd76gr7b99gu1rr4sbmemh38djkmoq33cdkumin7c9l69qr9ctl6pqqfctl6mjr6dd4m5r7b9ll6jqqcdtjmooratjkmuprctt24no

Biden Admin’s New Report On Gas Exports Basically Undermines One Of
Its Key Conclusions

Available data and recent history contradict one of the key points of
the Biden administration’s long-awaited study on liquefied natural gas

Peter, this is flying under too many people’s radar: We have just 100 days until the Wisconsin State Supreme Court election. With retiring Justice Ann Walsh Bradley’s seat open, this race is crucial to protecting the court’s pro-democracy majority that recently struck down the state’s egregiously gerrymandered legislative maps. **I cannot stress enough the power of donating today rather than waiting until the final days before the election. The amount this team can raise now will help determine our plans leading up to critical 2025 elections. I'm asking you directly:** [**Will you donate $30 right away? The NDRC — with the support of dedicated supporters like you — has a proven track record in the Badger State.
Last year, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a _double-digit_ margin, making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs.
Knowing their days of running rampant with partisan gerrymandered maps were over, the state legislature passed Democratic Governor Tony Evers’ fair maps ahead of this year’s elections. Those fair maps helped elect Democracy Defenders across the state, flipping 14 seats in the state assembly and state senate — ending the GOP’s unearned supermajority that had been in place for most of the last 13 years.
**We're making incredible progress in Wisconsin — but in 2025, it’s all at stake again with another state supreme court race.**
If we lose this seat, the conservatives will take back the Supreme Court majority and roll back our progress on fair maps and a whole host of other issues.
[**Your donation today will help power all of the NDRC’s work, including these critical efforts to help elect leaders who will defend our democracy. Will you pitch in today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99129193/518933269/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WisconsinSupCourt_email_20241222-NDRC-Tier1-WisconsinSupCourt_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241222-NDRC-Tier1-WisconsinSupCourt_&utm_campaign=WisconsinSupCourt&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFmYTIwMGVmLTk2YzAtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xo_3VSZi3BIoN9K2iWnacc_Qt9J3uWvFX-VVcrtAv1w=)

clean_body: Your donation today will help power all of the NDRC’s work, including efforts to help elect leaders who will defend our democracy. | Peter, this is flying under too many people’s radar: We have just 100 days until the Wisconsin State Supreme Court election. With retiring Justice Ann Walsh Bradley’s seat open, this race is crucial to protecting the court’s pro-democracy majority that recently struck down the state’s egregiously gerrymandered legislative maps. I cannot stress enough the power of donating today rather than waiting until the final days before the election. The amount this team can raise now will help determine our plans leading up to critical 2025 elections. I'm asking you directly: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The NDRC — with the support of dedicated supporters like you — has a proven track record in the Badger State. Last year, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin, making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs. Knowing their days of running rampant with partisan gerrymandered maps were over, the state legislature passed Democratic Governor Tony Evers’ fair maps ahead of this year’s elections. Those fair maps helped elect Democracy Defenders across the state, flipping 14 seats in the state assembly and state senate — ending the GOP’s unearned supermajority that had been in place for most of the last 13 years. We're making incredible progress in Wisconsin — but in 2025, it’s all at stake again with another state supreme court race. If we lose this seat, the conservatives will take back the Supreme Court majority and roll back our progress on fair maps and a whole host of other issues. = — Claire Claire Low Director of Political and Campaigns National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Break up UnitedHealth via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie's policies are NOT radical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —
UnitedHealth, Cigna, and CVS Health make
billions in profits from people just trying to get health care. Executives
get rich and stocks go up while everyday Americans suffer.

But last week, health care stocks fell as lawmakers introduced legislation
to break up these big corporations. With bipartisan support, this bill
could be a key step in our movement’s fight for Medicare for All.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20723?source=email-20241222&t=1011&akid=7425%2E5885482%2EgDiboL ]ADD YOUR NAME: Support legislation to break up the deadly, for profit
health care industry then chip in to fuel our fight for M4A!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20723?source=email-20241222&t=1012&akid=7425%2E5885482%2EgDiboL ]ADD YOUR NAME

The Wall Street Journal makes the bill sound like some nefarious “plot.”
It isn’t, it’s a small but important step towards holding health
corporations accountable for profiting from care.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20724?t=1013&akid=7425%2E5885482%2EgDiboL ][IMG]

No matter what the corporate media and CEO class say, the reality is that
the deadly, for profit healthcare system ONLY benefits corporate
shareholders and the ultra-rich.

Bernie likes to say that his proposed policies actually aren’t radical.
Medicare for All is NOT radical because getting people the care they need
and saving lives without bankrupting people is how healthcare SHOULD be.

This legislation, to prevent health care companies from controlling all
aspects of the industry, is definitely not radical. Breaking up
corporations to lower costs is not radical.

We need a massive push to pressure lawmakers for healthcare justice right
now, and we can only do it with your support.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20723?source=email-20241222&t=1014&akid=7425%2E5885482%2EgDiboL ]Send a message to your lawmakers to break up giant health corporations
like UnitedHealth now!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20723?source=email-20241222&t=1015&akid=7425%2E5885482%2EgDiboL ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The New York Sun is Different
body:
In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.
And we need you to join us.

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=39caa7da0d0c45f98edc0fbd893f2367&_e=MzIEKqindaGesgjV6psoIX9CzFmRjEViJxrddo9TU6muCfdy0miO40Aa35uWP_3W8x4_tQH_Cx3b0SfOn6pmtE9GnMuaD4Chp1qlsuASrVMi5gfBNi4y7hO5J_HbhxNI1S65lEAEO_viIbVfTDe4jqS7azb69y3dYPsTu002y7eGWf4KovtdBzHzW87BvH2D5mkD4TLx_ePJjVaUcnT9GrSEYsMzrg2VXrAc1z6Mhfqj1IuylFqLdji1z5D-eiP1dgBj5WiCUm87W8QlCOvxUVTayt4kOSmbaiBETIwzUJ0tfcru51q9tloxxdIXEd_HfORd_qVQKRRNLRhO40cQ5KCyOJ_Kz4E7nyWhhmJz_x9oeKfOmuBI_IRqrOi-wmNl)

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

Peter,

You would not believe the inappropriate books Scholastic pushes on kids at innocent book fairs, from highly sexualized content to confusing stories about gender transitioning to books promoting self-harm.

**I 've documented some of the books for you below so you can find them yourself if you don't believe me.**

Each of these contains storylines aimed at making children question their identity, consider dealing with their feelings through self-harm, or accept gender confusion as a normal part of growing up.

Peter, it's been one year since we set out to create a wholesome alternative book fair experience for both private _and_ public schools.

And in just 12 months, SkyTree has...
* Hosted over 280 book fairs in 47 states
* Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection
* Impacted over 86,000 students in 2024

**When schools choose SkyTree Book Fairs** , every book we send to schools is carefully vetted by our team to ensure it does not include sexually explicit content, storylines about gender confusion, or other harmful political and psychological themes that kids are not equipped to handle.

Scholastic is neglecting your values to push their agenda forward while offering books and promotions at an affordable price. It makes it nearly impossible to compete with them.

As a non-profit, we are committed to providing book fairs to schools free of charge so that every school has the opportunity to enrich their students with uplifting content that points them toward eternal truths.

This means we rely on your support to continue making reading a wholesome adventure again.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: These 7 words break my heart.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Democrat or Republican or Independent, progressive or conservative or moderate — the worst thing we can do when someone tells us they are in pain is to diminish it.
#
**"It's not as bad as you think."**
So often I see people pull out those 7 little words when responding to people in pain. **And I have to tell you — Democrat or Republican or Independent, progressive or conservative or moderate — the worst thing we can do when someone tells us they are in pain is to dismiss it.**
But too often, we see a politics that pits our pain against each other. We see political leaders diminish the pain of those on the other side of the partisan divide.
When someone conveys, "It's not as bad as you think", what the person in pain hears is, "Your pain doesn't matter." It forces people to defend their pain, only making people angrier and more frustrated.
When our neighbor says they're worried about the cost of groceries and housing... that pain matters.
When our coworker says they think they might be making less because of their race or gender... that pain matters.
When our cousin says they are heartbroken by another opioid-related death in their community... that pain matters.
When our friend from high school who served in the military now can't get the care they need through the VA... that pain matters.
Everyone’s pain matters, regardless of their background or how they vote. People don’t have to be “right” for what they’re facing to be “wrong.” There is, unfortunately, enough pain to go around. And any therapist will tell you that the first step to healing is to have your pain seen.
**What we need are elected leaders who see that pain across difference and disagreement. And, instead of turning it into hate and bigotry to fuel an authoritarian power-grab, we need them to actually do something about it. That's what justice looks like.**
My opponents and even some well-intentioned supporters have tried to paint me as the voice for one community.
**But I didn’t run for Congress just to be a voice for people who share my background or political beliefs. I'm going to fight for everyone — including people who don't understand me and might not fight for me. Because we can heal our political divides and deliver for everyone.**
[**If that's the radical compassion you believe we need more of in our leaders, I'm humbly asking you to support me with a $5 donation (or whatever you can afford) before our public end-of-year FEC fundraising deadline on 12/31.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241222-1?refcode=em20241222-1638&amount=5&refcode2=1638_21716_Cr55iM&akid=1638%2E21716%2ECr55iM)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241222-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241222-1638&refcode2=1638_21716_Cr55iM&akid=1638%2E21716%2ECr55iM)**
Thanks for being on my team,
Sarah McBride
P.S. Is this email making you think of a personal pain that our elected leaders need to do more to address? Reply to share your thoughts — I promise someone on my team will respond.
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241222-1&t=1&refcode2=1638_21716_Cr55iM&akid=1638%2E21716%2ECr55iM)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1638%2E21716%2ECr55iM)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1638%2E21716%2ECr55iM)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1638%2E21716%2ECr55iM)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

subject: Celebrate Christmas with an Exclusive Edition of A Christmas Carol
body:
Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. Charles Dickens’ A Christmas Carol is a wonderful example.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=f3754a3179a048b6a1a9f3a78f4b132f&_t=ytTO5UQKj7J_srUKx_GGTtqWTNWvs6xKIx6zoo6-m3uuSKaPOboB99kEMG3-yJNKrSMGBoHXKUa3raz3xbn9liZpRsUKdZjTgSbbMVUfsBBTWIH0RAzqbxvITH8ozfqf)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f3754a3179a048b6a1a9f3a78f4b132f&_e=OCq7nbjM1zt-ZYyLjqX4SrpVZPRl5o3Squ0A9xtc_XLV3izCE62YQWHIPsBFsK41yylWzK1zQXEFcYFnyYRyfGjYcVLxhKRNrR10TdS8sQoPG2VkbBnNYHjGOfCfN6wp4vpCfCFibfNylWpRm-3-8Q5nlu87uJ1dkd3vv2dM4sRrqFqD6gfKrjkwLXLDxVw9aoMUSXGwVf2h0NvXvSHDG2H-6LvlrSCqMmZCcU8eKfGfNAX3HiF4XLxEXlftEMk7qui3ovIF72ye9WSP0XQ04fo1GWXlpui2Q2Uc__xuCfWy7Ow9doToMQEzK9dgVjuRuln15npkLAU4QEJAzvfHUV2Dlv4ZAb3oKDfoHT3kvbeiKDT0vNMDQ6dhZZgsfyw_sNctj2h6WsYvaMCLlc1nhA%3D%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Great literature teaches you about human nature and draws you toward the good. Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a wonderful example.

You're likely familiar with Ebenezer Scrooge--literature's most famous miser. His choices corrupted his soul and left him miserable. The drama of this beloved Christmas tale consists of his education at the hands of the three Ghosts of Christmas and its effects on his soul.

The story is rich with meaning. Among its chief lessons is that one's happiness depends upon learning to choose well and to love the good. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f3754a3179a048b6a1a9f3a78f4b132f&_e=OCq7nbjM1zt-ZYyLjqX4SrpVZPRl5o3Squ0A9xtc_XLV3izCE62YQWHIPsBFsK41yylWzK1zQXEFcYFnyYRyfGjYcVLxhKRNrR10TdS8sQoPG2VkbBnNYHjGOfCfN6wp4vpCfCFibfNylWpRm-3-8Q5nlu87uJ1dkd3vv2dM4sRrqFqD6gfKrjkwLXLDxVw9aoMUSXGwVf2h0NvXvSHDG2H-6LvlrSCqMmZCcU8eKfGfNAX3HiF4XLxEXlftEMk7ZgPuxZAGpdgRcweanOgcm2U4FJiaFVnOVy-HQcnxKRgc2pkFbAjmeEUuHqt4vxq8recotAEUNz6M8zC4MwgH_eJdA_mrUarh8SDWMNM9grCtdXHdsWaeArWnaKGQ08u6i-QyrWZTeJWi7kaVRjxTig%3D%3D)
**This Christmas, I want to send you an exclusive hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more.**

This beautiful volume features an inspiring introduction and 26 exclusive illustrations. You can treasure this meaningful keepsake or even gift it to a loved one.

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f3754a3179a048b6a1a9f3a78f4b132f&_e=OCq7nbjM1zt-ZYyLjqX4SrpVZPRl5o3Squ0A9xtc_XLV3izCE62YQWHIPsBFsK41yylWzK1zQXEFcYFnyYRyfGjYcVLxhKRNrR10TdS8sQoPG2VkbBnNYHjGOfCfN6wp4vpCfCFibfNylWpRm-3-8Q5nlu87uJ1dkd3vv2dM4sRrqFqD6gfKrjkwLXLDxVw9aoMUSXGwVf2h0NvXvSHDG2H-6LvlrSCqMmZCcU8eKfGfNAX3HiF4XLxEXlftEMk7asSVEK7BXW3o5LRG7i8i34PjkwCe0fJ58GQC0WrMJ_fCWkyqA-q2mNY7TKqzq2cckPX0SO5OoEU80lTotrGmahdFitbFJ2dco6xShCUkyDvOpJQbzHFOZNA1rnqLa-yFRoroVh_F8IYFs5xTihccrw%3D%3D)

I wish you and yours a blessed Christmas season,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Lila Rose
subject: Sign our petition to stop subsidizing Planned Parenthood
body:
Planned Parenthood’s latest report shows they performed nearly 400,000 abortions last year. That’s one life lost every 80 seconds.

#
Dear Friend,

Did you know that a preborn baby has a 62:1 chance of being aborted instead of receiving prenatal care at Planned Parenthood? This means millions of our tax dollars are funding an organization that prioritizes killing.

Planned Parenthood's latest report shows they performed nearly 400,000 abortions last year. That's one life lost every 80 seconds. Further alarmingly, $10.7 billion of taxpayer money has funded Planned Parenthood since 2000.

I know you do not want your tax dollars used this way. You can make your voice heard now.

Sign our petition to stop taxpayer subsidization of Planned Parenthood. **[https://www.liveaction.org/defund-planned-parenthood-petition/](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=bf3cadfa2df94f9f9725ed88300f2af0&_e=3pJxB0KYrt2EUiAl4WQ-FjTdlbn-xn4rY0-azEYINLWS5rnYN1bBojzDMmZq-1X5Cgvg570sTlgR7T1nGHvHTzzHV1OMqEgB1fTe_jhn9gvArxn7AmwBiZqqta1aEC630fQ3caYT-X-zLV6yY1ue3k21fYbXlXOUcqTpMuM1QD5JeFq3f0OD1VUjJc6vXo-uLn2EwYoM22AVO8O1EShs_epzKGrsaLHIdUGV8aHG7F2fGOW0vJUSMt3lEV8rRZpL2ScSZHdOzGu7zsPKsjFRUCLg7tO2DGnBXvi7B6P_20e914mNqkJKzg57mmVGsBvqhNX69ZCqxGOBB6wrupq_9A1Sw0gpO-R6e4l9Y2-fZVd5T9-heokbwxWDIGTP5DR86t8306Lh4UZb9npS4AhoSA%3D%3D)**

With new leadership coming this November, your voice is crucial. Share this with your pro-life friends, and together let's demand an end to the taxpayer subsidization of Planned Parenthood.

Thank you for your support that can change history and save lives.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=bf3cadfa2df94f9f9725ed88300f2af0&_e=3pJxB0KYrt2EUiAl4WQ-FjTdlbn-xn4rY0-azEYINLWS5rnYN1bBojzDMmZq-1X5Cgvg570sTlgR7T1nGHvHTzzHV1OMqEgB1fTe_jhn9gvArxn7AmwBiZqqta1aEC630fQ3caYT-X-zLV6yY1ue3k21fYbXlXOUcqTpMuM1QD5JeFq3f0OD1VUjJc6vXo-uLn2EwYoM22AVO8O1EShs_epzKGrsaLHIdUGV8aHG7F3Ngpaztb3qV0odvd4GrGfa6SKniixCK9-WU66bWfWo--i1wlXO1eD2hR3TjeVW98m-YyiU9cfeLvBs4R2V-6ptaRRbk3_BaWxyVptHUurHtEcW9h1F7_MV1kPuYglS5LmINRG8a4biucGj1Z0K1tSlBO14vINDw8juGxNiqxoEZw%3D%3D)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: A moment I won’t forget
body:
It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father.
|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=27f2fd490f5547ab8cefd714fc0aed1e&_t=KctGo03XYKp3iewrUuEZddVivgxXNN4E55F7j6jv3nWArktzuY6dQwHk4v-xc7ospRbsvGagLmEiJTybxQOan33IHRzrWISLmyU4RxDm3C08ZiAxSvdVMB21ZctThsXQ)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=27f2fd490f5547ab8cefd714fc0aed1e&_e=51xX5O7b3iGrokF_DOV-d9P4kSqc5zVNOfvJWlJfHjDoXL8NeUlj2rT4IKCo4INiaUlDA7VGumOp05VO3ezD15cpp7l5s1UFZ97O1P9eKBP3Qsx1OXRVczeJO-IB3Xk6OulRsaThxrC7mCIKYt1fT8xTpjlpOUSEYwx3oMXMlv0QaOCHqeusg1A4hSXIjDGfBevGjuaBzOLESwnnxusUa5MHa05NspNFTw89Bk4Mm5NjKuxirgKpfsuuhNSFmUcbXauiSi1EnFlIZ9KZVRnCrEw3b3rOGJRCzXBwa3ETdEfYYyf87QjFFOpbarGviXwxkw4b4VCNtAjG4iUQwUl3CC9gmjBieQAjhVf_9Qsh28hP4My3kncmpKABkzet2QbAuPMVfYsUOS8KMkTt3qCUcMpz_r_MXbNem0pTPReSjmZ9Z-IxYx5wUPgJB5ZjQGx3)
---
Hello Friend,

It was November of 1989. My brother, sister, and I were in the waiting room at Presbyterian Hospital, awaiting the surgeon's report on my father. My dad had been complaining for several months that he just wasn't feeling well. The doctors couldn't find anything, so they suggested exploratory surgery. When the surgeon came back into the waiting room, he said, "We found that he has pancreatic cancer, and it has spread everywhere. There is nothing we can do."

Of course, my brother, sister, and I asked the inevitable question that every doctor hates to answer: "How long does my dad have, do you think, Doctor?" He replied, "Well, it's impossible to know. It could be weeks. It could be a few months. It might even be a year. But attitude is everything."

That struck me. With all the medical technologies available, the doctor was saying that the greatest variable in my father's longevity would be something immeasurable but very real: his attitude. I immediately thought of a comment by William James: "Perhaps the greatest discovery of this century is that if you can change your attitude, you can change your life."

That statement inspired me to preach a series and write a book about the attitudes Christians should strive to adopt instead of those that come naturally. I'm talking about choosing things like:
---
* Purpose over aimlessness
* Perserverance over defeat
* Faith over worry

---
My book, _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , is being sent as a thank-you gift to anyone who donates to _Pathway to Victory's_ ministry work this month.

Each one of us has the opportunity to adjust our attitudes and choose what is noble and good. When we make that decision, the ramifications to our life and the lives of those around us are significant. I want to help you make the right choices.
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=27f2fd490f5547ab8cefd714fc0aed1e&_e=51xX5O7b3iGrokF_DOV-d9P4kSqc5zVNOfvJWlJfHjDoXL8NeUlj2rT4IKCo4INiaUlDA7VGumOp05VO3ezD15cpp7l5s1UFZ97O1P9eKBP3Qsx1OXRVczeJO-IB3Xk6OulRsaThxrC7mCIKYt1fT8xTpjlpOUSEYwx3oMXMlv0QaOCHqeusg1A4hSXIjDGfBevGjuaBzOLESwnnxusUa5MHa05NspNFTw89Bk4Mm5NjKuxirgKpfsuuhNSFmUcbXauiSi1EnFlIZ9KZVRnCrHS4Gyy5e9UN_GpeEDDv-Z90Qrdrt6pIW7vyKrCqsba76Tg3QisKBmfbZCGfnTxHH3-jle0c7Y6qHjaX69-cn2ND4k8KDF-ysePVgsMZ6cBJk5AzIjh3GbzXu3pIktOIFDQCHE7mIR28vBucvwgfuftVfgChUkHYV_-AFoKvMuUw)
---
To get your copy of _Choose Your Attitudes, Change Your Life_ , you can give a gift of any amount here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-generous-gift-1](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=27f2fd490f5547ab8cefd714fc0aed1e&_e=51xX5O7b3iGrokF_DOV-d9P4kSqc5zVNOfvJWlJfHjDoXL8NeUlj2rT4IKCo4INiaUlDA7VGumOp05VO3ezD15cpp7l5s1UFZ97O1P9eKBP3Qsx1OXRVczeJO-IB3Xk6OulRsaThxrC7mCIKYt1fT8xTpjlpOUSEYwx3oMXMlv0QaOCHqeusg1A4hSXIjDGfBevGjuaBzOLESwnnxusUa5MHa05NspNFTw89Bk4Mm5NjKuxirgKpfsuuhNSFmUcbXauiSi1EnFlIZ9KZVRnCrOPujuiWb2snrF40SqyoEDG_WFYy1QaoY3oR2w8Z6mpnVt38iw0lZPIIF2XOmoIXp1TcNIIpPF5Cc6ZVSCOIENh2xeOQZJQvGCT08lzXxLxRKj4qCTvZHaVTRl-BvOd0P1niyZxUcy1R7SQLVjU7GICuXBsdiA8pR9AoGRcvHSEr)

I pray that it alters the very trajectory of your life and ministry as a believer!

Thank you, Friend, for supporting the proclamation of the gospel and the teaching of God's Word worldwide. We simply can't do it without you.

Sincerely,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - If you are able to give a gift of $75 or more, we will not only send you the book, but we will also include the outstanding personal and group study guide as well as the complete 12-message series on DVD/MP3. Request the bundle here: [https://secure.ptv.org/choose-your-attitudes-change-your-life-large-gift-kit-1](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=27f2fd490f5547ab8cefd714fc0aed1e&_e=51xX5O7b3iGrokF_DOV-d9P4kSqc5zVNOfvJWlJfHjDoXL8NeUlj2rT4IKCo4INiaUlDA7VGumOp05VO3ezD1_sj_QSstx4748DtRJB3xbCk_UhSIF1jd5HS2AGimMnF4M0Z7tphx-Hy7KKiawso7Bh36uUcZ6vcl6pvLvVeha_2rZVu-hkX32Y9I1alF0dKWeM6A2jelR0TYm0JrPWmTBNtFXg8Yq5__Y9fvI9EPElOGJEODFkQUMGjpdKwFfG9nHdSDNf8qMsFn3qRKFT8tharrEhHLUMTlbYPbkecrfdsHNRE2RfEPCbpd974043JkTSz303pkU15Ox2JoH6V3xowLkjwGfgqsGYX2pgMCuJbHiypXjmDtar8r6khzpSmVSINPDseWL5-nnAyGlbOerbgYBo06dBJKI0U9VgXwc0Mjm_jMuGeFvaAsDcmaokf)

name: David Horowitz
subject: I’m not saying this to scare you
body:
I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2d2dfa6135248ae9df28782e04c2236&_e=Me8xx75x_dXRBxy6pS6YCHXHcWtPaKHm9BvWA4SeIsScEQyisqzqsp1UV3Rf43qEYFdc9sfWljSGbRcvLMfMClq60JpGlxtkclk6zlOzttgjTtX61N1MpZB6Sgnx-TR5ST0P-hrchRMMmx8ldbjOo9F8dk_Hm8AywiNpHtKkcE806iqT31Iy3OYLyp6ENzzw0_nhcdN9p_LGcwg9Y78xrqldwe2jcuHc_co42JcRnHGGmbINMvuhEMznfo4IAHWvTOaoDybj7Kctvb7N9LfC2c1UPeZvtsbx_kJckn82ZknwFHWoMlxP7OBc4ysNbmxHybA5D4iADX3GwiwXuXQ57tMYdIrHq_Uq3tM5VWttSDF25uwQU7swW9zWMPzTMj6_wx7mJ7Ayy4139wdV9bSPLg%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2d2dfa6135248ae9df28782e04c2236&_e=Me8xx75x_dXRBxy6pS6YCHXHcWtPaKHm9BvWA4SeIsScEQyisqzqsp1UV3Rf43qEYFdc9sfWljSGbRcvLMfMClq60JpGlxtkclk6zlOzttgjTtX61N1MpZB6Sgnx-TR5ST0P-hrchRMMmx8ldbjOo9F8dk_Hm8AywiNpHtKkcE806iqT31Iy3OYLyp6ENzzw0_nhcdN9p_LGcwg9Y78xrqldwe2jcuHc_co42JcRnHGGmbINMvuhEMznfo4IAHWvGzYg8SrWs39eZIcXs1G5th-HNANIsHoR0Q8Li7M3dz0u1C6bnS7zYKjsrGmTgAH83UNosFtz-pgKvh6OOBrauPhIn9smFyQIGvMXlLTPtjykSy0n_2SflYMP1dhTrudZDrV7IEmf99zSrEqrF-1w1Q%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d2d2dfa6135248ae9df28782e04c2236&_e=Me8xx75x_dXRBxy6pS6YCHXHcWtPaKHm9BvWA4SeIsScEQyisqzqsp1UV3Rf43qEYFdc9sfWljSGbRcvLMfMClq60JpGlxtkclk6zlOzttgjTtX61N1MpZB6Sgnx-TR5ST0P-hrchRMMmx8ldbjOo9F8dk_Hm8AywiNpHtKkcE806iqT31Iy3OYLyp6ENzzw0_nhcdN9p_LGcwg9Y78xrqldwe2jcuHc_co42JcRnHGGmbINMvuhEMznfo4IAHWvOZQpKZwCKBgTW1qrdVkDGLFVmYzQyC_MH3d-0WPjnk3ovRnW2mFj5g75daF1XMsAh-n5dA_N928_03Y4EH1f-iSSloVGLPCMaloiOaOxIg0sFp0bhdQnTZAEr0fEyEw6HEzzCenumhZS0dpLkc7Y-w%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is.| | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Peter,

I’m sure you receive many emails from campaigns asking for money, but hopefully, I can provide some context behind these requests.

As we strategize and plan for the future of our campaign, our monthly and quarterly fundraising objectives are crucial in these discussions.

Our ability to secure victory in 2025 hinges on whether we meet these goals. We don't set these benchmarks arbitrarily; they guide our trajectory towards success.

So, when you receive communications from us stressing the significance of reaching our fundraising goal, please understand that it comes from a place of sincerity. _**We value your support immensely and are committed to being completely transparent about our campaign's direction.**_

name: Josh Weil
subject: Stopping Trump’s MAGA Trifecta starts by winning in only a few short weeks.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85583?t=6&akid=18269%2E878179%2EgXqzmu) Team — it’s Josh Weil,

I’m a dad and public school teacher, and possibly the only thing standing between Trump and total MAGA control of our government. His appointment of a FL Congressman has triggered a special election.

**Flipping this seat in only a few short weeks could mean that Trump LOSES control of Congress.**

In a special election like this one, every vote is going to count, so we need to let every Democrat in our district know the stakes of this election — ASAP.

[**I need to raise $12,000 today to help fight the MAGA Trump dollars coming into this district, and WIN this race. **DROP EVERYTHING AND READ THIS _AWFUL_ HEADLINE:**
**Trump is RELENTLESS in his attempts to intimidate Smith.**

**Smith must be under immense pressure. Now more than ever, he needs good Democrats like you to stand with him.**
**[_Top Democrat, sign our urgent petition standing with Special Counsel Jack Smith »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241222_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22669%2E4449941%2EbSC_7L)**

**But the GOP DOESN’T care.** They’re attacking Smith and his case from **_every angle_** in hopes of shielding Trump from justice!

We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith – if he doesn’t get enough support, his case against Trump could TOTALLY COLLAPSE.
**[_Let’s set an example: Nobody threatens good, honest public servants like Jack Smith. Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241222_EMPET_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22669%2E4449941%2EbSC_7L)**

### Speaking up for peace and justice in the darkest time of the year.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Dec 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=153500518&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNTAwNTE4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNDkxMDQ3OCwiZXhwIjoxNzM3NTAyNDc4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.EpqCZMw1vx4HyBH0llLgD3unJxWciRLVYlii8nQ-KUg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=153500518&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNTAwNTE4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ5MTA0NzgsImV4cCI6MTczNzUwMjQ3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1sS2_tjFoNCYgEgk4xXDfuqWWt3ka4QR7jlXLsUOC8g&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=153500518&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNTAwNTE4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ5MTA0NzgsImV4cCI6MTczNzUwMjQ3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1sS2_tjFoNCYgEgk4xXDfuqWWt3ka4QR7jlXLsUOC8g)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/voices-of-conscience?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

As we proceed through the darkest time of the year, and decorate the darkness with brilliant lights, beautiful decorations, and the warmth of family, let me wish you and yours a joyful, meaningful, and generous holiday season. (For my part, snuggling my husband and two kiddos is a beautiful way to spend the dark of winter. So is writing to you.)
Let me acknowledge that for those of us who feel keenly the ongoing atrocities in the Middle East - atrocities resulting in the mutilated corpses of children every single day - the effort to find joy in the holidays comes at a moral cost. We are all living through moral and psychological violence - to the extent that we reach out our conscience and compassion to embrace all of humanity, including the most vulnerable people on the planet.
"It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.L1movbn17CtHZdUUNKx-xJtN_psbOsOTXpKGQqqS6Ac?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153500518)
Vulnerable people who Jesus (the prophet Isa, in Islam) would have embraced as "the least of these my brethren," and commanded us to love, care for, and stand up to protect. The prophet Muhammad, peace be upon him, tells us the same - "whoever saves one innocent life, it is as if they have saved all of humanity; and whoever takes one innocent life, it is as if they have killed all of humanity."
There is no room in any of the religions of grace to justify the murder of innocents.
* * *
For those of you following my campaign for Congress, I have news!
**I have formally registered my candidacy for Washington State 's 9th Congressional District in 2026**.
I will be running again.
From now until then, there's a great deal of work to be done. Last time, we had a short runway from a cold start with no infrastructure and _still_ made history - this time, we'll have experience, a great team, better preparation, and far better systems underpinning our efforts. (_Please reach out directly if you want to be a part of this!_ Early preparation yields success. Let's make it happen.)
We'll also have two more years - it appears - of genocide unfolding before our eyes; two more years for the reality of the situation to penetrate the American conscience; and two more years for the truth to sink in: that we as a nation have sacrificed our moral standing in the world and most of our wealth - which should be invested in our communities at home - in service to a mistake.
**There is no good reason we don 't have universal healthcare, free higher education, great childcare and support for families, and stable housing available for everyone. Other countries - even poorer than us - do. We can too.**
Instead, we have endless wars in pursuit of global hegemony, profiting the billionaires who've bought our politicians, resulting in the deaths of millions of people inflicted with our tax money and in our name.
Our Constitutional Republic - experiment in this version of democracy - is not serving "We the People." The responsibility, and opportunity, to make things right **belongs to us**.
Enough is enough.
[Get 50% off forever](https://substack.com/redirect/856e1e9e-b188-4d66-8e93-9626fbbc0cec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
One of the susceptibilities of the human condition is to consider issues close to home to be more important than those further away.
As natural a mindset as this is, however, it obscures the reality that we live in a deeply interconnected world that is dominated by one military and economic superpower - our own country. And that our country's decisions and actions have meant life or death for millions upon millions of people worldwide within my lifetime - whether by suffocating sanctions, direct invasion, regime change operations, genocide by proxy, or fatal failure to act.
I wish it weren't so.
I wish that being a patriotic American in truth - meaning, someone who believes in, and strives to uphold, American principles of equality, liberty, and justice **for all** \- didn't require consistent, searching, and painful criticism of the current power structure of my own government.
But it does.
So let us do a little reckoning together.
(Indulge me in a particular focus, this time - the genocide in Gaza is the most crystalline microcosm and mirror we have, right now, to see the problems clearly - and hopefully, find solutions.)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=153500518&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNTAwNTE4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ5MTA0NzgsImV4cCI6MTczNzUwMjQ3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1sS2_tjFoNCYgEgk4xXDfuqWWt3ka4QR7jlXLsUOC8g)
First: The United States has funded [more than 70%](https://substack.com/redirect/601367af-05da-44d6-aba5-99d58eaa6b13?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Israel's agressions in Gaza. Top Israeli officials [have admitted](https://substack.com/redirect/0d919e84-41f3-4a70-86d8-44b3a09f3ce7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it would be impossible for them to prosecute this slaughter without our assistance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f959bec0-cf83-498e-aa17-c69b18c32202?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Amnesty International - arguably the most respected and credible human rights organization in the world - has formally concluded that Israel's actions in Gaza [constitute genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/091bb613-a85e-44d6-b162-9733f28291cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The International Court of Justice concluded ----
An Israeli historian, Lee Mordechai, has compiled [extensive documentation](https://substack.com/redirect/ca5feae5-1e7b-44c8-9879-312f15ed2e2f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Israeli war crimes in Gaza - a document stretching to a full 1400 footnotes.
_While most of us can 't afford the time to read that work in its entirety, I ask you to please download and keep it. And remember it, the next time the BBC (or anyone else) writes a shockingly evasive article, of the type that has [ignited a firestorm](https://substack.com/redirect/096d1b0a-c6a3-4ae2-b0c3-a664705df9c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) within that organization due to a longstanding and consistent pattern of misleading coverage._
Even in 2021, American comedian and talk show host John Oliver was [publicly describing](https://substack.com/redirect/d6000165-adbf-4db7-8703-b5c1774d19a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Israeli apartheid and the disproporationality of the suffering, and the military capabilities, between the two sides of this conflict. (Feel free to skip the first 90 seconds.)
Since October 7, 2023, US soldiers and government officials have undertaken major acts of protest, including but not limited to:
* A serving US solder and intelligence officer [speaking out](https://substack.com/@freepalestinewurruk/note/c-82445842) disruptively in a Congressional hearing (one of many, but an exemplary case);
* Resigning - either [quietly](https://substack.com/redirect/7d0f627f-8d48-4dda-98c1-0669cf4282f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [very publicly](https://substack.com/redirect/ee0d77f1-22e0-4b9d-a887-070e65806d3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and in one case, starting a new political organization to [directly advocate](https://substack.com/redirect/fc69328d-9295-4631-ae13-f09f042546b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Capitol Hill;
* And most devastatingly, [taking their own life by fire](https://substack.com/redirect/342da80d-0d27-446f-b648-05d88ec6ad16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

And tens of millions of people, the world over - myself included - have taken to the streets to demand peace, justice, and an end to the slaughter.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/115711df-e55d-4f0b-9b14-7fc3896ddf4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Share "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1zdWJzdGFjayZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXNoYXJlJmFjdGlvbj1zaGFyZSIsInAiOjE1MzUwMDUxOCwicyI6MzI2MDExMSwiZiI6dHJ1ZSwidSI6OTA1MDExOTIsImlhdCI6MTczNDkxMDQ3OCwiZXhwIjoxNzM3NTAyNDc4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMCIsInN1YiI6ImxpbmstcmVkaXJlY3QifQ.MxoZin2MUzd-8cDfBnicMz8HdoCGMWtrKuSTzncu6v4?)
Now, Palestinians and Palestinian-Americans are [suing Secretary of State Antony Blinken](https://substack.com/redirect/aabb2ce7-5505-4fe7-a791-98995b5b5dc2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to compel the US to obey _our own laws_ and withhold weapons from Israel, given the consistent and compelling evidence that Israel is deliberately blocking humanitarian aid from entering Gaza, where a besieged and carpet-bombed population is slowly, agonizingly being starved to death.
This is important progress, given that Blinken has been found to [illegally ignore US State Department reports](https://substack.com/redirect/291d5cbb-1ebd-4d7c-9afa-7280ce414292?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Israel's withholding of aid, and has even been [credibly accused](https://substack.com/redirect/5410b98a-531b-4d68-8fa7-bb405d2a52f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (by Israelis themselves) of _approving the decision to bomb aid trucks_ and being a _direct participant_ in their war cabinet.
Another crucial step should be to revoke the nonprofit status of "charitable" organizations in the United States that raise funds for Israeli sniper units, who go on to [brag on video](https://substack.com/redirect/5bd71edf-92d5-4c87-b2da-e8dd7ef813f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about shooting unarmed civilians in Gaza.
And in the midst of all the organizing, we [learn about](https://open.substack.com/pub/philippajanewinkler/p/hillary-clinton-email-natos-war-on?r=3zafez&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=true), and [reckon with, ](https://substack.com/@jonathancook/note/c-82000131?utm_source=notes-share-action&r=3zafez)history. We witness the horrors being done in our name and we [grieve](https://substack.com/redirect/3b42f6b4-de08-42ff-8599-d32a3182aa7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And we learn more about the [beauty of the people](https://substack.com/redirect/2d140379-11e3-425d-831d-a8ca1462ff3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) we were taught to hate. And we remember who [lied to us](https://substack.com/@bettbeat/note/c-81887862?utm_source=notes-share-action&r=3zafez), and why.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.L1movbn17CtHZdUUNKx-xJtN_psbOsOTXpKGQqqS6Ac?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153500518)
By writing about this, I risk blowback. I risk threats - I've already faced death and rape threats during the course of my campaign. I risk well-funded political attacks. I risk making myself "unelectable."
But if I do not write about this, I am not a human being.
Let alone a Muslim charged by my creator with striving _against oppression_ and _for justice_ however I can.
Let alone a patriotic American who can wholeheartedly claim the principle of "Liberty and Justice for **All**."
To quote the venerable Dr. King, "_Our lives begin to end the moment we remain silent about things that matter._ "
* * *
The prophet Jesus, who we honor at this time of the year, allowed himself to be sacrificed for the greater good. For love of all humanity.
Whatever your beliefs, may his example inspire us. By speaking the truth with love, no matter what happens to us as a consequence, we become legendary - and maybe, just maybe, we too can change the world.
